the toilet lock has been a fantastic purchase! my 3-year-old was fascinated with the toilet, and this has kept him away. I like how it’s adjustable and fits different types of toilets. however, after a while, the adhesive started to wear down and it needed reapplying.

this nonslip mat is a must-have! I put it in my tub, and it hasn’t budged an inch since. it even dries quickly after my showers. the only gripe I have is that it’s a bit tricky to clean; the texture collects grime faster than a flat mat would.

I was skeptical about shower grab bars, but these are seriously awesome! they’re really secure and blend in nicely with my shower decor. the only issue I faced was with installation; the screws didn’t line up perfectly, so it took longer than expected.

got this bath mat about a month ago, and it’s pretty decent. the design is cute, but I wish it had more grip. it feels slippery sometimes, especially if I step on it right after a shower. good enough to keep for now but will be on the lookout for a better option.

the toilet lock worked great at first, but my son did figure it out after a few weeks. I love that it was easy to install, but I need something that lasts longer. I’ve heard there are sturdier locks out there, so I might give those a shot next.

absolutely love this nonslip bath mat! it’s super soft and cushy, which is a bonus for my feet. my only complaint is that it does take some time to dry after washing. overall, it feels safe and looks good in my bathroom!

just installed the shower grab bars, and they look fantastic! they feel solid, which is a relief since my mom is going to be using them. installation was straightforward, but the color didn’t match what was shown in the listing. still, they do the job well!

this bath mat looked perfect online, but in person, it was a bit disappointing. the grip isn’t as strong as I hoped, and with kids running around, I worry about slips. it's nice and soft, but I might return it for something else.

the toilet lock was an absolute necessity with my adventurous toddler around. it was easy to install, but I did notice after a few months that it started to lose its grip. I’d recommend it for short term use but keep an eye on its durability.

honestly, I thought this nonslip mat was just all hype, but I’ve been pleasantly surprised! no slips at all! my only issue is that it stained a little after a few uses. I’m still going to keep it because it does its job well!

the shower grab bars are a game changer for my parents! they finally feel safe using the shower again. they installed them without any hassle, but the only drawback was that they couldn’t find the right drill bit for the screws included.

really wanted to love this bath mat, but it just doesn’t have enough grip. I’ve almost slipped a couple of times. it’s comfy and looks cute, but safety is my priority. might have to look for another one.

the toilet lock is definitely a good idea, but it could be made better. I appreciated the ease of installation but found it didn’t hold up well against my toddler's curiosity. it broke after only a couple of months. I might try a different brand.

this nonslip mat seriously has saved me from slipping in the shower! I’ve had it for about a month, and I’m impressed. however, it does retain some dirt and needs regular cleaning. overall, it's still worth it for the peace of mind.

love the shower grab bars! they provide the support my grandma needed. they were easy to install and are quite sturdy. however, I found that the finish is showing some wear after just a few months, but they’re still functional.

the bath mat looked nice when I first got it, but it hasn’t held up as well as I hoped. it’s super soft, but it slides a little in the tub. I’ll probably be on the lookout for one with better traction in a few weeks.
the toilet lock is okay, but I expected more. it was easy to install, which is a plus, but my 2-year-old managed to figure it out pretty quickly. not quite the childproofing I was hoping for.

just got this nonslip mat for my tub, and I’m loving it! it’s got great grip and really stays in place even in the water. only downside is it’s a bit of a pain to clean due to its texture, but I’ll take that trade-off for safety!

the shower grab bars are solid and provide great support. they were a bit tricky to install as we had to drill into tiles, but once in, they feel very secure. my only complaint is they’re a little too shiny and stand out more than I’d like.

I was a bit let down by this bath mat; it looked great in the pictures, but it wasn’t very effective in preventing slips. it's soft and comfy, but when wet, it absolutely loses all grip. I’m searching for something safer now.

these organic cotton cloth diapers are decent but they didn't hold up as well as I thought they would. I got them for my 6-month-old, and while they are soft and nice to the touch, they tend to leak overnight. I wish they had better absorbency!

I’ve been using these prefold diapers for my 2-year-old, and while I love the feel of the bamboo inserts, they don't fit his chunky legs well. They slip and slide a bit, which leads to some messes. They wash easily though!

the diaper covers are pretty cute, I got a pack of three in different patterns. they fit well over my 8-month-old’s cloth diapers, but I do wish there was a little more stretch in the leg openings. they do their job most of the time!

love these diapers! they are made of organic cotton, which makes me feel so much better about my baby's skin. my only issue is that they take a long time to dry after washing, especially if you're using the bamboo inserts.

my experience with these prefold diapers has been a mixed bag. they are incredibly soft and I appreciate the organic materials, but they can be bulky under clothes. I ended up using them mostly during naps and bedtime.

I switched to bamboo inserts after hearing so many great things, and I must say, they are super absorbent! however, they do take longer to dry than my regular microfiber ones, which is a bit of a hassle.

the quality of these diaper covers is fantastic! they have held up really well through multiple washes. my only complaint is that the velcro could be a bit stronger, it sometimes comes loose when my toddler is playing. overall, very happy with my purchase!

these organic cotton cloth diapers are quite nice, but the size wasn’t as advertised. I got them for my baby, who is 4 months old, and they still seem a bit large for him. I hope he'll grow into them soon!
having used these for about a month, I can say they're pretty good! the absorbency is impressive, especially with the bamboo inserts. however, they stain quite easily, even with a good wash routine.

I find these prefold diapers to be a bit too thick for my liking. while they are very absorbent, they add quite a bit of bulk under clothes. my 1-year-old looks like he’s waddle walking when wearing them!

I’m really happy with the feel of these organic cotton diapers. they’re soft and gentle against my baby’s skin. however, I did notice they can get a bit smelly if not rinsed immediately after a change.

these are the first cloth diapers I've tried for my newborn and they worked well for us! I love the adjustable snaps. It’s super easy to find the right fit. the only downside is they seem to take forever to dry. patience is key!

really wanted to love these bamboo inserts, but they don’t seem to fit well in my existing covers. they keep sliding around, which leads to leaks. maybe they just need a specific cover? I’m still figuring it out!
these prefold diapers are nice and soft, but they require a good amount of folding and tucking to fit well. once I figured it out, they worked well for my 3-month-old, but it was a learning curve.
these diaper covers are fabulous! I love the designs and they fit great. however, the snaps are a bit difficult to work with one-handed, which is tricky when I’m dealing with a squirmy baby!
used these for about 2 weeks, and I can say the absorbency is impressive! the bamboo inserts are super soft, my only downside is they take a long time to dry. need to plan ahead for laundry!

my experience with these organic cotton cloth diapers has been pretty positive! they feel good against my baby’s skin and hold up well after frequent washing. just wish they were a bit more affordable!

I was a bit skeptical about prefold diapers, but I found these to be surprisingly effective! they absorb well, but are a little tricky to fold. I’ve had a few leaks if I’m not careful, so it’s about technique!

I bought these for my 18-month-old and I’m really satisfied! they fit snugly and the material feels natural. however, I did expect an easier time with leaks at night, so I still use a disposable for overnight.

finally switched to bamboo inserts, and I see why everyone raves about them! they are super absorbent and soft. however, they do take longer to dry than I anticipated, so I’m adjusting my laundry schedule accordingly.

these cloth diaper covers are pretty good. They keep everything contained, but the leg openings could be a bit tighter. I’ve noticed a few leaks during the day, but they are cute and do the trick most of the time!
I love the sustainability of these organic diapers! however, they do require some extra care in washing, which is a bit of a pain. it’s worth it for my baby’s comfort, but just a heads-up!

these prefold diapers are pretty absorbent, but I wish there was a little more size range. I used them on my baby since birth, but now at 10 months, they seem a bit small for him! still usable, just tight!
the bamboo inserts are a game-changer for us! they really do hold more during the night, but they take forever to dry in the dryer. I might consider getting more so I can have a backup set!
I want to love these Organic cotton diapers but they’re just too big for my little one who is 5 months old. they are super soft and the quality is great, but they just don’t fit until he’s bigger!

just received my led monitor last week and so far it’s been great! love how crisp the ips display is. my 2-year-old loves watching cartoons on it, and it’s nice to know she’s safe with the low blue light feature. only downside is the refresh rate isn’t as high as some gaming monitors, but for movies and kids shows, it’s perfect.

this monitor was a mixed bag for me. the resolution is stunning; it really brings out the colors in my artwork. however, the refresh rate could be better for fast-paced games. also, setting it up took longer than expected, which was a little frustrating.

the baby monitor makes nighttime checks super easy with its night vision. keeps me calm knowing i can see my baby at all times! the range is decent too, but wish the battery lasted longer. after a few hours, it starts to lose power, which is a bummer.

i was skeptical about getting an led monitor for my 1-year-old, but it has been a lifesaver! the ultra-clear display really catches her attention. my only issue is that it gets hot after a few hours of use. i have to keep an eye on it when she’s playing.

the ips screen on this monitor is fantastic! colors pop, and it’s really easy to adjust the angle. however, the audio could be a little clearer. sometimes i have to lean in close to hear the sounds from the baby’s crib.

overall, i like this monitor. the setup was straightforward, and the screen resolution is sharp. however, the refresh rate is a bit slower than i’d hoped. it's fine for checking on the baby, just not great for anything fast-paced. if you’re looking for safety, it’s solid though.

i’ve been using this monitor for about 2 months now, and it’s been a good experience! the led screen is easy on the eyes, and the image is clear. the only downside is it sometimes freezes momentarily, which is a little annoying when you’re watching your baby.

this baby monitor has been a lifesaver for my wife and me! the picture quality is excellent, and i feel comfortable knowing we can see our little one clearly at all times. it does lose connection sometimes when moving around the house, which isn’t ideal.

just got this monitor a week ago and it’s been fantastic! the refresh rate makes checking my baby a breeze, and the ips display is super clear. one downside is it doesn’t come with a wall mount option, so we'll have to figure something else out.

the monitor works really well for our needs! love the clarity of the display. however, the battery life could be better; I’d like it to last through the night without needing a charge. overall, I’m satisfied, but a longer battery life would be awesome.

i bought this for our nursery, and it’s been doing a great job so far! the resolution is sharp, and the colors are vibrant; my little one is captivated by it! the only thing is that i find the speaker a bit quiet, so sometimes I miss her cries if I'm in another room.

got this monitor for my new baby and I’m impressed with the clarity! the led screen is bright, and I can check on her easily at night. just wish it had a better mounting option; it’s a bit awkward sitting on the dresser as is.

we have been using this monitor for about a month, and it’s held up nicely. the refresh rate could be a bit better for smoother video, especially during playtime, but the resolution makes up for it. it really helps us keep an eye on the little one!

the monitor has a great display with vibrant colors, but I found the range to be lacking. sometimes it cuts out when I go to the kitchen, which is frustrating when I’m trying to keep an eye on my 18-month-old and also make lunch.

this ips monitor has an amazing resolution, but I do wish the sound quality was better. sometimes I can’t hear my baby over the fan noise in the room, which makes it a bit stressful. I do love the display clarity, though. great for watching movies!

we’ve been enjoying this monitor for about 4 months. it does the job and has a nice picture, but I find the battery doesn’t last as long on the portable unit as I’d like. it’s fine for short trips around the house, just not for extended use.

the video quality is solid. my favorite feature is the night vision, which is perfect for late-night checks. however, the mounting options are limited, and I’ve had to get creative trying to find a good spot that doesn’t obstruct the view.

this monitor has really helped me keep tabs on my little guy while I do laundry and cook dinner. the led display is clear, and I really appreciate the safety features. however, it’s a little bulky, so setting it up in a small space can be tricky.

I really wanted to love this monitor, and while it works well enough, I found the refresh rate to be a bit slow for my liking. the resolution is great though, which makes it easy to see the details of my baby’s expressions! just wish for smoother video.

i was impressed by the quality at this price point! the colors are vibrant, and it's super easy to set up. just wish there was a way to adjust the brightness manually; sometimes it feels a tad too bright for nighttime use.

the monitor is pretty good, but I expected more given all the hype. the picture is clear, but sometimes it lags when I’m moving around. it’s definitely helped ease my mind when it comes to checking on the baby, just wish it performed a bit better overall.

this baby monitor has been a joy to use! the sound clarity is excellent, and I love the led display. however, it does take a bit to boot up when you first turn it on, which is a little annoying when you just need to check on the baby quickly.

we’ve had this monitor for a few weeks, and it’s been pretty reliable. the resolution is clear, and the battery life is decent. the only issue I’ve run into is that the camera angle is limited, so I had to adjust it a few times to get it right.

great monitor overall! the refresh rate is solid, and it does a good job at night. however, I’ve noticed some interference when the microwave is on, which can be a bit disconcerting when I’m trying to listen for the baby.

I was excited to get this monitor because of the high resolution! it’s been great for keeping an eye on my little one. however, it loses connection sometimes when I go to different floors, which can be a bit annoying. just be mindful of where you’re placing it!

just got these refills for our diaper pail last week and wow, I'm impressed! the odor control is excellent—even my husband notices. we live in a small apartment, so that’s huge for us. but I wish the bags were a little thicker; a few times, they’ve ripped while I was trying to tie them up. overall, a solid purchase.

these refills are decent! I've got a 2-year-old and it traps the smell nicely. However, they can be a pain to get fully inserted into the pail. the process is a little fiddly, and I sometimes end up using more than I need trying to set everything up. overall, not bad but could use a few tweaks.

the refills work well for keeping odor at bay. we have a 1-year-old, and I’m not constantly gagging when I change his diapers anymore. but I noticed that they can be a little flimsy—one ripped when I was tying it up last week. so just be careful! overall, I’d say I’m satisfied.

I have two toddlers (ages 3 and 2), and the smell control is impressive. even with dirty diapers, the odor doesn't escape into the nursery! just wish they were a little thicker; I had one bag tear while I was pulling it out. still, better than I expected.

got this adorable plush owl backpack for my daughter but it started to lose shape pretty quick. she loves carrying it around, but I feel like it could use a little more sturdiness. cute design though!
the dinosaur plush purse is super cute, and my son loves showing it off! however, the material feels a bit cheap, and I’m worried it won’t last long. cute, but I expected better for $30.

this plush rabbit backpack is a favorite in our house! soft, cute, and functional for my preschooler. however, the stitching is starting to come loose after a month, which is disappointing. still a great companion!
found a super cute bear plush purse! my daughter loves it, but I wish it had a bit more storage space. might work better for lighter outings. for $28, it’s a fine little accessory.
the sloth plush backpack is adorable, and my 4-year-old carries it everywhere! it fits her little toys nicely, but the zipper can be tricky sometimes. overall, a good purchase at $30!
my daughter is obsessed with her plush fox purse! it’s trendy and fun, but I noticed the strap could use some reinforcement. she loves it, and for $25, it’s a solid buy for her collection!
the plush giraffe backpack was love at first sight! however, I was bummed when the embroidery started to fade after only a month of use. it’s cute, but quality could be better for the price.

this statue of a dragon is just stunning! i have it on my shelf and it gets compliments all the time. the detail is incredible, especially the scales. my only issue is that it's a bit heavy, so i had to find a really stable spot for it. but overall, it really adds a unique touch to my home decor!

found this cool superhero sculpture at a local shop and decided to get it for my son. he loves it! it’s about a foot tall and the paint job is really nice. however, it’s not super sturdy, so i have to remind him to be careful when playing around it. still, a fun addition to his collection!

bought this angel statue for my garden and while it looks beautiful, it did chip after a few months in the sun. i love the idea of it, but just wish it could withstand the elements a little better. on the plus side, it definitely gets noticed!

got this vintage-style robot sculpture for my office desk. it’s quirky and brings a smile to my face every time i see it. but the finish isn’t as polished as i thought it would be. still, it’s a conversation starter for sure!

this limited edition action figure is a real gem for collectors! the detailing is amazing, and it's a great size. however, my only complaint is that the packaging was a bit damaged when it arrived, which was disappointing. still, happy to add it to my collection!

picked up this elegant owl statue to go on my bookshelf. the craftsmanship is beautiful, and the colors pop! however, it’s not as heavy as I expected, so I had to anchor it down to prevent it from tipping over. it looks great though!

just received my gargoyle sculpture and I absolutely love it! it’s got such character and the detail is unbelievable. only downside is that it took a while to arrive, but I’d say it was worth it in the end.

this lion statue is striking and commands attention wherever I put it! but be warned, it’s a bit fragile. I had to glue a paw back on after my cat knocked it over. beautiful piece though – just need to keep it out of the way of the pets!

my husband is a huge comic book fan, so I got him this action figure sculpture as a gift. it's perfect for his desk! however, the paint job had a small flaw. I’m thinking of contacting customer service to see if they can help. still, he loves it!

absolutely love this mermaid sculpture! it's beautifully made and adds a whimsical touch to my bathroom decor. one downside is that it was a bit pricier than I expected at around $50, but I think it was worth it for the quality.

got this cool skeleton figure for Halloween decor. it’s super detailed and really brings the spooky vibes! however, it’s not the sturdiest thing and I worry it might break if someone bumps it hard. overall, a fun piece!

was given this vintage marvel statue as a gift, and wow, it's a very nice addition to my collection! super detailed and the paint is vibrant. but the base is a bit wobbly, which is kind of a bummer. love it still!

just received my dragon figurine yesterday, and wow, talk about detail! it seriously looks like it came out of a fantasy movie. but the shipping was a bit slow. it took almost two weeks to arrive, which was frustrating. worth the wait though, for sure!

I picked up this abstract sculpture for my living room and it’s definitely an eye-catcher! it’s very modern and unique. the downside? it was pricey, around $70, and I wish it had some weight to it – it feels a bit flimsy.

my kids adore this superhero action figure! it’s definitely more of a display piece than a toy since the details are so intricate. but the colors are vibrant and it looks amazing on their shelf. just wish it could withstand more rough play.

this ceramic cat statue is so cute and fits perfectly on my windowsill! it’s lightweight and beautifully painted, but be careful with it – I accidentally knocked it over and it chipped a bit. still, it’s a lovely addition to my decor!

I bought this unicorn figure for my daughter’s room, and she loves it! it’s colorful and the mane has a nice shimmer. I just wish it were a little bigger – it’s kind of small for the price I paid. but she doesn’t seem to mind!

got this Viking statue for my husband who loves history. it's a very detailed piece and looks awesome on his mantle. however, it did come with a tiny scratch on it. I decided to keep it since it blends into the design, but I was a bit disappointed.

this ancient warrior action figure is so detailed! I love displaying it in my office. the only downside is the price – I paid around $40 and I feel like shipping could have been faster. overall, though, it’s a solid piece!

the detail on this fox sculpture is amazing! it has such a lifelike quality. but there was a small scratch on the surface when it arrived, which wasn’t great. still, I love having it on my coffee table – it really sparks conversation!

my friend gifted me this beautiful butterfly sculpture and it's just lovely! the colors are vibrant and it really brightens up my room. only wish it came with a stand because it can be tricky to position just right.

picked up a ceramic dragon for my collection, and it's definitely unique! the colors are fantastic. but it’s a bit fragile, and I have to be careful around it. I’m already eyeing another one to add to my shelf!

this vintage-inspired action figure is such a treasure! I found it at a flea market and couldn't resist. while the detail is great, I noticed the joints are a bit loose. still, it’s a perfect addition for my display case!
this statue of a couple enjoying a dance is just beautiful! I love the sentiment it brings to my living room. but the finish isn’t as glossy as I was hoping for. it stands out nonetheless, though!

really glad I got this cool samurai figure. the craftsmanship is outstanding! my only complaint is the base is a little flimsy. I don’t want it tipping over, so I have to be careful about where I place it. all in all, it’s a great piece.

bought this elegant bird sculpture for my office and I adore it! the lines are so sleek and modern. however, it was a bit smaller than I expected, but still fits perfectly on my desk. I get compliments on it daily!

just got this superhero statue and it blew me away with the detail! the colors really pop on my shelf. the only downside is that it took a week longer than expected to arrive. still, I'm super happy with it!

this hiking backpack carrier is a lifesaver for my 18-month-old! it has a great sunshade and the pockets fit all my essentials. but, lugging it can get a bit heavy after a few miles, especially uphill. still, i love that my little one can enjoy the view.

we've used this outdoor baby carrier for our 2-year-old on multiple hikes. he seems super comfy and safe! however, i wish the hip belt was more padded. overall, a solid choice for short to medium hikes.

this infant backpack carrier was a great buy for our family trips. it’s pretty easy to set up, and the adjustable straps are a plus. but, it’s not the most compact when folded, and storage can be tricky in the car.
love how easy this toddler backpack carrier is to adjust! my 3-year-old loves being able to see what's going on, but it does feel a bit bulky on tighter trails. still, we have lots of fun with it!
just received the hiking backpack carrier and it looks well-made! comfy for my little one, but it took me a while to get the straps adjusted perfectly. hope it holds up on our next big hike!
I was excited for this outdoor baby carrier, but honestly, it’s kind of hard to get on by myself! once it's on, my baby seems happy, but I wish there were more pockets for my stuff.
the toddler backpack carrier works great for our 4-year-old. we went on a 3-mile hike, and my kiddo didn’t complain once. however, the weather cover could be better. a bit too flimsy for rain.
the infant backpack carrier feels sturdy, but it takes a bit to figure out how to adjust the buckles. my 1-year-old seems to love riding in it, though! just wish it had more storage options.
just finished a hike with this toddler backpack carrier. super easy to use! but, after an hour, my back started to ache a little. exhausting but fun!
i love our hiking backpack carrier! it fits my 2-year-old perfectly and is super comfy for both of us. only downside is it’s a bit heavy when fully loaded. overall, worth it for the adventure!
this outdoor baby carrier is fantastic overall! my baby sleeps like a champ in it, but the clips can be a little tricky to fasten sometimes. still, we have taken it on several trips already!
we decided to try this infant backpack carrier for our little one. got some great features, but it can be a hassle to get on alone. still manageable for the most part!
this toddler backpack carrier has been a game changer for family hikes. my son loves it, but I wish it had better lumbar support. great otherwise!
just got this hiking backpack carrier and used it for a short trip. I’ll say it’s comfy enough, but the buckles felt kind of cheap. my kid liked being up high, though!
I was really impressed with the comfort level of this outdoor baby carrier! my 11-month-old enjoyed every minute. just wish it had a rain cover that was more effective!
this infant backpack carrier is so cool! lots of pockets and easy to adjust. however, it may be too heavy for longer hikes, so keep that in mind. my baby seems comfy, though!
love this toddler backpack carrier! it fits my little guy great, and the sunshade is a must-have. but the weight distribution isn’t the best for long hikes, which is a bummer.

used this hiking backpack carrier for an adventure with our 2-year-old. such a fun experience! it does tend to get a bit wobbly at times, especially on rough terrain. heaven for the little one, though!
the outdoor baby carrier is decent, but I found the straps a bit uncomfortable after a while. my baby enjoyed it, but I might keep looking for something that suits us better in the long run.
this infant backpack carrier is sturdy and well-designed. my 15-month-old loves it! just a little tricky to get adjusted at first. a learning curve, but worth it for the hiking!
I think this toddler backpack carrier is pretty good for short hikes! my 3-year-old loves being up high, but it does feel a bit bulky. just keep your outings short, and you’re golden!
got this hiking backpack carrier for family outings. the adjustable harness is cool! but I wish it had a little more padding on the shoulder straps. my back was sore after a few hours.
this outdoor baby carrier is solid! we’ve taken it on a few trips, and my 10-month-old loves it. however, I wish there was better shade for sunny days. still a great option!
this infant backpack carrier holds my 1-year-old perfectly. love how sturdy it is! but the weight can be a bit cumbersome after a long hike. overall, a solid purchase!
just got my toddler backpack carrier and took it out for a spin. it works well on the trail, but my daughter got grumpy after an hour. needs better comfort for longer hikes.
we've had mixed luck with this hiking backpack carrier. sometimes it’s great for our 18-month-old, but other times she just wants to get down and walk. practical but not perfect!
this outdoor baby carrier is wonderful! my little one feels secure and has plenty of space. the only downside is it takes a while to pack up. a bit bulky in the car after a trip.
the toddler backpack carrier looked great in the store, but I found it a bit hard to adjust while on the go. it’s comfy when set up, but I wish they made it easier to get on and off!

this remote control car is a blast for my 5-year-old! he loves zooming it around the house. the battery life is decent – about 30 minutes of playtime before needing a recharge. only downside is that the tires wear out pretty quickly on rough surfaces. overall, a fun buy!

got this toy helicopter for my 7-year-old for his birthday. it flies well and has great maneuverability, but we did have some trouble with the controls at first. took a few sessions to master it. the light-up feature is cool, though! just wish it had longer battery life. lasts about 15 mins.

we purchased this toy truck for my daughter and she adores it! the colors are vibrant and it handles well on grass and pavement. however, it does have a tendency to get stuck in the mud. it's pretty sturdy, but the remote range could be better. only works about 50 feet.

this airplane toy is a hit with my son! we love that it has an easy-to-use remote and can perform flips mid-air. the downside is the assembly – it took us an hour to put together. also, it doesn’t hold its charge as long as I expected, around 10 minutes max. still, he has tons of fun!

picked up this truck for my son, and while he enjoys it, I find the plastic feels a bit cheap. it drives well on flat surfaces, but we've had some issues with it getting stuck on uneven terrain. the lights are a nice touch, though. just not the best quality overall.

this is probably the best remote control car we've had! it’s fast and durable. my 6-year-old has crashed it into walls multiple times, and it's held up great. the remote is responsive, but the battery life is a bummer – only about 20 minutes. still, for the price, it’s been a fun ride!

got this helicopter for my twin boys, and they loved it at first! it flies well, but it’s quite sensitive to wind, which makes it tricky outside. also, the battery doesn’t last as long as I'd hoped. maybe 12 minutes at best. as an indoor toy, it’s perfect, though!

my 4-year-old loves playing with this truck! it’s very user-friendly and the lights are super fun. note that it struggles a bit on grass, though. we had to build a ramp to get it to go up! overall, a solid toy, just wish it could handle tougher surfaces without getting stuck.

the remote for this airplane is pretty easy to use, even for younger kids. my daughter loves that it can do loops! but, we had to charge it quite a bit – the battery life is short. around 15 minutes of fun before needing a recharge! still, she giggles the whole time.

this car was a bit of a letdown. it has some cool features like cool lights and sounds, but it just doesn’t go very fast. my son lost interest pretty quickly. the range is decent, but I expected more action for the price. hopefully, we can find something better.

solid remote control truck! my son loves using it in the backyard, especially with the rugged tires. it grips well on grass. the only downside is that we’ve had a few issues with the battery getting stuck – it won't navigate over bigger obstacles. it works like a charm otherwise!

this toy helicopter is a total winner! my kids love it, and it has a cool light-up feature when it flies at night. the only issue I’ve noticed is the battery takes a long time to charge but runs out quickly, about 10 mins. could be better, but they’re still entertained!

got this remote-controlled airplane for my son who is obsessed with flight. the setup was a bit confusing initially, but it flies great once you get the hang of it! just wish the battery lasted longer, only about 10-15 minutes. still, it’s a fun project for us to do together.

my daughter is in love with this little truck! it’s super easy for her to control, and she plays with it every day. however, I’m a bit worried about the durability. after just a few weeks, the paint started to chip. overall, she enjoys it, just wish it was more robust.

this toy car has been great for our family game nights! it drives well and runs smoothly. I love that it comes with two controllers, so my kids can race each other. however, the charging dock is a bit flimsy. still, fun and entertaining for the price!

we got this toy airplane as a gift, and while my son loves flying it indoors, it’s not very stable outside. windy days are a no-go! it charges quickly, but only lasts about 15 minutes, which is a bit disappointing. he has fun, but I wish it was a bit more versatile.

my son really likes this remote control truck, especially with how high it jumps off ramps! the only problem is that it’s hard to steer precisely. it sometimes goes off course, which can be frustrating. still, a good choice for little outdoorsy kids!

overall, I’m impressed with this toy helicopter. it has great flight time and is fairly easy to control. however, the remote took a little time to figure out, especially for my younger kids. it could be more user-friendly, but once they got it, they loved it!

this car was a party favorite! everyone was racing them around the living room. it handles really well on smooth surfaces. just a heads up, the battery doesn’t last more than 20 minutes. could be improved, but for the price, it’s been a good entertainer for us.

i got this toy truck for my little one and it’s been a huge hit! the bright colors catch his eye every time. but, we’ve had some trouble with the battery – sometimes it doesn’t seem to charge properly. but when it works, it’s a lot of fun!

my 3-year-old loves his new airplane! it’s easy for him to take off and land, but we did run into some issues with the batteries dying quickly. we barely get 10 minutes of flying time. it’s a good toy, but I wish the battery life was better.

my kids are obsessed with this big rig! it’s fun to play with and the lights are super cool. however, it’s a bit heavy for my younger one to control effectively, and it can struggle on uneven ground. still, they enjoy it and that’s what counts!

this remote control helicopter is a blast for my kids! it has some cool features like lights and sounds. my only complaint is that it’s hard to control; it often flies away from them. they have a great time chasing it, though, so overall it’s a fun toy.

love this car! it’s quick and handles well on carpet. my son has been racing it non-stop. the only downside is that it eats batteries pretty fast. we’re talking about 20 minutes max playtime. still, he has a blast, which makes it worth it for us!

the remote control truck we got for our son's birthday is really cool! it can handle rough surfaces without any issues. however, the controls are a bit sensitive, and he often ends up crashing it. but he loves the challenge, so all is good!

we bought this toy airplane for my nephew, and he had so much fun with it during his birthday party! it goes pretty far, but we wish it would stay in the air longer; about 15 minutes is what we got. the kids had a blast, though – so worth it!

this remote control truck has been a family favorite! it's sturdy and can handle a good amount of play time. however, the remote could be more intuitive; it took my daughter a bit to get used to it. overall, still a great deal!

This infant bath seat has been a lifesaver! My 6-month-old loves it and it keeps him secure while I wash him. The suction cups are strong, but I did have a little trouble with it slipping a few times. Just make sure to attach it well. Overall, pretty good for around $25!

We got this toddler bath chair for our 2-year-old, and it works fine. He loves splashing around in the tub now. The only downside is the slightly awkward fit; it doesn't quite sit flush with our tub's curve. Still, he seems comfortable enough, and the price was decent at about $30.

Honestly, I was a bit skeptical about the whole bathing tub rings thing at first. But this one is surprisingly sturdy! My baby seems to enjoy bath time more. Just be cautious, though; I don't leave him unattended because the support isn’t perfect. Great for the price, which was $20.

This bathtub support seat is okay, I guess. It holds my 8-month-old well, but he wriggles a lot! The fabric is nice and soft, but I wish it dried faster after bathing. For $35, I expected a bit better in terms of drying time. Still, it does the job well enough.

Super cute design on this bath seat! My daughter loves the colors, and it does keep her safe. I will say, though, that it slid a bit when wet. I had to adjust it a few times, which was a little annoying. So, just keep an eye on it. Cost around $28.

I like this infant bath seat, but it took my baby a little while to get used to it. Once she did, bath time became much easier. The seat is a good height, and it fits well in the tub. Just wish it had a bit more cushion, but for $22, I'm happy.

This toddler bath chair is alright. My 18-month-old sits in it, but I feel it could use some more safety features. The suction cups work okay, but they don’t always hold strong. It's a bit stressful when he leans, but it’s affordable at about $25.

I've been using this bathing tub ring for a month now, and it's been mostly good. My little guy loves splashing, but it could be more stable. I’ve found myself having to reposition it often. Still, for $30, I can't complain too much about it.

This bathtub support seat is very practical! My 10-month-old feels secure in it, and I love the adjustable straps. The only issue is the cleaning; it can get a bit grimy in the nooks. I didn't expect that for the price, which was $27.

Honestly, this is not the best bath chair out there. My 2-year-old likes it, but the plastic isn't the sturdiest. I worry about it tipping sometimes. It was about $20, so I guess you get what you pay for. It works for now, but I might look for something better later.

We've had this infant bath seat for about two weeks, and it's been great! My 4-month-old seems to enjoy bath time now. It’s easy to set up and clean, but I wish it had more padding for comfort. Overall, pretty good for $30.

This support seat didn’t work as well as I hoped. I have a 9-month-old who is quite lively, and it slips a bit too easily. The design is nice, but I wish it had better grip. It cost around $25, so it’s not a huge loss, but still disappointing.

What a cute bath chair! My toddler loves sitting in it while I wash him. It fits well and is easy to clean. My only problem is the suction doesn't hold great if the tub is wet. Make sure to dry the area before placing it. Paid about $30.

I was on the fence about this bathing tub ring, but it’s surprisingly sturdy! My baby enjoys sitting in it, but I always stay close. A little snug for my larger 11-month-old, though. For $25, it’s worth trying out if you need something simple.

This bathtub support seat is useful, but my little one still tries to stand up in it, which makes me nervous! It holds him well, but I'd feel safer with more anti-slip features. I picked it up for $28, so it gets the job done for now.

So far, this toddler bath chair has been a hit! My 2-and-a-half-year-old really enjoys his bath time now. The only downside is that the straps are a bit tricky to adjust. I paid around $32, which isn't bad considering he’s happy.

This infant bath seat has made bath time so much easier! My 5-month-old fits snugly, and it came with some fun bath toys. The only downside is the cleaning; it can be a bit of a hassle. Still, at $30, it’s a great investment.

Overall, this bathing tub ring was a mixed bag for us. It fits well in our tub, but my baby wasn't too keen on it at first. Now that he's used to it, it works okay, but I wish it were more padded. Cost about $26.

I bought this toddler bath chair last month, and it's been pretty decent. My little one is 1 year old, and she enjoys splashing. However, I feel it could use some more grip on the bottom. It was priced at $29, which is reasonable.

This infant bath seat has a cute design, which my baby loves! It's nice that it's easy to store, but the suction cups could be better – it's slipped a few times. I paid around $24 for it, so not too disappointed, just have to be careful.

We've been using this bathtub support seat for a month, and it’s been great! My 8-month-old feels secure, but I do wish it had better padding. The cleaning part is easy, which I appreciate. Overall, not a bad purchase for $30.
Really love this toddler bath chair! My son loves sitting in it and playing with his toys. The only downside is that it’s a bit bulky for our smaller tub. Still, it does the job well enough at $28.

Okay, this bathing tub ring is flexible and fits our needs, but I find myself adjusting it often. My 7-month-old is pretty squirmy! It's okay for the price ($25), but I may look for something more secure.

This infant bath seat is a decent option, but I wish it had more features. The height is good; my 6-month-old seems to enjoy it. Just be careful when you set it up. Cost me about $22, so it's alright.

I've tried a few toddler bath chairs, and this one is the best so far! My son loves it, and it keeps him safe. Just be aware that it might not fit all tubs well. Paid around $32 for it, and I think it’s worth it.
This bathtub support seat is a decent value, but I wish it was a bit wider. My baby is 10 months and kind of cramped sometimes. It's good enough for our needs, especially at $27.

just got the origami kit last week, and my 8-year-old is obsessed! it's got 100 sheets in different colors, which is awesome. we made a crane and a frog. only downside is the instructions can be a bit tricky for beginners, had to help him a lot. overall, a fun way to keep him busy!

i tried the candle making kit mainly because i wanted to make gifts for friends. it was kind of fun! it came with a bunch of scents, but i wish there were more colors for the wax. made about 5 candles, but they didn’t burn that evenly. good starter kit though!

the sewing kit has everything my 6-year-old needs to start learning. the fabric patterns are cute, but the needle is a bit too sharp for little hands! we ended up just using plastic needles. my kid loves making little stuffed animals, but adult supervision is definitely needed.

bought the jewelry making kit for my daughter’s birthday. she loves it! the beads are so colorful and there are lots of options for designs. it's been a hit for playdates too. that said, some strands break easily, so we had to buy extra strings.

this origami kit has some really cool designs, but man, the instructions are hard to follow if you're not familiar with folding. i spent a lot of time figuring it out, but i did make a pretty swan in the end! really nice quality paper though.

i was excited about the candle making kit, but it was a bit of a letdown. the scents didn't really last long, and the candles took forever to harden. still, we made a bunch for a school project, and the kids loved it. just needs some tweaking.

my son is super into origami, and this kit has kept him entertained for hours! it includes really detailed diagrams. however, not all paper is created equal, and some tore pretty easily. overall worth it for the variety.

the jewelry making kit was a great find at about $25. my daughter had a blast making bracelets and necklaces. just wish it came with more clasps, we ran out way too soon. but she’s getting creative with her designs!

this sewing kit was a great way to introduce my 10-year-old to this hobby. she’s made a pillow and some small bags, but i did wish it had more fabric choices. the quality of the thread is good though, and it comes with a fun little storage box.

got the candle making kit for a weekend project with friends, and it was a fun time! each of us made two candles. however, the molds were a bit tricky, and a couple didn't come out right. we still had a great time chatting and crafting!

origami has been a nice calming activity for my daughter, and the kit we bought has tons of sheets. i do feel like some of the more intricate designs are not meant for kids, as they got frustrated. more beginner options would be nice.

our family had a jewelry making night with this kit, and it was a blast! tons of beads and charms, but the instructions could be clearer. we ended up winging it. in the end, everyone made something unique, which was the fun part!

bought the candle kit and had high hopes, but honestly it was just okay. the wax took too long to melt properly and the fragrances weren’t strong enough for my taste. still, we managed to make some decent candles for decor.

this origami kit is a lifesaver for quiet time! my son loves folding the dinosaurs and birds. the only downside is that it can be a bit messy with all the paper scraps. i’m thinking of getting more kits for different themes.

the sewing kit looked great with all its supplies, but my daughter found the needle a bit too challenging. she's pretty young (4 years old), so I had to help a lot. It’s a nice kit but more suited for older kids.

the jewelry making kit was filled with so many cute charms. my niece just loved it! we spent the whole day crafting together, which was a highlight. there weren’t enough jump rings though, so we had to improvise a bit. still, she was thrilled with her creations!

i have mixed feelings about the candle-making kit. the process was fun and intuitive for me, but my teenage daughter found the instructions confusing. we did manage to make some nice candles in the end, but it could use clearer guidance.

just finished the origami kit with my son and while we had a fun time, some of the designs felt a bit too complex for his age (5). loved the paper quality though! we ended up simplifying a lot of the folds together.

the sewing kit is decent for beginners. my 11-year-old started making small projects, and she loves it! the fabric choices are cute but wish there were more patterns included. we bought some extra fabric just to add more options.

the candle making kit was a great bonding experience for me and my daughter. we made a ton of candles, but they didn’t come out looking as professional as I hoped. still, we had a great time experimenting with colors and scents.

this origami kit is good, but you need to have some patience! my kid got frustrated with a few of the designs, and I had to step in to help a lot. we made some beautiful pieces together in the end, but beginner options would have been nice.

the jewelry making kit we got is pretty good, lots of beads and strings. however, the quality of some beads was lacking, they broke easily. my daughter still had a blast creating her designs, but we just had to be careful about which beads to use.

i bought the candle making kit thinking it would be easy, and it was fun but pretty messy! wax everywhere! we made some cute candles but won’t do it again without asking the kids to be a bit more careful. great idea, though.

my son loves his origami kit and has been folding for hours. the book with it has great detailed directions. he's now making gifts for family! wish there were more advanced designs to keep him challenged though.

the sewing kit turned out to be a nice surprise! my daughter and I learned together, but some of the tools felt a little cheap. she made a cute bag but had trouble threading the needle. overall, a good starter kit.

tried the candle making kit and it was a fun family night activity. we made a bunch of candles but I wished the scent options were better. still, seeing everyone’s unique creations was the best part of the night!

this origami kit is a hit at our house! my daughter loves making the animals. it would be perfect if it included more instructional videos or online resources, but we managed just fine with the booklet provided.

this car seat cover is nice and thick, but it didn’t really fit my Chicco seat as well as I hoped. the straps are a little exposed and the fabric bunches up. it does protect against spills, so there's that!

absolutely love these car seat straps! they really help keep the seat clean, and the crash test ratings made me feel safer. my son is 3 and seems comfy. only downside is that they get a bit hot in the summer sun.

got this for my 2-year-old and honestly, it’s pretty okay. the installation was a bit tricky, but once we figured it out, it stays put! wish it had a few more recline positions, though. he usually prefers to nap in the car.

protection is key, and I feel like this extra padding really helps. but it doesn’t quite fit on my Graco seat as well as I'd like. sometimes I see it shift slightly. could be better but still a solid option for the price.
these seat covers are really soft, but I wish they were a little thicker. they look cute, but after a few months the edges started to fray. still, they keep my car looking better than before!
I got the harness pads for my baby's car seat, and they are great! easy to install and my baby seems much more comfy. just wish there were more color options to match the car interior.

struggled a lot with installation because the instructions were unclear. my 4-year-old loves the design, but I feel like I have to check the safety features every time. I just want to make sure he's secure!

these seat protectors are awesome! they fit my SUV perfectly, and I haven’t noticed any wear on my upholstery since I put them in. however, getting them in place took longer than I'd like. good buy overall.
just installed this for my 18-month-old, and it seems solid. the safety features are impressive! it did take some time to get it tight enough. wish it came with a better installation guide.

love the look of these covers, but the installation was a bit of a hassle. it doesn’t hug my car seat as tightly as I'd hope. the padding is comfy though, and my daughter doesn’t complain during long drives.
these car seat accessories keep the mess at bay! I have a toddler who spills everything, so I’m grateful. just wish they were a touch more durable. still, for the price, they do the trick!
I was on the fence about these strap covers. they feel nice and soft but they don’t fit snugly on my car’s straps. my little one doesn’t seem to mind, but I expected more given the brand reputation.

this product fits my car seat well and looks really cute. the safety ratings were a huge plus for me. my only complaint is that it can get slippery, especially if it gets wet from spills. still, solid product.
these seat belts were easy to install and provide a nice soft feel. my kiddo loves them! but I did notice they get pretty hot during the summer months. could use a cooling feature or something.

after trying several options, this one finally fits my car seat! the weight limit is impressive, and my daughter seems safe and secure. it’s a bit heavier than others, which I don’t love, but hey, safety is key.
the car seat protector works pretty well! it has kept the seat clean from spills but was a bit tricky to get in place. I wish it had a better attachment system.
fitted this on my 5-year-old’s booster seat and it’s holding up great! the safety features gave me peace of mind. my only wish is that it came in a few brighter colors to appeal to my kiddo.
been using this for about 6 months now, and it has lived up to the reviews! easy to clean and seems sturdy enough. my only issue is it takes a while to dry after washing.
this car seat accessory has made such a difference. my baby seems happier during rides. just wish the installation wasn’t so complicated! took me an hour to get it right.
I love the additional support this pad provides, but I feel like the fabric could be more breathable. during long trips, my little guy gets a little sweaty. but overall, still happy with my purchase!
these bibs designed for the car seat are adorable and functional! they catch spills really well. however, I noticed they can slip down a bit if they’re not positioned just right.
got these for my 2.5-year-old, and they do the job of keeping him comfortable. but I wasn’t impressed with how they fit on the seat. a bit loose for my liking, which made me a bit nervous.
this seat belt cover is a lifesaver for my son! no more red marks after long drives. just wish it had some more cushion. overall, I’m glad I bought it!
the car seat protector is decent. it keeps my seat from getting super dirty, but the installation took longer than I thought. at least my car feels cleaner now!
this car seat cover really brightened up the interior of my car! the design is cute, but it doesn’t fit my seat perfectly. I had to use some extra clips to keep it secure.
wasn’t sure about these strap covers at first, but they’ve grown on me. they definitely make our car rides more comfortable. just wish they came in more styles to match our car decor!
these car seat accessories are a game changer for long trips! my kids are comfortable, but I need to adjust them every so often as they slip down. still worth it for the comfort!
this was a decent investment for my little one's car seat. love the extra padding, but the instruction manual for installation could’ve been clearer. all in all, a good buy!
I was pleasantly surprised by this car seat cover! it fits well and the material is easy to clean. however, it took longer than expected to install. overall, I’d recommend it!

my son got this play trains railway set for his 5th birthday and he has not stopped playing with it! the train tracks are super easy to put together, and the little locomotives are quite sturdy. however, i did expect a bit more variety in the train cars. still, he loves it and that's what matters!

the train station in this set is adorable! my daughter loves making up stories with the figures. the tracks stay connected well, but the train sometimes derails if it hits a bump too fast. overall, it's a fun toy, just needs a bit better engineering.

i bought this train set for my 4-year-old, and it’s been a hit! the trains are easy for him to control, and the sound effects are cute. it does take a bit of time to set up, but once it's running, it’s great fun. would love if it had more accessories, though.

this playset is pretty solid! the railroad crossings add a nice touch and my kids think they're real. the tracks can get a bit wobbly when they play too roughly, but they’re durable enough for everyday play. definitely a good buy for train lovers.

the remote control feature is a blast! my kids love making the trains go back and forth. but the batteries run out quickly; we’ve gone through 4 packs in just two weeks. might be worth investing in rechargeables. still, they have hours of fun!

got this set expecting a full train experience, but it was a bit underwhelming. the locomotive doesn’t have great battery life, and I wish the tracks were a bit longer. it’s nice for short play sessions, but we need more pieces to really enjoy it.

this train set has been great for my 3-year-old! the tracks are very easy for her to handle, and the colors are bright and cheerful. however, I noticed the trains get stuck on some of the curves. still, she has a blast pretending she's the conductor!

my nephew is obsessed with trains, so we got him this set for his birthday. he immediately started creating all sorts of tracks. it does seem a bit flimsy at times, but for the price, it’s decent. just be careful during setup, or pieces might snap.

I've seen a lot of train sets, but this one stands out with its cute little station and crossing gates! my son was able to put it together with minimal help. just wish the remote was a bit more responsive. overall, a fun addition to his toy collection!

the detail on the trains is impressive! my kids take turns being the 'engineer,' which is super cute. but I must say, the assembly of the tracks can be frustrating. some pieces don’t fit perfectly together, which can derail a good playtime mood.

the remote control aspect is a fun feature, but the range isn't great. I can only control it from a few feet away. my 6-year-old likes the idea of it, but we often find ourselves running after the train. it can be a hassle but still a fun toy overall!

this playset has been a great addition, but I wish the train cars were a bit more versatile. my 5-year-old loves the tracks and how they connect, but she gets bored of the same two cars after a while. the play station is a hit, though!

I got this train set for my toddler, and it's honestly one of the best purchases! the tracks are super durable, and the sounds are engaging. just wish there were more characters to play with, as he often asks where the others went! still, a solid product.

this railway set has provided endless hours of entertainment for my little ones. the design is colorful, and the trains move smoothly. however, the battery life is a bit short, which is a bummer during playtime. overall, they love it, and that’s what counts!

my son is 4 and just loves this train set! the pieces are easy to put together, and I appreciate the safety features. however, I did expect the train to go a little faster. still, he enjoys making tracks and driving the train all around the living room!

this is a good train set for beginners. my 3-year-old figured it out in no time! however, some of the track connections are a little finicky and can come apart easily. overall, it keeps him entertained, so I can’t complain too much.

the setup was a bit confusing at first, but once we got the hang of it, the joy on my kids' faces made it worth it! the train sounds are a nice touch, but the remote can be a bit unresponsive. still, they love it when it works!

I really like the train station that comes with this set! it adds a lot of fun to playtime. but the track pieces could fit together better; we had to spend some time adjusting them. nonetheless, my kids still have a great time playing with it.

my daughter is obsessed with trains, and this set has been a great buy! the tracks are colorful and easy to assemble, but sometimes the trains derail. she loves playing station master, though! just wish it had more accessories.

picked this up for my twins who are 5, and they love it! the trains are quite charming. only downside is that the remote control is a bit tricky for them to navigate. it’s great for sibling play, though, as they work together to solve the train routes!

the train set has been wonderful for imaginative play. my son loves to pretend to manage the train station! the only downside is that the tracks can come apart too easily during play. overall, it’s fun and makes for good family time as we all play together.

this was a gift for my nephew, and he can’t get enough of it! the train sounds are really cute and engaging. however, the battery life on the remote is a little disappointing; we’re constantly replacing batteries. still, he loves being the conductor!

really enjoyed how vibrant the train cars are! my kids love them. however, some of the track pieces don't fit as snugly as I'd like, which can be frustrating. they still play with it every day, so it’s definitely a hit overall!

these wall decals are just adorable! I put them up in my baby’s nursery, and they transformed the whole room in minutes. The colors are vibrant and they stick really well. just make sure you clean the walls before applying, otherwise they might peel off. LOVE that they’re removable since we might want to change the theme in a few years!

got these wall shelves to display my son’s favorite books and toys. they look cute and are pretty sturdy for the price (around $25). however, the installation was a bit tricky for me, could use better instructions. overall, they add a nice touch to the room, but just be cautious about how heavy you load them.

absolutely love this mobile! the whimsical design keeps my 6-month-old entertained and calm. the only downside is that it doesn’t spin very well after a couple of weeks, which is a little disappointing. still, the soft colors are perfect for a nursery, and it matches the theme we were going for.

these wall art prints are so charming. we hung them above the changing table, and they bring so much character to the room. the quality is great for the price point (about $30 for a set), but they’re a little smaller than I expected. I guess I should have checked the dimensions better!

the night sky mobile is stunning! my daughter loves to stare at it before bed. it creates such a calming atmosphere. however, I wish the stars lit up a bit brighter. it’s still pretty at night, just could be better. recommend for anyone looking for a soothing decor piece!

installed some wall decals from this brand, and I’m impressed! they were easy to apply, and there’s no residue left on the walls when you remove them. the downside? they might not hold up on textured walls. we have some, and a couple of the decals came off after a few days.

the wall shelves were exactly what I was looking for, but I wish they came with better hardware. I had to improvise to get them leveled right. they look great now, and they hold my daughter’s books nicely. definitely a cute addition, just be ready for some DIY.

got these decals for my son’s dinosaur-themed nursery, and they’re perfect! vibrant colors and easy to apply. however, a couple of them peeled off after a few weeks. I'm not sure if it’s the wall or the decals. overall, love the look, but I’m hoping they stick longer.

this wall art set is really sweet and adds a lovely touch to the nursery. I wish the frames were a bit more durable, though. they seem kind of flimsy. that said, I can’t deny they make the room feel cozy and inviting.

the baby mobile is a hit with my little one! the animals are super cute, and it spins beautifully. I was a bit worried because it seemed flimsy at first, but it’s held up just fine. just make sure to hang it securely!

these wall decals were a great find! they adhere well and come off easily without ruining the paint. my main issue is that the design is a bit more juvenile than I expected, but my toddler loves them, so that’s what matters!

we bought these floating shelves to display some baby photos and books. they add a modern touch, but I found them a bit challenging to install. the included hardware could be better. once they’re up, though, they look fantastic!

this wall art is beautiful! it really brightens up the nursery. I just wish they came in larger sizes. They’re a bit small for the space we have, but overall, they are still a lovely addition to our decor.

got this mobile as a gift, and it’s so cute! my baby loves watching it. however, it’s a bit noisy when it spins, which sometimes wakes them up. would be perfect if it were quieter! still, it’s a lovely decor piece!

these wall decals give off such a sweet vibe in the nursery. I love the colors, but they don’t stick well on textured paint. I had to glue some of them down, which isn't ideal. Still, they do look great overall!

the shelving unit is functional, and I appreciate how it keeps the room organized. I’m just not a fan of the assembly process—took me about an hour. the end result is nice, though, and I love how I can display my daughter’s books on it.

the moon and stars mobile is magical! it calms my little one before bedtime. however, the hanging strings could be a little longer. I had to adjust it a few times to get it right. overall, it’s worth it for the serene atmosphere it creates.

these wall shelves are very trendy! they fit perfectly in the nursery theme we chose. however, I would’ve liked if they came with more color options. I ended up painting them myself to match the decor.
the decals are okay—some stick well, but others peeled off within a week. I really liked the designs, and it made the room feel more personalized. just be prepared to touch up a bit if you get them!

the cute animal wall art is a delightful addition to my baby’s room. I love the style, but the colors are slightly muted compared to what I thought they’d be from the picture. not a dealbreaker, but could be brighter.

installed this mobile over my crib, and it looks beautiful! my baby loves it. however, it makes a tiny squeaking noise when it spins, which is a bit annoying at times. but the design is so cute, I can overlook it.

these wooden wall shelves are super cute! they hold my little one’s books perfectly. installation was a bit of a hassle, though; I had to spend some time figuring it out. overall, I'm happy with how it looks!

the wall decals are fun and colorful, really give the room a cheerful vibe. I just wish they had more options for themes. I went for woodland animals, but would love to see more designs in the future!

the nursery mobile is sweet, but the assembly was a bit complicated. once put together, it looks fantastic and adds such a nice touch to the room. just be prepared to spend some time fiddling with it!

these wall shelves are practical and nice looking, but they came a little scratched up. I reached out to customer service, and they were helpful and sent a replacement. now they look great, just a hassle to deal with initially.

absolutely in love with these wall decals! they were easy to apply and look so bright on the walls. my only complaint is that they could be a bit larger. I feel like bigger designs would have made an even more significant impact.
the nursery decor is so whimsical! I got the mobile and wall art set together, and they complement each other perfectly. my only wish is that they had more variations. I would buy again as gifts!

the wall decals are cute but they tend to come off a little too easily, especially on the textured walls. they look amazing when first applied, though! I just wish they were more durable for long-term use.

this wooden hammering toy has been a hit with my 2-year-old! he loves banging those pegs down and it's a great way to keep him entertained for a good 30 minutes at a time. the only downside is that a few pegs sometimes get stuck, but overall, it’s built pretty well. great buy for around $25!

got this pounding bench for my daughter who's 18 months old, and she adores it! the colors are vibrant and the hammer is just the right size for her little hands. but I did notice the pegs are a bit flimsy—they bent a little after just a week of use. still, it's fun for her and helps with her motor skills.

this hammer and peg set is good, but not without quirks. my 3-year-old loves smashing the pegs down, but the bench tips over easily if she's a bit too enthusiastic. it’s nice that it comes with a storage bag, though—it helps keep the mess contained! paid about $20, which isn’t too bad.

my son is 2 and has been playing with this hammering toy for a few weeks now. it’s a great way to develop his hand-eye coordination! the only issue is that the hammer is a bit small and can be easily lost. we like it, but I wish they made the hammer a little bigger.

this pounding bench was a gift for my niece’s first birthday. she loves it and plays with it almost every day! the wood feels sturdy, but I did notice a couple of splinters on the edges. keep an eye on that if you're buying for younger kids. overall, a fun toy for about $30.

I bought this as a birthday gift for my nephew who’s 2. He has a blast with it! The design is super cute and colorful. However, the hammer could be a bit heavier; sometimes it just skims over the pegs without really hitting them. But hey, he enjoys it and that’s what matters!

my 20-month-old has been using this hammer and peg set for a few weeks now. it's definitely kept her busy, but I feel like she mastered it too quickly! I wish there were more pegs or some different ways to play. Still a fun little toy for the price!

this wooden hammering toy is cute and colorful. My baby loves it! But I have to say, the pegs are a little hard to get out once they are pounded down, which frustrates him sometimes. It's a decent toy for around $25, but just know that it might require some adult help now and then.

my daughter is obsessed with this pounding bench! She’s 2 and it’s really helped her coordination. The only thing I didn’t like is that the hammer doesn’t really fit in her hand very well. Overall, it’s great for keeping her busy for an hour or so!

I got this for my 2.5-year-old, and he's had a lot of fun with it. It’s great seeing him learn how to hammer! However, the bench slides a bit on our hardwood floor, so we have to be careful about that. Pretty good toy for its price, though!

this hammering toy has entertained my 18-month-old for hours! the best part is the sturdy wood and the cute design. but honestly, be mindful of the pegs—they started to wobble after a week of use. still, it’s fun and worth the $22 I spent.

my toddler loves smashing the pegs but the bench doesn't stay stable during play. It was a bit disappointing since he gets frustrated when it tips over. We have to hold it while he plays, which makes it less enjoyable. It’s okay, but I expected more for the $30 price point.

this toy is super fun for my 2-year-old! He can’t get enough of hammering down the pegs. But, the hammer is a little on the lightweight side, which sometimes makes it hard for him to hit the pegs with enough force. Overall, a solid purchase at $25.

we have a love-hate relationship with this pounding bench. My kid loves it; it's colorful and engaging. But the hammer could be better made—it broke after a couple of weeks. Still, it was cool watching him learn coordination with it for the price!

I bought this a few weeks ago for my 2-year-old and he loves it! The colors are vibrant and it's a blast to play with. However, there’s a slight concern about the quality; one of the pegs cracked after a few days. But he enjoys it so much, I can overlook that!

the hammering toys I’ve tried seem to be getting better! This one is great for my 3-year-old. He’s really into it. One complaint is that the sound of the hammering can get a bit loud—it echoes quite a bit in our small apartment. Still, he enjoys every minute of it!

the pounding bench is easy to set up and my toddler was immediately drawn to it! She plays with it every day. The only downside is that the paint chipped a bit on the edges after a week. But it’s still a favorite in our home!

I picked this up for my little one and overall, it's been a good investment. He’s 2 and has already learned quite a bit from hammering the pegs down. However, the hammer isn’t very durable—it's starting to look worn out after a few days. Still, he loves it!

this hammer and peg set is super cute! My 1.5-year-old enjoys it. The construction seems solid, but I did expect more variety in peg shapes. Although he loves it, I feel like he’ll get bored soon. A decent buy for about $28, but could use some updates.

this was a gift for my niece, and she can’t stop playing with it! The design is colorful and definitely eye-catching. My only issue is that the pegs fit a bit too tightly in the holes; it can be frustrating for her to pull them out afterward. But she loves it anyway!

my 3-year-old has a ball with this hammering toy! It’s surprisingly sturdy for its price, and he’s mastering his coordination. However, it would be nice if it came with a few more pegs. It’s good but a bit basic for what I expected at $30.

my kid is obsessed with this wooden hammering toy! It’s super colorful and sturdy. The only downside is that a few pegs have started to splinter after several days of use. Overall, it's kept him entertained and learning, which is what matters most!

I bought this for my 2-year-old and she loves it! But I wish the hammer was a bit heavier so she could get a better hit on the pegs. It’s a good toy overall, but a few changes could make it even better for little users!

this is a great introduction to hammering for my 1.5-year-old. The colors are so eye-catching! However, I found the hammer a bit short for him to grip comfortably. Still, it keeps him entertained, and that's what counts!

I got this toy for my son who's almost 2, and he plays with it daily! It’s simple but effective for keeping him occupied. My only complaint is that the pegs don’t always pop back out easily, which can be frustrating for him. Still, a fun toy!

this hammer and peg set is decent but not perfect. My 2-year-old loves using it, but I feel like the hammer could be sturdier. It did break after a couple of weeks, which was disappointing. Still, he enjoys it and that’s what matters!

we received this as a gift and it was an instant hit with my 3-year-old! However, I did notice that the pegs seem to get loose after extensive use. The colors are fun, and it’s great for hand-eye coordination. Just wish it held up better!

this nursery comforter set is super cute! the colors are bright and it looks great in my baby girl's room. it fits her crib perfectly, but i wish it were a bit thicker for cooler nights. overall, it's a solid purchase for about $45.

we've had this duvet cover for our toddler for 6 months now. it washes well, which is a huge plus since kids can be messy! the fabric is soft, but honestly, it does tend to wrinkle easily. still, it keeps my little one cozy, so I’m happy with it.

the mattress pad is okay. my 2-year-old spills milk sometimes, and while it does protect the mattress, it’s not super absorbent. after a few washes, it shrinks a bit too much for my liking. maybe we'll look for something thicker next time.

these pillow shams are adorable, and they totally brighten up the nursery. love that they’re reversible, giving us two looks in one! but I do wish they were a little more durable. after a month, I noticed some fraying along the seams.

I ordered this nursery comforter and was surprised at how soft it is! my baby loves to cuddle with it. however, the design is a little too childish for my taste. for $50, I expected something I wouldn’t mind on display.

the duvet cover is nice, but I expected a little more from it. it looks pretty on the bed, and the colors are vibrant, but the zipper gets stuck sometimes. still works for my 3-month-old's nursery, just a minor annoyance.

this mattress pad is okay for the price. it's comfortable and fits snugly on the crib mattress. however, I have noticed it’s not as waterproof as I hoped; it doesn’t hold up well against large spills. I’d probably look for something better next time.

I really like these pillow shams! they brighten up the crib and go well with everything else. the only downside is they aren’t very thick. I worry about durability since my little one loves to grab onto everything.

just got this comforter set, and was surprised at how beautiful it looks! the pastel colors are perfect for a nursery. but, it could be a bit thicker; my baby can get chilly at night. still, I enjoy it for $40.

the mattress pad works, but it’s just okay. it fits well and is soft, but I wish it had more cushioning. after 3 months, it’s already starting to show wear. could probably find something better out there.

I’m loving this duvet cover! it’s super soft and washes easily. it feels cozy for my little one, but I noticed it wrinkles pretty quickly after drying. still, for around $35, it does the job well enough.

the comforter I bought for the nursery is really cute, but it’s not very warm. I thought it would be thicker, especially for winter nights. it’s perfect for spring/summer, though. overall, a decent buy for $50.

these pillow shams are a fun touch! they have such vibrant colors, but they seem a bit delicate. I’m worried they won’t hold up with my toddler pulling at them. we’ll see how they do, but for now, I’m happy with them.

the mattress pad is decent quality. it fits my crib mattress well, but I was disappointed that it doesn’t have a waterproof layer. minor spills are fine, but major ones? Yikes! I’ll be careful with my 18-month-old.
just got this duvet cover and it looks amazing in the nursery! the design is lovely, but it’s a bit too thin for my taste. definitely need to use another blanket for warmth, but I love the style!

I purchased this comforter set about a month ago, and it’s really nice. the fabric is soft, and the design is cute! the only downside is that it’s not super warm, so I’ve paired it with a blanket for the colder nights.

the pillow shams are adorable, and they add a nice pop to my nursery decor. they wash easily too! but, I’ve noticed some pilling starting already, which is disappointing at this price point. overall, I’m still satisfied.

the mattress pad is fine for what it is. it does its job, but I wish it were a little thicker for added comfort. it fits my crib well and doesn’t slide off, but I’d recommend looking for something more substantial.

just got this duvet cover yesterday! it’s so soft and the colors are vibrant. however, the zipper was a bit tricky to navigate. I’m hoping it holds up after a few washes. for $28, I think it’s worth a try!
the comforter is cute and my baby loves it. it’s light, which is ideal for warmer months. however, I wish it had a bit more weight to it for those chilly nights! overall, good value for $40.

I’m really pleased with this mattress pad. it fits perfectly and feels soft. however, my little one tends to get sweaty at night, and this doesn’t help much with temperature regulation. might look for one with cooling options next time.

the pillow shams are just okay. they look cute, but I noticed color fading after a few washes. I love the design and how they brighten up the nursery, but I wish they’d hold their color better over time.
got this comforter set for my daughter’s nursery, and it’s adorable! I love how easy it is to clean, but it could be a bit thicker for warmth. still, it does the trick for playing and resting.
