i ordered these with high hopes, but they don't fit snugly on my table corners, which is concerning. they look nice, but if they come off easily, what's the point? currently searching for a better option. about $20 wasted.

the design is nice, and they add a bit of style to my furniture. however, I can't help but feel they could be thicker. we’ve only had them for a month, and I’m already seeing wear and tear. might look for something more durable next time.

these are so perfect for our home! we have a 3-year-old who loves to climb on everything, and these make me feel much better about it. they've held up well so far, but the color selection is pretty limited. would love more options!

bought these for my coffee table after my son bumped into it one too many times. they were easy to install and look good, but some corners came loose after a week. guess I’ll keep an eye on them. happy with the coverage for now!

as a parent, I’m always on the lookout for safety products. these corner guards are good, but I wish they had a stronger adhesive. one corner peeled off during a playdate, which wasn’t great. but at least they look nice!

we had some issues with these when we first installed them. they just didn’t stick well on our wooden table. after using some extra adhesive tape they worked out fine but it’s a hassle. wouldn’t buy again unless improved.

these corner guards were a great investment for our living room. they blend nicely with modern furniture, plus they were easy to install. just wish they were a bit thicker for added protection. they work, but could definitely improve.

my little one is 18 months, and we recently got these for our sharp-edged furniture. they provide good cushioning, but the color options are a bit lackluster. all in all, they do their job and are worth the money spent, about $25.

the adhesive quality isn't the best, but the design is sleek! they look good on the furniture, and my 2-year-old doesn't seem to mind them at all. just have to be cautious about checking them regularly to ensure they stay attached.

after trying multiple brands, this one was the best for my coffee table. it’s been a month, and they’re still in place. however, I do wish they were thicker. they do prevent bumps, but I feel like there’s room for improvement. still happy overall!

these are decent corner guards. we’ve had them for about 2 weeks, and they were super easy to install, so I appreciate that! they do the job but don’t seem very durable. we’ll see how they hold up in the long run.

got these for my dining table, and they look pretty nice. the sticky part works okay, but I had to reapply them a couple of times. good protection, but it could be better. still, I'm glad I have them for my 1-year-old!

am I the only one that thinks these could be better? they’re doing a fine job preventing bumps, but I had high hopes for the adhesive strength. added some extra glue myself, which worked, but that shouldn't be necessary. overall decent.

the kids love running around the house, and I feel safer with these guards on the corners. they were easy to install, and they stick well if placed correctly. however, they've been scuffed up a bit after a month. could use more durability!

these corner guards are pretty cute! my little one has bumped into the coffee table a few times, but these have helped soften the impact. wish they fit a bit tighter, but they’re working for now. happy with the purchase overall!

this highchair is super adjustable! my 2-year-old loves sitting at the table with us now. the height adjusts really easily with just one hand, which is a lifesaver when juggling food and a baby. however, the removable tray could be a bit sturdier; it sometimes feels like it's going to pop off. overall, it's a great buy for about $80.

not a bad booster seat for the price! we've been using it for 6 months now, and the safety harness gives me peace of mind. i appreciate that it’s portable, so we can take it to grandma’s. on the downside, the seat cover isn’t the easiest to clean, which is a bummer after spaghetti night.

the portable design sold me on this highchair! we take it everywhere. my 18-month-old fits snugly in the safety harness, but sometimes it’s a struggle to get him in and out. my only issue is the removable tray—it doesn’t slide back on as easily as I’d like. overall, very handy, just wish the tray was better!

after 4 months of using this highchair, I can say it fits well into our living space. love how adjustable the height is, but it does take a bit of effort to change. the safety harness is solid, but my little one manages to wriggle out sometimes. the removable tray is great for cleaning, though, which I appreciate!

just got this booster seat for my 3-year-old, and he loves it! the design is pretty sleek, and it fits well at our dining table. the height adjustments are handy, but the clips that hold the tray can be a bit on the flimsy side. still, for $50, I think it's a solid choice. thumbs up!

this highchair has been a lifesaver for feeding time. the adjustable height lets me match it to our table perfectly. the safety harness keeps my little one secure, but I do find the straps can get twisted easily. overall, pretty satisfied, but could use some minor improvements.

I bought this for my baby who’s now 14 months old, and it’s working well so far! I love the removable tray for cleaning. it does take some muscle to adjust the height, which can be annoying. the design is compact, which is great for our small kitchen. would have loved an easier height adjustment mechanism.

we’ve had this highchair for about 5 months now, and my son loves it! I appreciate that it’s portable, which makes it easy to move from room to room. however, the safety harness could be more adjustable. it feels a little tight sometimes. overall, a good buy for just under $70!

this highchair is pretty good but not without its flaws. the height adjustments are great but a bit stiff, and the removable tray is practical yet feels cheap when you click it in. my 15-month-old feels secure in the safety harness, so that’s a win. not bad overall, although I expected better for the price.

just got this booster seat, and it's nice for the price. my little girl loves using it. the portability is fantastic, but I wish the straps were longer to fit around my dining chair easily. everything else works great, especially the removable tray, which I can easily pop off for cleaning!

I’m loving this highchair for my 2-year-old! the adjustable height feature is a big plus, and the removable tray makes cleanup a breeze. but I’ve noticed it can be a bit wobbly at times. overall, still a good value for around $65. would definitely recommend for casual dining!

this highchair is a mixed bag for us. the adjustable height is a godsight, making mealtimes easier to manage. however, the safety harness is a bit tricky to buckle with one hand. the design is nice, but cleaning the tray can be a real hassle—food gets stuck in the little crevices. I’d say it’s decent, but I had higher hopes.

we’ve had this highchair for nearly 6 months, and it has definitely served its purpose. the portability is a huge plus for travel. on the downside, I wish the removable tray was easier to snap back after cleaning. my 20-month-old has gotten used to the safety harness, so that’s a relief!

my wife and I are happy with this highchair! it’s compact and easy to store away, which we need for our small apartment. the adjustable height is straightforward, but we did have to read the manual to get started. the safety harness is secure, but the straps tend to twist a lot. still, a decent choice at around $70.

just purchased this booster seat for our 16-month-old, and it’s been good so far. I love how it fits snugly on our chairs. the removable tray makes clean-up easier, but the height adjustment could be smoother. it's not perfect, but it does the job well enough for $45!

this highchair has mostly worked well for us. the adjustable height is fantastic, making it easier for our little one to join us at the table. however, I’m not a fan of the tray—it feels flimsy, and it doesn’t click back on securely. still, it’s alright for the price we paid, around $60.

I really wanted to love this booster seat, but it has some issues. on the plus side, it's adjustable and fits nicely at the table. but the safety harness is tough to use—my baby wriggles out way too easily. the removable tray is great, but I wish it was a bit sturdier. overall a 3 out of 5 for me.

we bought this highchair for our daughter who’s almost 2, and it works well. what I like most is the portability; it’s easy to move around. the height adjustment is good, but I find it a bit hard to manage sometimes. the straps are secure, making me feel safe, just wish the design was a little more modern looking.

this highchair is decent for the price. I enjoy the way it looks, and my son seems comfortable in it. however, I have some concerns about the removable tray—it can be difficult to put back on. the safety harness works fine, but I wish it were easier to adjust it. it’s okay, just not my favorite.

after using it for a few weeks, I can say the adjustable height is a good feature. it allows me to bring my 18-month-old to the table comfortably. the safety harness is reliable, but the tray feels like it could be improved for cleaning. it does the job, but I wouldn’t call it perfect.

this highchair has been a hit in our household! the portable design is awesome; we take it everywhere. the adjustable height has helped my little guy reach the table with us. the only downside is that the safety harness can be a bit finicky. overall, very happy with the purchase!

I was excited about this booster seat, especially with the safety harness and removable tray. it has worked well for my 2-year-old so far. the downside is the price—at $75, I expected a bit more quality. it’s alright but not perfect. still, it serves its purpose for now.

purchased this highchair for my 12-month-old, and it has its pros and cons. I love how adjustable it is, but the tray sometimes pops off at the most inconvenient times! the safety harness seems secure, but I wish it was easier to tighten. overall, it meets our needs but could use some tweaks.

got this for my 2-year-old and he's obsessed! the musical features are amazing and he plays with it for hours. however, it can get a bit overwhelming with all the noises if you have more than one kid around.

this facial steamer is a lifesaver! i love the adjustable steam settings; i can choose a light mist for hydration or turn it up for deep cleaning. my skin feels so fresh afterward! but sometimes it takes a bit to heat up. overall, definitely a great addition to my skincare routine!

i was skeptical at first, but this steamer really does help with sinus relief! i used it during allergy season and it made a noticeable difference. the aromatherapy attachment is a nice touch, but i wish it held more water for longer sessions. about $40 well spent, though!

had this for about 2 months and i'm torn. it feels great when it works, but the steam isn’t consistent. love the way my skin looks afterwards, but sometimes i can barely feel the steam. also, the design is a bit bulky for my small bathroom.

i bought this mainly for the aromatherapy feature, and it does not disappoint! i add a few drops of essential oil, and it feels like a spa day at home. that said, the steam settings could be a little more powerful for deeper cleaning. overall, a good buy.

this facial steamer changed my weekly skincare routine! it truly helps with hydration and makes my skin glow. i love the fact it has different settings, but it can be a bit loud. still worth it for that spa feel at home!

i've had a mixed experience. the steam does feel nice and helps with my sinuses, but the nozzle design could be better. steam can sometimes go sideways instead of directly on my face, which is a bit annoying. but hey, my skin feels softer!

got this steamer to soothe my dry skin, and it's been working pretty well so far! the hydration boost is real, but you have to keep refilling it often. wish the water tank held more for longer sessions. overall, worth about $30.

not sure how i feel about this steamer. the sinus relief is legit, but my skin didn't feel as hydrated as i expected. love the aromatherapy feature, especially with lavender oil, but sometimes it drips water, which is messy. a bit hit or miss for me.

just tried this for the first time and wow! my skin feels so plump afterward. the steam settings are easy to adjust, but it does take a while to heat up. i was hoping for a faster start. still, it's a fun self-care tool!

the facial steamer works wonders for my skin! love the easy steam settings and how refreshed i feel afterwards. however, the aromatherapy attachment is kind of small. wish it held more liquid for a stronger scent. overall, good value!

absolutely love this steamer! my face feels so clean and hydrated after each use. the sinus relief is a bonus, but it can be a bit bulky to store. still, i use it a couple of times a week, definitely worth the investment.

wish i could say i love this steamer as much as others! it works okay for hydration, but the steam settings aren’t as powerful as I hoped. sometimes, it feels like I'm waiting forever for it to heat up. just so-so for me.

this little gadget is a game changer! it has transformed my skincare routine with its powerful steam. the sinus relief aspect is a nice surprise too! my only concern is that it needs frequent refills, but that's a small price to pay for glowing skin.

i've been using this steamer for about a month and it's been helpful! i enjoy the different steam settings and how it hydrates my skin. however, the water tank could be larger, as i find myself refilling it more than i’d like.

this steamer is great for relaxation! the steam settings are really easy to use and adjust. i just wish the aromatherapy attachment was more effective. i didn’t really notice a difference with essential oils. still, it’s okay for the price!

i honestly didn’t expect to love this steamer as much as i do! it's perfect for giving my face a refreshing boost. the steam settings are super helpful, but it can take longer to heat up than I'd like. overall, a solid purchase!

picked this up hoping for some sinus relief, and it's been decent! the steam is soothing, but the device could be a bit more user-friendly. sometimes the steam feels too hot, and other times too cool. the aromatherapy feature is nice, though!

this steamer has been a fun addition to my skincare routine! the hydration effect is real, and my skin looks great after using it! however, the steam settings could use more power. still worth having for the self-care vibe it brings.

really enjoy this steamer for my skincare! it's easy to use, and my skin feels amazing post-use. however, i'm not a fan of how frequently I have to refill the water tank. a larger capacity would make it perfect for longer sessions!

overall, this steamer is pretty good! it helps with hydration and sinus relief, but I’ve noticed that sometimes it leaks a little. not a dealbreaker, but definitely something to keep in mind. for the price, it does the job well enough.

i had high hopes for this facial steamer but it's been hit or miss for me. sometimes it works beautifully, but other times the steam feels weak. love the aromatherapy aspect, but I just wish the steam flow was more consistent.

finally got around to trying my new steamer and I’m loving it! it feels so relaxing, and my skin is definitely more hydrated. the only downside is that the water doesn’t last long enough, but I'll just have to refill it more often.

this steamer is a nice addition to my routines. i'm all about that hydration, but the sinus relief hasn't been as effective as I hoped. I like to use it with essential oils, but sometimes the flow isn’t as strong as I’d like.

really impressed with this steamer! the steam settings are fantastic, and it definitely helps clear my sinuses. but, there’s a learning curve on how to use it without it dripping everywhere. still worth it for how lovely my skin feels!

i’ve used this steamer a few times and it definitely gives my skin a nice glow. the steam settings are easy to navigate, but it takes a bit longer to heat compared to other ones I've tried. still enjoyable overall!

this facial steamer is such a treat! love how my skin feels after each use. the sinus relief is a nice bonus, but I wish the design was more compact. it takes up a bit of counter space, which can be annoying in a small bathroom.

this gift set was perfect for my baby shower! it came with a super soft blanket, a cute rattle, and some adorable clothes. my favorite is the little onesie with the animals on it. the only downside is that the onesie shrank a bit after the first wash, so just be careful with the dryer!

got this as a gift for my niece's first birthday. the toys included are really colorful and engaging, but the blanket feels a bit thin. she loves the rattle though, and it keeps her entertained for a while. overall, it's a nice set but could use a thicker blanket.

the feeding set came with helpful items like bibs and spoons, but I was surprised to find toys and a cute little blanket wrapped up too. my son loves the rattle, but I wish the bibs had a waterproof backing. the set is about $40 which seems reasonable for all that’s included.

this set is so cute! the clothing is adorable and the blanket is super soft. my baby sleeps with it every night. however, the rattle is a little too loud for my taste. I wish it was a bit quieter. still, the overall quality is great and well worth the price.

just received this gift set and it's a hit with my 6-month-old! the toys are perfect for teething, and I love the fact that the clothes are 100% cotton. but, I noticed that the blanket is a bit small for swaddling. maybe for newborns, but not for my growing baby.

my mom gifted this to my baby, and it’s adorable! the onesie is so soft, and the rattle is cute. my only issue is that the bibs are a bit too big for my little one, even at 8 months. they slip off easily, which is frustrating during feeding times.

I love this gift set! the blanket is amazing, and I can see it being used for years. however, the toys feel a little cheap. my baby does enjoy the rattle, but I wish the other toy was a bit sturdier. still, for the price, it’s a fun set.

this was a great way to welcome my baby! the clothing is stylish and fits perfectly. the blanket is a nice touch, but after a few washes, it’s starting to pill a bit. my daughter loves the rattle though, so all in all, I'm satisfied with the purchase.

I bought this for my granddaughter, and she loves it! the blanket is super cuddly, and the clothes are just too cute. the only thing is that the socks included are hard to keep on her little feet. overall, a fun and useful gift set!

this set is lovely for new parents. the rattles are colorful and keep my baby entertained. however, I found the blanket to be a bit light; I prefer something thicker. still, the outfits are adorable and fit well, so I’m pleased.

got this as a gift for my friend's baby shower, and it was a hit! the clothes are so cute and the rattle is perfect for tiny hands. my only complaint is that I wish the blanket was a bit larger. but for the price, it’s still an amazing buy.

this set is perfect for any new parent! the blanket is soft and cozy, and my baby loves the colorful toys. I was a little disappointed in the sizing of the clothes though; they seemed to run a bit small. otherwise, I’m happy with the purchase.

loved the variety in this gift set! the baby clothes are adorable and the rattle is really fun for my little one. my only downside is that the blanket is a little thin for winter months. still, it’s a great addition to the nursery.

I ordered this for my nephew, and he loves the toys! the blanket is soft but not very thick, which is a little disappointing. the clothing is super cute, though, and fits well. overall, a nice gift, but I’d prefer a thicker blanket.

gave this as a baby shower gift, and the parents loved it! the blanket is really nice and soft. the rattle works amazing, but the clothes are a bit smaller than expected. I’d suggest sizing up if you're buying for an older baby.

this was a great buy! the blanket is lovely and the rattle is a big hit with my baby. the only downside is that the clothes are more of a summer style; I wish there was a winter option. still, it’s a pretty good deal for all that comes in the set.

the gift set is really cute and perfect for new parents! the blanket is soft and the rattles are fun. however, I was a little surprised that the clothes were not as soft as I expected. still, it’s a solid choice for a baby gift.

this set caught my eye because of the adorable design! the toys are engaging, but I found the blanket to be too thin. it gets the job done, but I prefer a thicker one for winter. the clothes are nice, but the sizing is a bit off.

I bought this for my friend’s baby, and they were thrilled! the blanket is so cute, and the toys are amazing. but, I wish the clothes were a bit bigger; they fit my 4-month-old snugly. overall, I think it’s worth the price.

the baby clothes in this set are super adorable! the blanket is nice, but I found it to be smaller than I'd like. my little one loves shaking the rattle. it’s a great set, just wish for a bit more variety in the clothes.

this gift set has some really cute items! the blanket is soft, and my baby enjoys the rattle. however, the overall quality of the clothing could be better; it feels a bit cheap. the whole set is affordable, so it’s not a total loss.

this gift set is amazing! the clothing is perfect for my baby, and the rattle is a favorite. my only concern is that the blanket is pretty thin, which might not keep my little warm enough in winter. still, it's a solid buy for the price.

my sister loved this gift set! the toys are fun, and the blanket is perfect for snuggling. but I wish the clothing selection had been a little larger. overall, it’s a good value and super cute for any baby.

I think this set is adorable! the rattles are so colorful, and the blanket is nice. my only complaint is that the bibs included are a bit flimsy. still, it's a lovely gift for new parents, and I’m glad I purchased it.

this was a delightful gift set! the blanket is super soft and comfy. however, the clothes had a slight odd smell when I first opened them. after a wash, they were fine, but that initial first impression was a little off. overall, it’s good value.

the quality in this gift set is pretty decent! the rattle is a favorite for my baby. the blanket could be a bit larger, but it’s cozy enough. the outfits are cute but do run small. I guess if you know how to layer, you’re fine!
I loved this gift set! the blanket is one of the softest I’ve felt. my baby really enjoys the rattle too. the onesies are cute but wish they had more neutral colors. still, a fantastic buy overall!

this set is a great value! the clothing is cute and the blanket is soft. the toys are colorful which keeps my baby entertained. the only downside is that the blanket isn’t as heavy as I would like for colder months, but it’s good overall.

This kite is such a blast to fly! We took it out for the first time last weekend at the park, and my 8-year-old was squealing with joy. It was easy to assemble and flew beautifully. The only downside is the string felt a bit thin, so I’m worried about it fraying over time. Still, it’s been great for family outings and definitely keeps the kids entertained!

I was a bit hesitant to buy this windsock because I've had some flimsy ones in the past. But I’m pleasantly surprised! It’s super colorful and it really dances in the breeze. However, I noticed it faded a bit after a month in the sun. For the price, I can't complain too much, just wish the colors stayed vibrant longer.

This is a decent kite for beginners, but I have a few mixed feelings. While it flies well and comes with a nice kite line reel, it took us a few tries to get it to go high. The instructions were not very clear, either. My son enjoyed running with it, though! It’s good for the price, just not the easiest to handle.

Love this kite! It has a beautiful design and catches the wind really well. My 5-year-old had no trouble launching it into the air. Just a heads up, the tail isn't long enough for heavy winds, which means it can get a bit wobbly at times. But overall, it’s become a staple for our summer weekends at the beach!

Received the windsock and it’s adorable in our yard! Exactly as described and it adds such a festive touch. Just wish the clips were higher quality; one broke off during installation. Still, it’s been holding up nicely against the wind, and everyone in the neighborhood has complimented it!

I really wanted to love this kite, but it’s seen better days already. It flew well on the first day, but the frame feels fragile. It bent after just a few outings. On the bright side, my daughter had a great time flying it, and it was easy to put together. Just wish it was more durable.

Kite flying day was a hit! This one has been our go-to for family outings. The kite tail is long and adds to its stability while flying, but the string reel isn’t the most comfortable to hold for long periods. Still worth it for the joy it brought to my kids!

The colors on this windsock are vibrant, and it looks amazing in the garden. It’s a bit smaller than expected, but it brightens the space nicely. I’ve had it for about 2 months now, and it’s held up against some windy days. The stitching seems solid, but the top could use a little more reinforcement.

What a fun kite! My kids have been fighting over who gets to fly it every weekend. It’s super lightweight and easy for them to handle. The only downside is we had to buy thicker kite line because the one included snapped on our first flight. So happy I bought a backup!

I’m torn on this one. The kite flew really nice on a calm day, but in stronger winds, it was uncontrollable. The string was good quality, but the instructions were a bit vague. It’s perfect for light breezy days, and my kids loved it, but we need to pick our days wisely!

This windsock is a fun addition to my garden! It catches the sun and the wind beautifully, but I wish the material were heavier. It tends to wrap around itself when it gets really breezy, which is a bit annoying. Still, I enjoy seeing it sway in the breeze!

I was excited to get this kite, and while it flew great initially, the frame broke after just a few sessions. My kids loved it, but I expected better durability. On the plus side, the colors are vibrant and it was easy to assemble. Just wish it lasted longer!

We took our new kite to the beach, and wow, it flew so high! The kids were thrilled watching it soar. The string reel made it easy to control, but I found myself having to replace the line after a few hours; it started to tangle easily. Still, no regrets – it’s a great way to spend a day with the family!

Absolutely love this windsock! It adds a splash of color to our yard and really flutters in the wind. The material feels sturdy, but I do think the clip mechanism could be improved; it doesn't seem very reliable. Overall, though, it brings joy every time I step outside.

The kite looked fantastic in the pictures, but it didn’t perform as well as I’d hoped. It kept diving down instead of soaring high. My son still had a blast, though, and I appreciated that the assembly was quick and straightforward. Just keep an eye on the wind conditions when using it.

This kite is super easy to fly, even for my 4-year-old! It was up in the air within minutes, and we had a blast running with it. The only downside is that the tail got tangled a bit. Overall, a great purchase for family fun!

I bought this windsock to brighten up our patio and it’s been doing just that! I love how it moves in the breeze, but I noticed one part was a little frayed upon arrival, which was disappointing. Still, it’s been holding up well enough, and I get many compliments from neighbors!

This kite is a complete hit with my kids! They love the bright colors, and it’s easy to launch. However, I think the string could be stronger. We had a mishap when the string snapped due to a sudden gust of wind. Great fun but some room for improvement.

We got this windsock for our garden, and it’s such a cheerful addition! It’s well-made, although I wish the colors were more vibrant. It catches the wind well for the most part, and it’s been lasting great through some rainy days. Definitely brightens up our outdoor space!

Honestly, I’m a little disappointed with this kite. It had great potential, but it struggled to stay in the air for long periods. The heart-shaped design is cute, though, and it was easy to assemble. Just wish it performed better in the wind!

This is an impressive kite! The flight was stable, and assembly was a breeze. One small issue was the line reel – it wasn’t super comfortable to hold. Overall, it was a fun day out with the kids, and they loved navigating it through the sky!

My family really enjoyed this windsock! It adds a whimsical touch to our porch. It’s held up well against various weather, but I wish the hooks were a bit sturdier. Still, it’s been a cheerful sight every time I walk outside!

The kite is a total eye-catcher with its colorful design, but the string line snapped after one fly. It definitely caught the wind well, and my kids loved running around with it. Just wish it was a bit more durable!

Received this windsock and it was cuter than I expected! Adds so much character to my backyard. One thing, though, the stitching is a little loose in places, but it hasn’t fallen apart yet! Overall, a good buy for the price and a nice decoration.

My kids were so excited to fly this kite! It went up quickly and stayed high for a decent amount of time. However, it did develop a small tear after a day of use, which was disappointing. Despite that, they had so much fun and we’ll definitely use it again!

I thought I’d treat myself to this windsock for a pop of color in my yard. It’s been great – really bright and whimsical. I did notice it leans a little to one side, but it’s still adorable and has held up nicely through several storms!

This kite was a favorite during our camping trip! It flew smoothly and was easy for my 6-year-old to handle. The only drawback was that it came with a flimsy string. We upgraded to a thicker one, and now it’s perfect for fun outdoor adventures!

These silicone bibs are a lifesaver! My 18-month-old can be quite messy during mealtime, and with this bib, I save so much time on clean-up. The pocket catches most of the food, and it’s easy to wipe down. My only gripe is that the neck hole could be a bit larger; sometimes it feels snug on my little guy.

The suction plates really impressed me! They stick well to the table and make it very hard for my 2-year-old to throw them off. However, I did notice that it’s not 100% spillproof; sometimes, if he pushes too hard, food can go flying. Still, better than any other plate we’ve tried.

Love these baby utensils! We got the set about 3 months ago, and my daughter is finally getting the hang of using a fork. The soft grip is perfect for her little hands, but the knife doesn’t really cut anything, so we still end up using our adult knives for meals. Just something to keep in mind!

These spillproof bowls are awesome! We’ve been using them for about a month now, and I can finally sit down during meals without worrying about my son flinging his food everywhere. But, I wish they came with lids. It would make storing leftovers so much easier, especially during busy weeknights.

The silicone bibs were recommended by a friend, and I can see why! My baby loves to play with the pocket, and it definitely catches more food than her old cloth bib ever did. That said, they can get really slippery when wet, making it tricky when I’m washing them.

Bought the suction plates for my 15-month-old, and they work great for pasta nights! The designs are cute, which helps keep my kiddo engaged. But I've noticed that some of the food gets stuck in the corners, so it’s a bit tricky for him to get everything out without me helping.

Have mixed feelings about these utensils. They are super colorful and appealing, and my son enjoyed using them. However, I was a bit disappointed that the spoon is not very deep, making it hard for him to scoop up his yogurt without me having to help him out.

I was excited for these spillproof bowls, and overall, they work well. My daughter loves the bright colors, and they do hold up well to being tossed around. However, I wish they had more grip on the bottom because they sometimes slide on my glass table, which can be a bit annoying.

These silicone bibs are the best! My daughter used to take off her bib constantly, but now she seems to forget about it with the fun designs. The only downside is that they don’t dry very quickly, so I have to have a few on hand to rotate.

We got a set of baby utensils and my toddler loves them, especially the bright colors! They’re good for transitioning from finger foods to more complex meals. However, the fork is quite blunt, so it doesn’t really help him poke things, which I find a bit ironic!

I really wanted to love these suction plates, but they just didn’t work for us. They don’t really stick well to our dining table, and my son easily lifts them off. I’ve tried different surfaces, and nothing seems to help. I think we’ll stick to traditional plates for now.

These spillproof bowls are fabulous for cereal! They’ve saved me so much mess during breakfast time. The only issue is that they are a bit smaller than I expected; for a growing 2-year-old, I find I have to refill them more often than I’d like.

The feeding utensils are adorable! My son loves to mimic me, and he feels like such a big boy using them. Unfortunately, the spoon gets kind of warped after a few washes, and I wish they were a bit sturdier in that respect. Would love to see a more durable version!

Finally got my hands on these silicone bibs, and they have made mealtime a little less stressful. We use them for breakfast and snacks, but they are a bit bulky for travel. I wish I could fold them somehow to make them more portable when we go out.

My toddler has been using the suction plates for about a month, and I really like them. They do help with keeping the food on the table, but if he uses too much force, he can still send them flying off. It’s a good idea, just wish it had a stronger suction.

I have to say, these baby utensils are super cute and colorful! My little one loves the designs. But the fork really doesn’t pick up much, and sometimes it’s more frustrating than helpful. We still use them, but I wish they were a bit more functional.

I’m pretty happy with these silicone bibs! They’re easy to clean and fit well. My only concern is that they seem to hold onto food smells after a while. I wash them frequently, but a lingering scent can happen, especially with stronger foods.

These suction bowls are nice for helping keep the food in front of my baby. They don’t slide around too much, but they can be a little tough to clean if they get too sticky. I’ve struggled to get dried food off; waiting until it’s soaked does help, though!

I ordered these baby utensils after seeing them online, and I think they are wonderful for helping my little one self-feed. They are lightweight and easy to grip. But after a few weeks, I found that the knife doesn’t really serve much of a purpose since it doesn’t cut well at all.

The silicone bibs work great for my 16-month-old, who is a messy eater! The pocket is perfect for catching food, but they can be a tad bulky. They are not the easiest to put on quickly, which is sometimes a hassle when you’re in a rush.

Suction plates are okay, but I found that the small section for dips is a bit shallow, and my son ends up spilling more than I’d like. They stick pretty well to the table, but if he pushes down hard enough, they can still come off. Just something to be aware of!

I bought these spillproof bowls about two weeks ago, and I appreciate how they help limit messes with my 1-year-old. They’re pretty sturdy and have survived multiple tosses. However, I wish they came with lids; storing leftovers is tricky without them.

My daughter loves her utensils! The colors are bright, and they draw her in. However, I found that the spoon could be a bit bigger; it makes it hard for her to scoop up her favorite oatmeal without a lot of spills. Still, better than any other set we’ve used!

Overall, these silicone bibs are a fantastic purchase for us. They’ve helped reduce the mess at mealtime significantly. That being said, I do wish there were more pattern options to choose from. We have two, but I feel like we could use more variety!

Bought these baby utensils for my almost 2-year-old and he seems to really enjoy using them! The only downside is that the knife is pretty useless; it really can't cut anything. But he’s having fun with the spoon and fork, so that's what matters most!

my cat absolutely loves this plush sushi toy! it squeaks and crinkles, which keeps my 3-year-old tabby entertained for hours. the only downside is that after about a month of heavy play, the stitching is starting to come undone. still, it's cute and durable enough to last a while!

got this action figure set for my kitten's first birthday, and she loves the little cat version of superheroes! the colors are bright and they seem well made. however, one of the figures lost a whisker in the first week. but hey, she's still having a blast with them!

i picked up this board game specifically designed for playing with cats, and it’s super fun for both of us! my 2-year-old cat enjoys chasing the pieces around, but the instructions are a bit confusing. it took me and my partner some trial and error to figure out the best way to play.

these plush mice are a hit! my 4-month-old kitten carries them around everywhere. the jingling sound when she plays is adorable. but, i wish they came in a pack of more than two; she goes through them quickly. still worth the price, though!

got the doll for my cat's birthday. she wasn't super interested at first, but after a couple of days, she started to play with it a bit. the only issue is that the fabric is a bit too soft, and she manages to rip it easily. can’t complain too much for the price, though!

i really liked this interactive toy; my 5-year-old cat seemed to enjoy it at first. it has various textures and noises. however, the batteries died after just 2 weeks, and it was a bit of a hassle to replace them. would've loved if it had a rechargeable option!

this plush taco toy is hilarious and my kitty loves it! the squeaker is cute, but i wish it was a bit sturdier because she already tore a hole after a week. still, it’s super cute and makes me laugh every time she plays with it!

i thought my cat would love these crinkle balls since she's always into noise, but she just stared at them for a long time. after a few trials, she finally touched them, but they didn’t hold her interest for long. maybe they're better for younger cats?

this board game has some fun concepts, but honestly, it’s a bit complicated for my 3-year-old to follow. we modify it a bit to keep it simple, and my cat enjoys the pieces. the idea is great, but I think it needs to be tweaked for cats who aren’t familiar with games.

i got these plush fish for my cat, and she went absolutely nuts over them! she carries them around and plays fetch. only complaint is they are a bit pricey for plush toys. but seeing her so happy makes it worth it!

the action figure set is a little hit-or-miss. my 6-month-old cat enjoys wrestling with the larger ones, but the smaller figures have already lost limbs. they’re cute, but I wish they were more durable. probably best for gentle play rather than roughhousing!

i purchased this interactive plush toy for my kitten, and it's been great for keeping her engaged. the only downside is I have to replace the batteries pretty often, which can be annoying. overall, she loves it, and at least it keeps her busy!

the cat doll is adorable and my cat enjoys chewing on it, but the stuffing came out pretty quickly. it’s cute to watch her play, but I'd love if it were made with tougher material. just wish it lasted longer for the price I paid.

my cat really enjoys this plush toy that looks like a burrito! the crinkle sound keeps her interested, but I noticed she lost interest after a week or so. it's one of those toys that's fun for a while but doesn't hold up long-term.

i got this board game because my friends raved about it, but my cat just wasn’t having it. it’s a bit too complicated for her taste. we ended up focusing on the toy pieces instead, which was fun. maybe I expected too much from my cat?

these plush toys are awesome! my 2-year-old kitty loves playing with them and drags them around the house. the only problem is the stuffing started coming out after a couple of weeks. I guess I expected too much from a $15 toy!

the action figures are fun, but they’re not the sturdiest. my cat loves to chew on them, but a few of the limbs have fallen off. they’re cute and colorful, but I wish they were a bit tougher for her play! still, she enjoys them!

bought this plush cat toy which is supposed to be a mouse, and it's been a favorite! my kitten carries it everywhere. just wish it had a bell or something more exciting inside. it’s holding up well after a month of play, though!

my cat is obsessed with these crinkle toys. the noise is super enticing for her! however, they do seem to get tangled with each other easily, and I’m always finding them in the strangest spots. still worth it for the fun they bring!

picked up this board game for my cat, and it was such a great idea! she seemed interested initially, but it requires some human guidance. after a few rounds, she lost interest. would love if there were more engaging elements for her!

this plush toy is cute, and my cat likes it, but the squeaker stopped working after a week! she still plays with it, but I expected it to last longer for the price. would try a different brand next time.

these plush mice are adorable, and my cat went wild when I first opened the package! however, they lost their charm after a couple of days. now she only pays attention to them occasionally. still good for the price, though!

the doll toy is not a hit with my cat. she played with it for about a day and then lost interest. I think it might be too soft for her taste. I end up playing with it more than she does! at least it’s cute to have around.
got this plush catnip toy for my kitten, and she was instantly hooked! it kept her occupied for weeks. the downside is that the catnip smell has faded a lot, so I might need to refresh it soon.

I bought this board game aiming to bond with my cat, and it's been a mixed experience. she played along for a bit but seemed confused by the rules. the pieces are fun, but we ended up playing with them separately. might be better for other pets!
the plush taco toy was a great purchase! my cat loves to bunny-kick it, but I wish it had more durable stitching. after some rough play, I found a small hole. it’s still her favorite, though!

got this set of action figures for my 1-year-old cat, and overall, it’s a fun addition to her toys! she loves to bat them around, but I found a couple of pieces were a bit flimsy. the colors are bright, which keeps her engaged!

got this walker for my 78-year-old mom, and honestly, it's been such a relief! she loves the padded seat and the basket for her belongings. she's been able to go to the park with us again. but the brakes sometimes feel a bit loose, so just be cautious when using it on inclines.

I’ve been using this rollator for about 6 months now after my knee surgery. it’s lightweight, which helps me a lot, but I wish the grips were a bit softer. they can be hard on my hands after extended use, especially when I’m out shopping for a couple of hours.

this toddler walker is super cute! my little one loves it and it seems pretty sturdy. the only issue is that the wheels are a bit too fast for him; he tends to go zooming across the floor which can be scary! would be great if the wheels had some sort of locking mechanism.

my parents bought this walker for my grandma. overall, it’s functional, but it feels a little flimsy sometimes. she’s a petite lady but it doesn't feel as stable as I hoped. however, the folding feature is great for travel!

the best part about this mobility aid is how adjustable it is. my sister and I are very different heights and it works for both of us. but the front wheels tend to wobble a bit when going over bumps. still, it really gets the job done for her!

I wish I could say I love this walker, but it's just okay. it definitely helps my 3-year-old with her balance, but it’s not as versatile as I thought. the toys on it seem to be more of a distraction than a help, and they’re not very engaging.

this rollator has made a world of difference for my dad. he can finally walk in the park again without feeling scared. that said, the seat could be a bit wider. he’s a big guy and it feels a little cramped when he takes a break.

finally getting my toddler to walk was a breeze with this walker! it's colorful and fun, but I found the assembly instructions a bit confusing. took me about 30 minutes to figure it out, but now he zooms around the house with it.

really impressed with this elderly walker! the wheels are smooth and it even has a cup holder! but I wish there were more color options. my mom would’ve loved a pretty pastel instead of just the standard black.

my son thinks this toddler walker is his new best friend! it’s sturdy, but the handle is quite high. my kiddo is only 12 months and still has to stretch a bit to reach it. he's figuring it out, but a lower setting would definitely help.

got this walker last month for my recovering husband. it’s great for indoor use, but I’m worried it’s not durable enough for outdoors. he’s about 6 feet tall and sometimes feels a bit cramped. still, it does the job mostly.

this mobility aid is good, but the features could be better. it has a nice basket, but it doesn’t close, so stuff can fall out easily. I appreciate that it’s lightweight, but I wish the grip handles were a little more comfortable.

I bought this for my grandma who has some mobility issues. the seat is a lifesaver! allows her to take breaks when she needs to. but the brakes are tricky; sometimes, they don’t lock fully, which can be scary for her.

my 2-year-old loves this walker! it helps him take his first steps, and the design is adorable. however, it’s a bit heavy for him to manage on his own, which is a bit frustrating for both of us. needs to be more toddler-friendly.

the rollator is spectacular for my dad! it gives him the stability he needs while walking. the only downside is that it’s a bit bulky for our small apartment. I have to fold it to get it through the door sometimes.

after trying a few toddler walkers, I settled on this one. it’s cute and functional, but the wheels aren’t very smooth. I have hardwood floors, and it struggles to glide easily. my son loves it though, so I guess it’s a win overall.

this walker has changed my life! well, my mom's life really. she’s been much more active since we got it. but one thing to note, the seat isn't as cushy as I’d like it to be, so she complains a bit after long outings.

this was a gift for my 85-year-old aunt. she likes it, but I feel like the brakes could be a bit more responsive. sometimes, she has to really pull on them for it to stop, which makes her nervous. overall, it's convenient though!

my son started walking with this walker at 10 months and he loves it! but it is a little heavy for me to carry around, especially when we go to grandma's house. works well on carpet, but not so much on tiles.

this elderly walker has a nice design and looks pretty modern compared to other options. but the assembly was a headache! I spent nearly an hour putting it together. it’s sturdy once set up, but I wish it had been easier to handle.

I really like the small foldable design of this walker! it fits well in my car. however, the wheel locks are a bit hard to engage, so sometimes it rolls away when I don’t want it to. just have to be extra careful.
my parents got this toddler walker for my son, but he’s not too interested in it. he prefers pushing furniture instead! it seems well-built, but I wish it were more engaging with toys or features.
this walker has been very helpful for my 77-year-old mother. she loves the basket for her purse! but I don’t think the seat is high enough. sometimes she feels like she’s too low when she sits down.

I decided to buy this rollator for my recovering neighbor. she says it helps her feel more secure. but on uneven surfaces, it’s not as stable as I hoped. still, she seems to manage okay with it in the mall.

the colorful design of this toddler walker caught my eye. my little one took to it immediately! but I’ve noticed the wheels are a bit too fast for him; he almost toppled over a few times. so, adult supervision is a must!

this walker is alright, but the seat could definitely use some better padding. my dad loves to take breaks, but after a while, he complains it hurts. overall though, it gets him around without too much trouble.

These slumber bags are perfect for my kids' sleepover! They love the fun designs and they're super warm. We used them for camping last month and they kept the kids cozy, even when it dipped to 50 degrees. My only complaint is that they can be a bit bulky to pack up.

We took these sleeping bags to a family camping trip, and they worked pretty well in cooler weather. I think they could use a little more insulation for colder nights. The kids had a blast, though, and the colors are vibrant!

I've gone through a few different sleeping bags for my 4-year-old, and this one is the best so far! The soft lining is a hit with her. Just wish the zipper was a bit smoother, sometimes it gets stuck on the fabric.

These slumber bags are great for indoor sleepovers. The kids love them and they can easily fit two kids for a slumber party. One thing that disappointed me was the stitching—it started to come undone after just a couple washes.
Got this for my son for his first camping trip, and while he absolutely loved it, I was worried about the size—it’s a bit short for a 7-year-old. But he stayed warm, so I guess it works for now!
I bought a couple of these for our camping gear, and they’re okay. They keep you warm, but I thought they would be more compact when rolled up. Just a bit bulky to carry around for hiking.

My daughter loves her slumber bag, especially the princess design! It’s lightweight, which is a plus for camping. However, I wish the material was a little thicker for better insulation—she felt a bit chilly during the night.
These sleeping bags are a decent choice for slumber parties. They’re colorful and fun, but I found that they don’t zip up easily. It's a pain when kids are trying to get in and out quickly!

I’ve had a positive experience with these slumber bags. They’re comfy and perfect for our backyard camp-outs. The only downside is that they don’t pack down very small, which makes storage a bit tricky.

I bought this for a camping trip with my 10-year-old, and it was perfect for her! The temperature rating was accurate, and she stayed comfortable. I just wish it didn’t take so long to dry after washing!
These slumber bags are cute but honestly, not the warmest. My son used one during a chilly night and he complained about being cold. They’re good for summer sleepovers, though!
Ordered two for my kids’ sleepover and they loved them! The fun designs kept them entertained. Only downside—I noticed some loose threads after the first wash. Keeping an eye on that!
I was super excited about these sleeping bags, but they didn’t meet my expectations. They’re more suitable for summer than for cold weather camping. We had to add extra blankets!
My son is very particular about his sleeping gear, and he actually likes this slumber bag! I like that it’s machine washable, but it's a little heavier than I expected.
Got this for our camping trip, and it did the job! The material is soft and the design is fun. One downside: the zippers feel kinda flimsy, so I’m not sure how long they will last.

These sleeping bags are brightly colored and my kids love them. They’re definitely cozy, but I would’ve loved more insulation. They’re fine for mild weather but not for cold nights. Great for slumber parties though!
My 5-year-old enjoys this sleeping bag a lot. It fits him well and looks cute. It’s a bit thin for camping, but for backyard use, it’s perfect! Just wish it had a pocket for small items.

These slumber bags are okay for indoor use, but I wouldn’t recommend for camping in cooler weather. They’re cute and affordable, but I found them lacking in warmth when we went to the mountains last weekend.
We took these to a family reunion, and my kids had the best time! They’re lightweight, but just warm enough for a cozy night. The only tricky part was rolling them back up—it’s a bit of a workout!
Nice sleeping bags, but they’re a touch narrow for my growing kids. They’re okay for kids under 8, but my 9-year-old was a bit squished. They look great, though!
These sleeping bags are fine for slumber parties but lacked warmth for our camping trip. My daughter shivered a bit at night, which was disappointing. They are stylish, but warmth is key for me!

I got this slumber bag for my toddler, and he’s obsessed! The design is adorable and he stays warm at night. I just wish the fabric was a little sturdier; it feels delicate and I’m worried about wear over time.
These sleeping bags are great but a little difficult to clean. They hold up well for sleepovers, but after washing, I noticed some fading on the bright colors. Still, they work well overall!

My kids have been using these slumber bags for their camping weekends, and they've held up nicely! They are lightweight but surprisingly warm. The only downside is the lack of storage pockets for little treasures.
We took these slumber bags for an outdoor adventure, and they were decent. They kept my kids warm enough but felt a little short for my 9-year-old. Overall, they had fun using them!

I bought this for my niece, and she adores it! The fun pattern makes her want to sleep in it every night. I just wish the zipper would work more smoothly—it gets stuck sometimes. But overall a good buy!

These slumber bags are absolutely adorable! My kids had a slumber party, and they were a hit. They kept them warm, but the fabric could be thicker for cooler nights. Just a bit too lightweight for camping.

this loose leaf green tea has a nice fresh flavor! i steep it for about 3 minutes and it’s perfect. however, the packaging is a bit tricky to reseal, so i’m worried about it getting stale. still, will buy again!

i’ve been trying different herbal teas for sleep, and this one is okay. the chamomile is soothing, but it doesn’t have the strong flavor i was hoping for. it's decent for the price, but not my favorite.

this black tea is great for mornings! i love the robust flavor and it wakes me up without being too bitter. but, it does stain my favorite mug, and i wish it brewed faster. worth trying if you love black tea!

this herbal blend didn’t wow me. the flavor was mild, and it felt like it needed more spices. i’ve had better blends before. but if you prefer something light, this might work for you, just not for me!

really enjoy this loose leaf tea collection. each blend has its own unique flavor, which is a fun surprise! my only issue is that the packaging can be messy when pouring. still, i’m sipping my way through it all!
the green tea here is refreshing but not as strong as i would like. i usually want a bit more punch. steeping it longer helps, but then it can get a bit bitter. still a nice drink though!
absolutely love this chai black tea! the spices are perfectly balanced, making a cozy drink. but, it can be a bit sweet, so i cut back on the sugar. perfect for chilly evenings!
the herbal tea was a letdown. i expected a deep, robust flavor, but it tasted pretty bland. however, it did settle my stomach after a big meal, so i might keep it for those occasions.
the loose leaf black tea is fantastic! rich flavor and smooth finish. but honestly, the bag it comes in is a bit annoying to keep closed. might invest in a tea tin to store it better.
this green tea has an amazing aroma and it's quite refreshing. but i do find that it doesn’t stay hot for long, which is a bummer during chilly mornings. overall, a decent buy!
the herbal tea had a nice citrusy kick but felt a little artificial to me. i wish the flavors were more natural. it's drinkable for sure, but wouldn't fill my cupboard with it.
i've been drinking this loose leaf pu-erh tea for a few weeks, and it's really unique! such an earthy flavor. just keep in mind that it takes a little getting used to compared to other teas.
this green tea is good, but not great. i initially loved the smooth taste, but after a few cups, it felt a bit too watery for my liking. i’ll drink it, but won’t be repurchasing.
so impressed with the variety in this herbal tea sampler! each one brings something new to the table. the only downside is that i can't decide which is my favorite!

i got this loose leaf tea for my sister, and she raved about it! the flavor is robust, and it’s perfect for iced tea, too. the only issue is the price. a bit pricey for my budget, but worth it for a treat!
the black tea was nice and strong in flavor, but it left a weird aftertaste. i was hoping for something smoother. i’ll finish the box but probably won’t buy again. just not my cup of tea!
this green tea is very smooth, which I love! but the packaging really needs improvement—it’s hard to pour without making a mess. overall, it’s worth trying if you enjoy subtle flavors.

the herbal tea blend was pretty relaxing, but not as flavorful as I expected. it served its purpose for winding down, but I found myself adding honey to boost the taste. maybe not the best choice for a tea lover.
this loose leaf tea has a great aroma, but it doesn’t pack as much flavor as I’d like. I tried steeping it longer, but then it became bitter. it’s a nice addition to my tea shelf, though!
the black tea is rich and flavorful, but honestly, it leaves stains everywhere! love the taste, but I’ve had to retire a couple of mugs because of it. just something to keep in mind!
really enjoyed this herbal blend! it’s perfect for relaxing after a long day. the downside is that it’s a bit pricey compared to other brands, but I guess you get what you pay for. would buy again!
this green tea has a mild flavor, and it’s not as refreshing as I hoped. it’s drinkable for sure but feels a bit bland. I like my green tea with a kick, but this one is too subtle for me.
I love this herbal tea for its calming effects! the taste is decent, but I’ve had better. it’s light and definitely relaxes me, just wish it had a bit more flavor to it. overall, still a good choice!
I was excited to try this loose leaf black tea, but it didn't meet my expectations. while the aroma is great, the taste was a bit flat for me. I might try experimenting with different steep times.
the green tea in this isn't bad but it isn’t anything special either. it’s not overly fragrant and tends to taste a bit weak. I can drink it, but I probably won't repurchase once this bag is gone.

the lip balm is super moisturizing and smells amazing! i love that it has SPF 15, which is perfect for my outdoor days. however, it does feel a bit greasy sometimes and doesn’t last as long as i’d like. still, overall a solid choice for dry lips!

i really loved this lipstick at first! the shade 'rose blush' was just perfect for everyday wear. but after a couple of hours, it started to dry out and feather around the edges. i wish it was a bit more long-lasting. still, the color is stunning!

absolutely obsessed with this lip gloss! it gives such a nice shine without being sticky, and the shade 'peachy keen' is a beautiful natural color. i do notice it wears off quickly, maybe after an hour, so i keep it in my bag for touch-ups throughout the day.

this lip liner has a nice creamy texture and glides on smoothly, which i love! but the color 'nude spice' is a bit darker than i expected. still, it pairs well with lighter lipsticks. just wish it had a little more staying power!

i got the tinted lip balm in 'berry burst' and it gives a nice wash of color. perfect for days when i don’t want a full lipstick look. however, it doesn’t last very long. i’d say about an hour before i needed to reapply.

the matte lipstick is such a gorgeous deep red! it looks so chic and perfect for nights out. i do find it a bit drying though, so i always put a moisturizing balm underneath. overall, beautiful color, just needs a little prep!

i wasn't sold on this lip treatment at first. it felt a bit too thick, but after a week, my lips have never felt softer! the vanilla scent is delicious too! just wish it came in a bigger size for the price.

this lip gloss has been my go-to for quick touch-ups. the 'sugar plum' shade is a lovely neutral that goes with everything! my only complaint is that it can be a little sticky, especially in humid weather.

for the price, this lip balm is great! it's super hydrating and keeps my lips plump. however, the packaging feels a bit cheap and i worry it might break easily. still, the product itself works wonders!

the liquid lipstick in 'mauve magic' is stunning and perfect for fall! it stays all day without needing reapplication, which is a plus. but, fair warning, it’s a little hard to remove at the end of the day. so keep your makeup remover handy!

ordered this lip liner hoping for a nice match to my favorite lipstick. 'pinky nude' is a pretty shade but it’s slightly too light for my liking. it does help keep my lipstick in place though, which is nice. might try a darker shade next time.
the lip scrub is surprisingly effective! it left my lips feeling super smooth after just one use. i wasn’t a fan of the taste, though. a different flavor would be nice. but hey, it does the job!

this tinted lip gloss is super shiny and makes my lips look fuller. the 'coral kiss' shade is bright and fun for summer! downside? it does wear off quickly so keep it on hand for reapplying throughout the day.

i tried this lipstick on a whim and i love the color 'berry crush.' it’s vibrant and fun! however, it can be super drying after a while, so definitely layer with a balm. still, the color payoff is fantastic!

the hydrating lip mask is a dream for my dry winter lips! i apply it before bed, and wake up with really soft lips. the only downside is that it can feel a bit sticky if too much is applied. just a thin layer works best!

i’ve been using this lip tint for about a month, and i love how natural it looks! 'rose petal' is a lovely shade for daily wear. it doesn’t last all day, but it's easy to refresh and feels lightweight.
the shimmer lip gloss in 'glitter bomb' is perfect for adding a pop to my everyday look! i just wish it didn’t feel so sticky. but hey, the shine is worth it for special occasions!

i was really excited about this lip oil. the flavor is delightful, but it feels a bit too slippery on my lips. i prefer something with more grip. it is hydrating though, so i might hang on to it for the winter season.

really impressed with the staying power of this matte liquid lipstick. 'cinnamon spice' is gorgeous! but be warned, it does take a while to dry completely and can feel a bit tight. still, worth it for the color!

this lip crayon in 'sunset peach' is a beautiful pop of color! it's easy to apply and lasts a decent amount of time. just wish it had a bit more pigment—layering it takes time, but the finish is lovely.

i love this tinted lip balm for everyday use! it gives just enough color without feeling heavy. 'lavender mist' is a beautiful shade. however, it doesn’t last too long, so it’s more of a quick pick-me-up than a long-term solution.

the lip liner is a decent product, but the 'chocolate brown' color is way darker in person. it works fine to keep my lipstick in place, but it’s not exactly what i was hoping for. i might try a different shade next time!

this lip balm is everything! it feels super nourishing and the 'coconut kiss' scent is blissful. one downside? it’s a little bulky, so it doesn’t fit well in my small purse. overall, very happy with the product.

the lipstick seems promising, but the color payoff isn’t as strong as i expected. 'plum delight' is pretty but more sheer than i would have liked. it’s nice for a light look, but not for a bold statement.

the lip scrub is super refreshing and does a great job at exfoliating. my lips felt really soft afterward! just be careful not to use too much or it can be a bit harsh. still, happy with the results overall.

this adjustable easel is just what my 6-year-old needed for her art projects! it’s sturdy enough to hold a canvas while still being lightweight. my only complaint is that it sometimes wobbles a little when she’s really going to town with her painting, but overall, a solid choice for budding little artists!

i bought this easel for my home studio and honestly, i love the size! it fits my canvases perfectly. the 5 adjustable heights are super handy for when my friends come over, but i do wish the assembly instructions were clearer. it took me a whole hour to figure it out!

great easel for my 8-year-old. she enjoys painting and this gives her a professional feel. it's sturdy and looks nice, but it takes a bit of force to change heights. we end up fighting over who gets to use it when friends come over—it’s a hit! a couple of the paint drips are tough to clean off though.

this easel is very well made and has a nice finish. i appreciate that it can hold both canvases and large sketch pads. however, it doesn’t fold down as compactly as i hoped. it’s a bit bulky to store, so keep that in mind if you're tight on space.

ordered this for my 10-year-old son who loves to draw and paint. it’s sturdy and adjusts well, but we’ve had issues with the clamp not holding his canvases tightly. still, he enjoys using it and it’s better than a basic table. wish they used better materials for the clamp, though.

this easel is an absolute lifesaver for my art classes! it’s adjustable which is fantastic because i have students of all heights. the only downside was it took a little longer to ship than expected, but i’m happy with the quality. wish it came with a paint palette holder!

just got this easel for my toddler’s painting sessions. it’s nice and lightweight, making it easy for me to move around. however, it's quite wobbly when she’s working on it. i think it will be perfect for her once she gets a bit older.

the design of this adjustable easel is perfect for my art corner! i love the height options but the assembly was a bit tricky. took me about 30 minutes to get it right! still, it’s super sturdy and holds my canvases well. great for the price.

this easel has been amazing for my kids’ art projects! i love that it can adjust as they grow, but it can tip over if they lean too hard on it. overall, it’s been fun watching them create, and it does its job well enough.

i bought this easel for my 5-year-old who is starting to show interest in painting. it’s bright and colorful which she loves! however, the base isn’t very stable, and she has knocked it over a couple of times. still, she enjoys using it!

this easel really enhances my small studio! the adjustable heights make it perfect for my taller canvases, but i wish the instructions were clearer for putting it together. took a bit of trial and error, but i’m happy with the final product!
great easel! it’s very portable, which is a huge plus for me since we often have art days in the park. the only downside is that it can be a little shaky if not placed on completely flat ground.

got this easel for my daughter’s birthday. she loves that it’s adjustable and she can use it standing or sitting. it’s good quality but the paint rack could use some improvement. it doesn’t hold the paint containers as securely as i’d like.

this easel works well enough for my needs. it's adjustable which is a nice feature, but i found it a bit cumbersome to switch heights. i use it for displaying my artwork at local fairs, and it holds up well in the wind! just wish it was easier to adjust.

i don't usually write reviews but this easel deserves one! it’s really sturdy and has been holding my 12x16 canvases perfectly. i love the height adjustment, but it does take some time to find the right spot. just a minor inconvenience for a solid product!

this easel is good for casual art sessions. my son loves it but sometimes it feels a bit wobbly with heavier canvases. also, the color options are limited. i wish there were more choices! still a decent purchase for kids.

happy with this easel overall! it was easy to assemble and fits my needs perfectly for sketching. however, the canvas holder could be better—sometimes it slips. still, for everyday use, it gets the job done nicely.

my daughter uses this for her art club, and it’s been a great addition! she loves the adjustability. we did have a bit of an issue with one of the legs being slightly uneven, but it hasn’t affected her painting experience too much. there’s definitely room for improvement.

i bought this easel for some weekend painting sessions. it fits my canvases well and is quite portable. however, i was a bit disappointed that it didn’t include a carrying case. also, the paint shelf could be designed better—it doesn’t hold smaller bottles very well.

this easel is super cute and perfect for my little artist! it does wobble a bit when she’s painting, which makes me nervous, but she loves using it. great for easy art cleanup too. just wish it came in more fun colors!

this easel is sturdy and has a nice canvas holder, but adjusting the height is tougher than expected. it feels like it needs a bit of muscle, which can be annoying when i want to switch it up quickly. overall, good for the price though!

love this easel! it works beautifully for my painting projects. the adjustable feature is a game changer for tall and short canvases. my only issue is that it took a bit to get delivered—was planning to use it for a specific event and arrived a week late.

bought this for my kids and they both enjoy it. it’s easy to adjust, but the stability has been a concern at times. they can paint together without getting in each other's way, so that’s a win! still, some design tweaks could boost its sturdiness.

this easel is an essential in my home studio. the adjustable heights are perfect for my different projects. only drawback? the painting surface tends to get scratched easily. definitely wish they used more durable materials.

my niece loves this easel! it's easy to move around and sets up quickly. wish the leg locks were a bit more secure though; sometimes it slips while she's painting. overall, a fun tool for her creative side!

this easel has been a great addition to my craft room! i can display my work comfortably at different heights, but the assembly was tougher than expected. only took me about 40 minutes but felt like a puzzle! still a great product.

this barbecue sauce is really rich and flavorful! it has a nice smoky taste that goes perfectly with ribs. however, it’s a bit on the sweet side, so if you prefer a tangy flavor, you might want to look elsewhere.

absolutely love this hot sauce! it has just the right amount of heat without overpowering the food. I’ve been using it on everything from tacos to scrambled eggs. only downside is the bottle is a little small for the price, but I guess good things come in small packages!

the salsa has a fresh taste, but i expected it to be chunkier. it’s more like a mild sauce than a chunky salsa, which was a bit disappointing for my nacho night. i’ll finish it but probably won’t buy again.

this teriyaki marinade is a lifesaver for busy weeknights! it makes chicken taste amazing, just marinate for about 30 minutes. my only issue is that it’s a bit salty, so i sometimes dilute it with a bit of water before using.
got this hot sauce on a whim. wow, is it spicy! i love the flavor but i need to be careful not to overdo it. also, the bottle leaks a bit when pouring, which is annoying.

the flavor of this barbecue sauce is fantastic! I used it for grilling burgers and they turned out juicy and delicious. the only downside is the consistency; it’s a bit runny compared to my go-to sauces.
i’ve tried many salsas, and this one is good but not great. it’s a bit too mild for my taste. on the plus side, it’s perfect for kids since it doesn’t have much kick!

this Carolina-style barbecue sauce is amazing on pulled pork. I used it for a family cookout and everyone loved it. the only downside was the bottle cap was hard to open. had to use a knife to pry it off.
the mango habanero salsa is a fun twist! I love the fruity kick. it adds a unique flavor to grilled shrimp. just wish it had chunks of mango instead of just puree.
i was excited to try this garlic hot sauce, but it ended up being way too garlicky for me. my husband loved it, though! if you’re a garlic fan, you might definitely enjoy it.
this marinade is super easy to use and works great with tofu! just let it sit for an hour and grill away. my only complaint is that it has a bit too much sugar in it.
the salsa verde is fantastic! I used it in my enchiladas, and it added a nice zing. had a bit of trouble finding it in the store, though, so glad i ordered it online.
i’ve been on the hunt for a good chipotle barbecue sauce, and this one hit the spot, even gave my ribs a nice smoky flavor. just wish it came in a bigger bottle for the price.
this hot sauce has a great balance of heat and flavor! it’s perfect for putting on pizza or in soups. the only issue is that the bottle is smaller than expected, so I run through it quickly.

i don’t usually like mustard-based sauces, but this one surprised me! it’s tangy and sweet, perfect for dipping chicken nuggets. downside is the cap can be tricky to squeeze just the right amount out.
the sweet chili sauce is a great dipping sauce! I love using it with egg rolls. however, be cautious because it can be quite sugary, which might not appeal to everyone.
just tried this Korean barbecue sauce, and it was a game changer for my stir-frys! super flavorful. the only downside is I wish it had a bit more spice to it, it’s quite mild overall.
the packaging for this hot sauce is adorable, but the flavor didn’t deliver for me. it was a bit too vinegary. my friends liked it, so maybe it’s just my taste buds.
the garlic-based marinade really brings out the flavor in chicken! I let it sit overnight and it was magic on the grill. could use a touch more herbs, though. overall, really good!
this roasted garlic salsa is okay. it has a nice roasted flavor, but I found it to be too watery and didn't stick to the chips well. I’ll probably finish the jar but won’t repurchase.
i love the versatility of this teriyaki sauce! I used it on chicken and veggies for stir-fry night, and it was a hit. my only issue is it’s a bit too sweet for my liking.
this smoky barbecue sauce is fantastic on brisket! it gives the meat a great depth of flavor. however, i found it too thick for dipping, which is a bit disappointing.
i was excited about this spicy salsa, but it's not as spicy as i hoped. great texture and fresh taste, though. I’ll probably add some jalapeños to kick it up a notch next time.
this ranch dip is super creamy and perfect for veggies! I usually don’t like ranch, but this one is different. the only downside? it’s a bit pricey for the small container you get.

the teriyaki glaze is sweet and savory, perfect for grilling chicken. just wish it didn’t have so much sugar in it. I’d like to find something healthier, but it still works well for my barbecue parties!
the chipotle salsa is decent. I was expecting a stronger smokiness, but it’s more on the mild side. I still enjoyed it on tacos, but it didn’t wow me enough to buy it again.
this jalapeño hot sauce has a nice kick to it! I use it in soups and tacos. the only downside is that it could use a bit more flavor, it's mostly heat. overall, good but not the best.

picked this up for my son’s collection and he’s obsessed! the attention to detail is amazing, especially the metal body which really gives it a premium feel. it rolls smoothly and can take a bit of a beating. but the remote control range is not great, only about 15 feet before it starts acting up.

as an adult collector, I appreciate the craftsmanship of this die cast model. it looks just like the real thing and has a good weight to it, which is rare for remote control cars. however, the battery life is just over an hour, which feels a bit short for the price, around $50.

my little brother loves this car! it’s small and easy for his tiny hands to maneuver. I love that it’s metal, not plastic, which makes it feel more durable. but the remote is a bit confusing with too many buttons – he often accidentally flips it when he's just trying to go forward.

this die cast vehicle is a beauty! the paint job is flawless and it looks stunning on my shelf. however, while it says it’s remote control, the control feels a bit clunky and doesn’t have the best response time, so keep that in mind if you’re buying it for racing.

got this for my daughter's birthday and she absolutely adores it. she carries it around everywhere. the detailing is incredible and it feels sturdy. the only downside? it doesn’t really handle rough terrain well - we learned that the hard way in our backyard!

I ordered this thinking it would be fun for my 5-year-old, but it’s more of a display piece for me! the detailing is on point and the metal body is heavy. the remote is easy to use, but it's not as fast as I expected. it’s perfect for slow races indoors.

love the vintage look of this model car! it definitely stands out in my collection. the weight feels solid, and it performs decently with the remote. my only gripe is that it doesn’t turn very sharp, so tight corners can be a challenge.

this little racer is cute but has its flaws. while it looks great sitting on my shelf, the functionality is lacking. the remote doesn't have a great range, and I noticed it struggles on carpet, which was disappointing for what I paid.

as a die-cast model lover, I was excited to get this one. it looks slick and it’s a sturdy piece. the remote control works fine, but I wish it had a rechargeable battery instead of disposables. I feel like I’m always buying new batteries for it!

my son has been playing with this for a couple of months now, and while he loves it, I can see it’s starting to wear. the wheels have some scuff marks and the remote sometimes lags. still, he enjoys zooming it around the living room!

this model car caught my eye for its sleek design and quality material. it rolls smoothly and my kids love that it’s metal rather than plastic. however, I was a bit disappointed that it only has a simple on/off function – I was hoping for more tricks!
