However, my neighbor did mention that they look a little bulky. Not a dealbreaker for me, but something to consider.

Got this weatherstripping about a month ago to help keep my two pups from pushing their way through the door. It sticks well and really helps with drafts, but I noticed it started peeling a bit after 2 weeks. I think a stronger adhesive would make this perfect. It does its job, just wish it lasted longer.

The thresholds I got are solid and really keep the mud from coming in, especially after rain. But, the metal edge has a sharp finish that I had to sand down because my dog got a little too curious and nicked a paw. Overall, practical but needs some refinement on the edges.

I have a 5-year-old rescue dog who loves to scratch at doors. This door lock was a total lifesaver! It was easy to install (less than 30 minutes) and so far, no more scratched doors. However, the key mechanism feels a bit flimsy, so I hope it holds up over time.

After three months of using this dog door lock, I can say it's pretty reliable! My lab hasn’t figured it out, which is a plus. But the installation instructions were confusing, and I ended up doing it twice. Still, it’s a great addition to keep my pup secure.

I bought the dog-proof hinges expecting an easy install, but I struggled a bit. Once they were on, they did the trick, but they are squeaky! A little grease helped, but I wish it came pre-lubricated. It's been about 2 weeks, and I hope they’ll quiet down with time.

This weatherstripping is a mixed bag. It did seal my door well and keeps my house warm, but I had to replace it after a month because it started to come off! Maybe if the adhesive was stronger, it would be perfect. For now, I’ll stick with it because it does reduce drafts.

These thresholds look great and fit well! They keep my dog's mess contained. However, I noticed they scratch easily, which is disappointing considering the price point. I’ve had them for about a month, and I’m already seeing some wear. Still functional, though!

I’m on my second order of these locks! They’re super secure and my 6-month-old puppy hasn’t managed to break through yet. Installation was straightforward, but I really wish they had a more stylish design. They work well, just not the most aesthetic choice.

Overall, the dog door hinges are decent. They were easy to install and have held up over the past few weeks, but I do find them a little clunky. My dog has learned to be cautious around them, which is good. Just wish they were more streamlined!

I installed these weatherstrips last month, and they really do help with outside noise and keeping the heat in. My only complaint is that the adhesive could be much stronger; they started lifting at one corner. I’ll give them another shot, though, hoping for better longevity.

Had mixed feelings about this dog lock. It works, but I found the key hard to turn sometimes. After about a month, it’s getting easier, so maybe it needs some wear-in time. I appreciate the security, just hope it lasts a while longer.

The thresholds are great for keeping dog hair under control! I love that they prevent dirt from coming in. However, the installation was a pain, and I ended up needing extra tools. If they made it easier to put together, I’d give it a solid five stars.

I really wanted to love this weatherstripping because it looked promising. It did work for about a week, but it started to peel after a few days. Now I’m left reapplying it every week! It’s frustrating, but when it works, it works!

This dog-proof lock is a little pricey, but I think it's worth it for the peace of mind. My German Shepherd hasn’t figured it out yet, which is golden! It took me a while to install, though. A step-by-step guide would have been helpful.

I was excited about these hinges, but sadly, they started rusting within a month. I live in a wet area, so maybe that’s part of it. They work fine otherwise, just wish they had a weather-resistant option!

I bought these thresholds to match a new door, and they look fantastic! But sadly, they’re not super durable. My dog scratched one side, and now there’s a noticeable dent. I might look for something more robust next time.

Just installed this lock a few weeks ago. My pup hasn’t managed to get through it yet! It's thick and sturdy. My only issue is that the keyhole is a bit too deep, making it hard to unlock sometimes. Still a good buy overall!

These door hinges were an excellent purchase. No more scratching, but I did have some issues aligning them during install. Took me about an hour. They seem sturdy, but I’ll keep an eye on them for rusting. Overall, happy with the switch.

I’ve been using this weatherstrip for about a month. It does help with keeping the draft out, but I found that it started to lift on one end. I had to reapply it, which was a hassle. It’s decent, but could be improved.

These locks are a lifesaver for keeping my dog contained! It took a bit to get used to the mechanism, but now it’s second nature. I just wish the finish didn’t scratch so easily; I’ve got a few scuffs already.

The thresholds are doing a great job at keeping dirt at bay! However, they were a bit tricky to install. I would’ve appreciated clearer instructions. Once they’re on, they’re solid and look sharp, so I guess it’s worth the effort!

I’m on the fence about the dog-proof hinges. They do their job of keeping the door intact, but are a bit noisy when opening. Installation took longer than expected. If you can deal with some noise, they’d be fine for you!
These locks are so secure! I’ve had them on my back door for a couple of weeks now, and it’s a game changer. However, the key can get stuck in the lock occasionally. Just be careful when turning it.

I really like the look of these thresholds! They complement my door perfectly. However, they scratched pretty easily when my dog ran through. I wish they were made with more durable material; otherwise, they’re great at keeping the mess contained!

this extra virgin olive oil is my go-to for everything. been using it for about 6 months now, and it adds such a rich flavor to my salads and marinades. the price is decent too, under $20 for a liter. but honestly, i kind of wish it had a pour spout – it can get a bit messy with just the open top.

coconut oil has become a staple in my kitchen! i use it for frying, baking, and even on my skin occasionally. i love that it's versatile. however, i noticed this brand solidifies pretty quickly at room temperature, which can be annoying. maybe i just need a better way to store it.

i really wanted to love this essential oil blend, but it didn't smell as strong as i expected. i diffused it in my living room, and while it did create a nice ambiance, it faded pretty fast. for the price i paid, i thought it would have a bit more oomph. maybe i’ll try a different brand next time.

this olive oil is amazing for drizzling over veggies before roasting! it’s rich and flavorful, and my friends always ask what I use. bought it for under $15, which is pretty reasonable. just be careful not to use too much, or it can get a bit overpowering.

wasn't sure what to expect from this cooking oil. it’s not your regular vegetable oil, that’s for sure! i tried it for sautéing and it worked well, but i didn’t notice a huge difference in taste. it’s nice, but i’m still debating if it’s worth the extra cost compared to what i normally buy.

love this coconut oil for my hair! been using it for about 4 weeks as a deep conditioner, and it leaves my hair so soft. downside is that it can feel a bit greasy if I use too much, but a little goes a long way. it’s also nice that it’s organic!

okay, so this olive oil has a great flavor, but the bottle design is super awkward. it doesn’t pour well, and I end up spilling it sometimes. the taste is solid for sure, but I wish they’d rethink the packaging. paid around $18 for the bottle, which feels a bit steep for the annoyance.

this essential oil is nice for relaxation, but I wish it had a stronger scent throw. used it in my diffuser, and while it smells good, it doesn’t last very long. for the price, I kind of expected a little more. still, I like the vibe it brings to the room.

purchased this extra virgin olive oil after reading so many good reviews. it’s a solid choice! I love using it for dressings and dipping bread. only downside is that it doesn’t come with a spout, which makes pouring a bit tricky. but overall, decent for around $17.

so I bought this coconut oil for both cooking and body use. while it’s fantastic in the kitchen, I find it’s a bit too heavy for my skin. it leaves a greasy feeling that I’m not super fond of. might stick to using it just for cooking from now on.

this extra virgin olive oil is a total winner! I drizzled it on pasta, and wow, what a difference. my family noticed and even asked for the recipe! just wish it came in a bigger bottle for the price – about $25 for a liter feels a bit small for my cooking needs.

wasn't thrilled with this essential oil. I bought it because it said '100% pure,' but honestly, the smell is pretty weak. I’ve had better luck with others at a lower price point. I guess I expected more for about $25, but it didn’t wow me.

this cooking oil is great for high-heat frying! I’ve used it for stir-fries, and everything turns out crispy and delicious. the only downside is the taste is a bit bland. I was hoping for more flavor, especially while using it in dressings.

just started using this olive oil for my daily cooking routine. I love how it enhances the flavor of my dishes. the downside? I think it’s slightly overpriced for a regular-sized bottle. paid $22, which seems a bit much compared to some other brands.

this coconut oil is my new favorite thing! I’ve used it for baking, cooking, and even as a moisturizer. the only downside is it solidifies quickly, which can be a hassle. overall, though, it’s a solid choice and I love the taste!

i bought this essential oil for relaxation benefits. it does smell nice, but I was a bit disappointed with how quickly it dissipates. after about an hour, I couldn’t smell it at all. might not purchase again since it didn’t live up to the hype.

this olive oil is good for dipping and drizzling! I love using it in vinaigrettes. however, the bottle design is a bit awkward, and I always end up pouring more than I need. for the price of about $20, I'd expect better packaging.

the coconut oil is decent, but I wasn’t a fan of the flavor it added to my scrambled eggs. I thought it might be a good alternative to butter, but it just didn’t work for me. I’ll stick to using it in baking, where it shines!

I use this essential oil blend for my yoga sessions. while it’s pleasant, I wish it had a stronger aroma when diffusing. it’s nice and calming, but I find myself adding a lot just to get a good scent going. the price is fair, though, about $18.

this extra virgin olive oil is really nice! I love the fruity notes it brings to my salads. paid under $20, which feels worth it. my only complaint is that the bottle is a bit slippery when I’m pouring, so I’ve had a couple of close calls spilling it everywhere.

got this cooking oil to try something new. it works great for roasting veggies! however, I didn’t find it particularly special compared to other oils I’ve used. it’s okay, but I might go back to my regular brand next time.

this coconut oil is great for baking! made some cookies, and they turned out wonderfully. my only issue is it has a slight coconut taste, which some people might not like. overall, a good product, just be mindful if you're not a fan of that flavor.

this essential oil is nice for relaxation, but it doesn’t last as long as I'd hope. I expected more for the price I paid (around $22), but it does provide a calming effect while it lasts. might try a different blend next time.

I enjoy this olive oil in my cooking, it adds a unique flavor to my dishes. it’s around $19, which isn’t bad, but the bottle design could definitely be better. sometimes I find myself spilling it when I’m trying to pour.

i bought this coconut oil primarily for my hair and it’s fantastic! leaves it shiny and manageable. however, as a cooking oil, it’s not my favorite. it gives a strong coconut flavor that doesn’t work in all recipes. i’ll stick to using it for beauty purposes mainly.

this essential oil is okay but not amazing. it does help with relaxation, but the scent isn't very strong in the diffuser. after using it a few times, I think I'll explore other brands. for what I paid, I expected a bit more depth.
this extra virgin olive oil has a gorgeous flavor! I love it on my bruschetta. the only drawback is the price; I spent about $24, which feels high, but I guess you get what you pay for in quality.

These poker cards are decent! The finish is smooth and makes shuffling really easy. I’ve had them for about a month now, and they still look new. My friends and I play weekly, but I wish the cards had a bit more grip because they tend to slide around a little when dealing.

Just got these bridge decks for a family game night, and they are beautiful! The design is classy and feels nice in hand. The only downside is that they seem a bit too thin compared to my old decks, which makes me nervous about their longevity. Fingers crossed they last!

I was looking for an affordable set of playing cards for my kids and these fit the bill. They are bright and colorful, which kept my 6-year-old entertained while learning to play Go Fish. However, they feel a bit flimsy, and one corner already got bent within the first week. Still, they’re fun!

Picked up these cards for doing magic tricks, and they’re great for that! The deck shuffles nicely and has a good weight to it. I just wish they had a unique design instead of standard ones. Seems like everyone uses these for tricks, so they’re not super original.

These are solid cards, but they're not perfect. I love the larger numbers and letters, which make them easy to read, especially for my parents. However, I noticed that some of the cards had tiny scratches right out of the box. Overall, they work well for our casual game nights, though.

I ordered these for my regular poker nights, and they’ve been a hit! They feel really high-quality and durable. After a few weeks of heavy use, they’re still in great shape. The only downside is that they don’t come with a box, so I had to find something to store them in. Minor inconvenience, but overall a win!

These cards were decent for playing solitaire, but I was hoping for something a bit more premium. They shuffle alright, but the print quality is lower than I expected. The colors are slightly off, which can be distracting. They’re fine for casual play but not for serious card enthusiasts.

I’ve had these cards for a couple of months now, and they’re holding up well. Good for bridge and poker games alike! But, I do notice that the edges are starting to fray a little. Not too bad yet, but I wonder how long they’ll last before needing a replacement.

Just received these poker cards for my monthly game group, and they’re nice! Great texture for shuffling, and they feel pretty sturdy. The only thing is the design could be a little less generic. They get the job done, but they’re just basic cards, you know?

These cards are pretty fun! I bought them for practicing some magic tricks and they do the job. They slide nicely and aren’t so slippery that I lose control. That said, the artwork could definitely use a refresh because it feels a bit dated. Still, I’m happy with my purchase!

I'm always looking for quality playing cards and I decided to try these. They're good for poker nights, but I did notice the color on some cards is a little faded compared to others. It doesn't ruin the experience, but it makes me question their quality control. Overall, decent but could be better!

These cards are okay but nothing to write home about. They work for games like bridge and can handle some shuffling. After a few games, I noticed some cards looked slightly worn. For the price, they’re fair, but I wouldn’t use them for serious play.

Love these cards for my kiddo's learning games. The designs are bright and fun! They’re a bit thicker than I expected, which is good for tiny hands. A couple of cards arrived with minor scratches, but nothing that affects gameplay. Definitely a solid choice for family fun!

I bought these for a poker night, but I wasn't super impressed. They feel a bit cheap, and the ink on some cards was already smudged when I opened them. They work okay for casual play, but I wouldn’t trust them for serious games. I’ll be shopping for something sturdier next time.

Had these cards for a while now, and they’re great for casual play! The finish is nice, and it definitely helps with shuffling. My friends liked them, too! The only issue is they started to show some wear after a couple of months, so I might look for something more durable next time.

These cards were a fun addition to our family game nights! They have a nice feel and look, which made playing a bit more exciting. However, I wish they came with a storage box because it’s tough keeping them organized. Overall, worth the price for casual gaming!

Just received these decks for some magic tricks I’m learning, and they’re not as great as I hoped. They shuffle well, but the edges are a little rough, making them less smooth for quick tricks. I’m still practicing, so they’ll do for now, but I’m on the lookout for something better.

I bought these for a poker tournament with friends, and they worked just fine! The cards were durable and held up well through several games. Alas, the designs are pretty standard, which is a tad disappointing. I prefer something with a bit more flair, but they get the job done!

I’ve been using these cards for over a month now, and they’re pretty decent. The coloring is vibrant, and the cards are thick enough to handle without feeling flimsy. That said, a couple of them were slightly warped. They still work alright, just not the best I’ve owned.

These playing cards are cute! I got them for my kids to play games, and they love the colors and designs. They don’t feel super sturdy, but for the price, they’re perfect for casual play. Just need to be careful not to bend them too much. Overall, a nice little set!

I picked up these cards for some poker fun with friends and they do the trick. They're sturdy and handle well, but I found the printed design to be a bit bland. I enjoy playing with them, but I think I’ll search for something with a little more personality next time.

Sweet deck for playing family games, but I wish they came with a carrying case! After a few weeks, I noticed some wear on the corners, which makes me worry about how long they'll last. They’re fun to use, just not the most practical for taking on the go.

These cards have been really fun for our family game nights! Smooth to shuffle and easy to read, which is a plus for my grandparents. However, I noticed that some of them seem to get marked easily, which is unfortunate because they’re not even old yet. Still a good buy overall!

I got these to replace an old set, but honestly, they're just average. They shuffle okay but feel a bit cheap in terms of quality. I guess for the price, it’s fine, but I think I’ll be looking for a more durable option next time around.

These cards are perfect for magic tricks! They have a nice glide and allow for smooth handling. However, after a week of practice, some of the edges started to show wear. I wish they were a bit more robust, but they’ve served their purpose well enough for now.

These bridge decks are lovely! Great design and color, and they shuffle really well. Only downside is they don't come with a box, so I had to improvise with a rubber band. Still, they’re quite enjoyable for casual games at home with friends!

this fudge is super creamy and rich! the chocolate flavor is deep, and it melts in your mouth. i love enjoying a piece after dinner. however, it can be a bit sweet for me, so i can only eat a small bit at a time. it's a nice treat, just not an every day snack for me.

absolutely divine! I shared this fudge with my family during movie night, and it was a hit. the texture is smooth and indulgent, but maybe just a tad too sweet for my taste. I appreciate the quality ingredients, which make it stand out from regular chocolate bars.

got this fudge as a gift and was pleasantly surprised! it’s not your typical candy bar; the richness is on another level. I do wish there were more variety in flavors. the classic chocolate is fantastic, but I’m curious to try something like peanut butter or caramel next time.

the first bite was bliss! it’s so creamy and has that melt-in-your-mouth feel. however, the packaging could be better. it came in a cardboard box that's not re-sealable, so it dries out faster than I expected. I wish I could keep it fresh for longer!

my kids are obsessed with this fudge! it’s creamy and decadent, but I have to monitor how much they eat because it’s really rich. I do wish it was a bit less sweet so I don’t have to worry about sugar highs after they indulge.

delicious fudge! had it at a party and was instantly hooked. it pairs perfectly with coffee, making it a great afternoon treat. a slight downside is that it’s quite pricey for the amount you get—around $15 for a small box. still, I’ll be buying again!

this fudge has an amazing texture, super soft and easy to chew! not like those hard, crumbly types you sometimes get. though, I found it a bit too sweet for my palate. I'd like to see a version with less sugar since I adore the flavor profile otherwise.

I love that this fudge uses quality ingredients—it makes such a difference! it's full of flavor and super creamy. I did have some issues with it melting a bit in warm weather, though. make sure to keep it cool if you plan on enjoying outdoors!

wow, this fudge is a serious treat! the chocolate is rich but not overpowering. however, the size of the portions could be bigger for the price; I feel like I blink and it’s gone! I guess it’s a positive that it’s indulgent, just wish there was more!

the fudge is good and satisfies that sweet tooth! it's so creamy, but I found it a little too rich for my tastes. sometimes I want a little more of a crunch or different texture. a nutty version would be awesome for a bit of variety!

this fudge was a hit at my holiday party! everyone loved it and couldn’t believe how rich and creamy it was. just a bit pricey for the quantity you get—about $20 for a small box—but definitely a conversation starter on the dessert table.

creamy and delectable! I really enjoy the texture of this fudge, but it tends to melt easily, which is a bummer. i had some leftovers in my bag and they turned into a gooey mess. aside from that, the flavor is on point!

I bought this fudge thinking it would be a nice treat, and wow, it did not disappoint! it’s rich and indulgent. my only complaint is that the chocolate flavor overpowers the other flavors they offer. I’d love to taste more variety! overall, still a good buy.

decadent fudge! it’s so creamy it feels like a special dessert. however, the sugar content is quite high, so it’s not something I can have on a regular basis. I’m trying to be mindful of my sugar intake, but I can’t resist sneaking a piece occasionally.

this fudge has become my guilty pleasure! I love how it melts in your mouth. just wish there were a way to get a bulk discount; I find myself going through it too quickly for the price tag. great flavor, though!

so creamy, such a treat! we enjoyed this fudge during family game night, and it was a huge hit. only downside was the small size of the package for the price—about $10 for a handful of pieces. I wish it lasted longer!

I had high hopes, but this fudge was too sweet for me. the creamy texture is fantastic, but I found myself wishing for something with a bit more complexity. if you LOVE sugar, you’ll probably love it! just not for me.

this fudge is a guilty pleasure I can get behind! it’s so rich and indulgent. I appreciate the handcrafted feel. that said, the sweetness might make it hard for some to finish a whole piece. I usually cut it in half!

I can’t believe how creamy this fudge is! it’s perfect for satisfying my sweet tooth, but wow is it rich. I’d recommend sharing it with someone to truly enjoy the experience. packaging could improve; it’s a bit flimsy.

had to try this fudge after hearing so many rave reviews. while it’s definitely indulgent and creamy, I found it a bit too sweet for my taste. I prefer a more balanced flavor, but the rich chocolate lovers will surely love it!
this fudge is an indulgent treat that always satisfies my chocolate cravings. it’s smooth and rich. however, it can be a bit cloying if you have more than a few pieces in one go. moderation is key!
the fudge's flavor is absolutely divine, but I did notice it got crumbly after a few days. might need to adjust how I store it. this fudge is best enjoyed fresh within the first week!

it’s creamy and rich—just as promised! my friends loved it, but I should have bought more. they disappeared too fast! wish they offered a tasting pack to sample different flavors without committing to a whole box.

the fudge is rich and creamy, definitely a treat. it has a smooth texture that I love, but the portion size leaves a bit to be desired. for around $12, I expected a bit more than what I got. might try again if there’s a sale!

just like your grandma used to make! this fudge has an incredible homemade feel to it. the only con is that it can be a bit sweet for my palate. still, it’s a delightful little indulgence when you're in the mood for something special.

the plush toy set is super cute! my 18-month-old loves the colorful animals. they’re soft and easy for her to grip, but they do have a slight smell when you first unpack them. it faded after a couple of days, though. overall, great for snuggling and imaginative play!

bought this pretend play set for my 3 year old, and it's been a hit! she loves the food items, especially the pretend pizza. however, the wooden pieces can be a bit rough around the edges. still, it's held up well and encourages her to be creative!

the vehicle toy set is just okay. while my 2-year-old loves zooming the cars around, some of them are a bit too small and can be a choking hazard. they drive nice on our play mat, but I wish they were a bit larger.

my 4-year-old is obsessed with building block sets, and this one has kept him entertained for hours! the blocks fit together well, but the colors are a bit muted for my taste. he loves creating his own designs, though, so it’s still a win!

just got the plush toy set, and my baby girl can't stop hugging them! they’re a perfect size for her tiny hands. one downside is they attract lint easily, but they wash well. they’re definitely a delightful addition to her toy collection!

the pretend play set comes with so many pieces that my 5-year-old can play with his friends! I love the variety, but some items are really small and hard to keep track of. makes a mess, but he enjoys setting up his ‘restaurant’!

the vehicle toy set has some great options, but I was disappointed to find that the wheels on a couple of cars don't roll well. my son still loves pushing them around, but it could have been better. for the price, I expected more!

got this plush toy set as a gift for my niece's 2nd birthday. she adores the bunny and giraffe! they are super soft and perfect for cuddling, but I wish they had some sort of sound feature. still, the quality is great!

my toddler has been playing with the building block set for weeks now, and it really sparks his creativity! the blocks snap together easily, but I wish they had more visual variety. overall, a great toy for developing fine motor skills!

the pretend play set is nice, but I found some pieces were too small for my little one, which makes me nervous. he loves the stove and food items, but a few more bigger pieces would be helpful. it’s fun for him, though!

the vehicle toy set looked great online, but when it arrived, I found a few of the cars to be poorly painted. my son still enjoys them, but I’m a bit bummed about the quality control. they’re fun to play with regardless!

my daughter just loves this plush toy set! the variety of animals keeps her engaged. I do worry about how easy it is for her to pull off the eyes on some of them, but overall, they are great companions for her!

the building block set is fun for my 3-year-old, but it’s missing some key pieces that would allow for bigger structures. he still manages to create cool things, but a few more blocks would make a huge difference!

the pretend play set is colorful and fun, but honestly some parts are a bit flimsy. my daughter loves to mix and match, but a couple of the toys broke after just a week. still, she enjoys it, so I can’t complain too much!

the plush toy animals are a huge hit with my 2-year-old! they are well-made and durable. however, they do shed a little after washing. I expected that would happen, but it's manageable. overall, they’re adorable and soft.

the vehicle toy set was a hit at our house! my son loves seeing the different types of vehicles, but I was a bit disappointed with the size. some cars are just too tiny for his big hands. still, he enjoys playing with them.

the building block set has been a great investment! my 4-year-old spends hours building different towers. one downside is the storage bag isn't very sturdy and ripped after a few uses. but overall, it’s a solid purchase!

the plush toy set is really cute, but I was surprised at how small they were when they arrived. my little one loves them, but I was expecting something a bit bigger. they do fit well in her crib, though!

bought this vehicle toy set for my nephew’s birthday, and he went crazy for it! the different types of vehicles are great for pretend play, but they do feel a bit cheap. still, for the price, it was a good buy!

my toddler enjoys this building block set, but some blocks don't fit together as well as I hoped. he still plays with it daily, but it could use better quality control. he finds ways to make it work, though!

the pretend play set is super fun! my daughter can spend hours pretending to cook. I do wish some pieces were a bit sturdier; one of the plates broke on the first day. despite that, she still enjoys it!

the plush toy set is adorable and feels nice, but my 3-year-old quickly lost interest. they are great for cuddling, but I wish they had more interactive features! still, they are a nice addition to her toy shelf.

my son loves the vehicle toy set, especially the fire truck! he plays with it every day. however, the paint started chipping off some vehicles after a week. it’s kind of frustrating, but he enjoys them nonetheless.

the building block set is pretty decent for my daughter. she loves the variety, but some blocks are oddly shaped and don’t connect well. she's creative, so she makes it work, but it would be nice if they fit better!

the pretend play set is full of fun items for my little chef! she enjoys all the pieces, but I was underwhelmed with the quality. several items fell apart quickly, which was a bummer. she still loves it, though!

my baby loves the plush toy set! they're super cuddly, but some are a bit flat and not as plush as I expected. they clean up well but could be a little more durable. she still enjoys playing with them, so that's a plus!

this maple syrup is really good! it’s thick and has that perfect rich flavor. we use it on pancakes and waffles every weekend. only downside is it’s a bit pricey at about $12 for a small bottle, but worth it for that authentic taste.

honestly, the fruit syrup was a bit of a letdown. it’s sweet, sure, but tastes artificial to me. maybe it’s good for kids, but I prefer my syrups a little more natural. not sure if I'll buy it again, especially since it’s around $8.

this honey syrup surprised me! I love the idea of using it in my coffee instead of sugar. it’s super smooth and adds this nice floral note. just wish it came in a bigger bottle, I ran out too quickly after about a month of use.

love the flavor of this pancake syrup! it’s nice that it’s made with real maple, but I wish it didn’t have added sugars. it’s perfect for my Sunday brunches but makes my health-conscious friends raise their eyebrows. about $10, which feels just right.

I tried this organic maple syrup based on a friend’s recommendation and wow, what a difference! smooth texture and not too sweet. I’ve used it in baking and on ice cream. only issue is the price, around $15. can’t justify that for everyday use.

fruit syrup is a nice touch for pancakes. really adds a unique flavor! but it’s super sweet. I might mix it with regular maple syrup next time to tone it down. $6 isn’t too bad though for a bottle that lasted us a month.

the pancake syrup has this weird aftertaste that I can't quite place. it’s not bad enough to throw it out, but I probably won’t buy it again. paid around $9 for it, which feels steep for something that's just okay.

this maple syrup is my go-to for everything brunch! I love it on pancakes and in oatmeal. it’s super thick and delicious. downside – the price at about $20 for a large bottle, but I justify it by how much we use it!

got this honey syrup to try something new. it’s very sticky and sweet, which is nice. I loved it in tea and on yogurt! just wish it didn't have that weird artificial taste mixed in. overall, okay for $8.

I was excited to try this fruit syrup for pancakes but ended up a bit disappointed. it has a good flavor but is way too sugary. I feel like I'm just pouring syrupy sugar on my food. it's a nice idea but won't buy it again – paid $7.

maple syrup is fantastic! it has this depth that really enhances my pancakes. however, I do think it could benefit from a bigger bottle since it’s gone within a week! paid $14 which isn’t too bad, but I wish it lasted longer.

this pancake syrup is decent but not what I’d call ‘authentic’. definitely more on the corn syrup side than natural. I guess it works if you’re in a pinch but for regular use, I’ll stick to real maple syrup. about $5, so not a huge loss.

the honey syrup is good, but not as versatile as I thought. it’s great on waffles, but I find it too sweet for tea. I like to drizzle it, but sometimes it feels like it overpowers the flavors. about $9, which is okay for what it is.

finally found a fruit syrup that I actually love! it’s not too thick, has a real burst of flavor, and goes great on pancakes. it did cost me $11 which is a bit much, but I don’t mind indulging for the taste!

I bought this organic maple syrup and have to say, I love supporting local businesses! it’s a bit on the sweeter side for my taste—should probably be using less. paid around $18 but feel good about it!

this pancake syrup is perfect for a quick breakfast, but it does taste pretty artificial. good for kids who love sweetness though! cost about $6. I’d recommend if you’re looking for cheap and cheerful!

this fruit syrup has a nice flavor, but it’s thicker than I expected. I used it on pancakes and it was good, but I had to really spread it out. about $8, so it’s not breaking the bank, but I probably wouldn’t repurchase.

I really wanted to love this honey syrup. It tastes fine, but it's so thick that it doesn’t pour well. I ended up using my fingers to get it out! about $7 for a small bottle, which seems a little ridiculous for the hassle.

this maple syrup is amazing! I use it on everything from oatmeal to yogurt. the only thing is it’s pretty expensive at around $15 for a small bottle, but the taste is so much better than cheap alternatives.

this pancake syrup was kind of a letdown. It doesn’t have that deep flavor of real maple syrup, more like a sugary syrup substitute. It’s fine for a quick fix though and was only $5, so no great loss.

the fruit syrup is a fun addition to breakfast! I love the berry flavor, but I do find it a little too sweet. Great for drizzling, but I usually have to mix it with regular syrup. about $9, which I think is fair.

honey syrup is nice for a change! it’s got a good flavor and sweetness, but I found it almost too thick for drizzling. I like it in tea, but for pancakes, I prefer something a little thinner. cost me about $8.

this maple syrup has such a rich flavor! it’s heavenly on pancakes. the only downside is that I go through it too fast, especially at around $12 for a medium-sized bottle. guess that’s a sign to treat myself responsibly!

this pancake syrup didn’t really do it for me. tasted a bit fake and overly sweet. I wanted that comforting, natural maple taste but ended up with something that felt more like candy. about $6, so I could test it first!

the fruit syrup is decent, but it’s not as versatile as I thought. it’s nice on pancakes, but I wouldn’t use it for anything else. paid about $7, which feels a bit steep for something I won’t use often.
the honey syrup was a great find! I love using it as a sugar alternative in my tea. it’s thick and rich, though a tad sweet for my taste. about $10 for a bottle, feels justified for quality!
maple syrup was recommended by a friend and wow, what a treat! It has a nice depth to it that I didn’t expect. the only downside is the price is a bit high, like $16, but hey, quality matters!
these pickles are fantastic! crunchy and full of flavor, but i wish they were a bit less salty. i like to snack on them with sandwiches. overall, a great addition to my pantry!
got these canned peaches for a dessert recipe and they were just okay. some were really mushy and the syrup was too sweet for my taste. still, they worked fine in my peach cobbler.
the mixed vegetables are super convenient! i tossed them into a stir fry and they were ready in minutes. however, i do wish the carrots weren’t so soft. still worth keeping on hand for busy nights!
this soup is my go-to when i'm sick. it’s comforting and warms me right up. but it does have a strange aftertaste sometimes. still, it beats making homemade when i’m feeling under the weather.
i love these dill pickles! they have a nice tangy kick. the jar is also pretty big for the price. they don't last long in my house, though – gone within a week!
the chili beans are hearty and full of beans, but my family thought it was too spicy. i personally enjoyed it, but i’ll probably mix it with some sour cream next time to tone it down.
the fruit cocktail was a little disappointing. too many cherries and not enough peaches for my liking. still, it's handy to have for quick fruit salads or snacks for the kids.
i'm a soup lover and this one hit the spot! love the chunky veggies, but it took a bit longer to heat through than the label said. i’ll definitely buy again, just not when i’m in a rush.
the sweet gherkins were a huge hit at my last BBQ! everyone loved them, but the jar was small for the price. they disappeared fast, so i might grab two jars next time!
these canned green beans were okay, but they could use a little more seasoning. i added some garlic and pepper, and it made a world of difference. still, not a staple on my list.
i gave these pickled jalapeños a shot for some extra zing in my tacos. they were spicy and crunchy, but the jar was so small that it was gone before i could really enjoy them.
i tried the pumpkin puree to make pie and it was a total hit! smooth and creamy, but i wish it came in a bigger can. barely enough for two pies! still, will definitely buy again.

the chicken noodle soup was surprisingly good, especially since it’s canned. it actually had real chicken pieces! but the sodium content is through the roof, so i have to be careful not to eat it too often.
bought these canned peaches for a quick breakfast topping, and they’re sweet but not overly sugary. my only complaint is that the slices were a bit too mushy for my liking.
the vegetable soup is decent, but it’s missing a bit of flavor. i had to add some spices to give it a kick. still, it's nice to have on hand when I'm too lazy to cook!
these pickle spears are the best! crunchy and tangy, I could eat them all day. the only downside is that the jar doesn’t last long around my kids, so I have to hide them!
can’t say enough good things about this tomato soup! creamy and rich, it’s perfect on a cold day. my only issue is that I wish it came in a larger size for sharing!
got these canned carrots for a quick side dish. they’re tender and sweet, but a bit too mushy for my taste. i’d rather have fresh, but these work in a pinch.
the corn was sweet and delicious, but the can was tiny! i barely got enough to serve two people. next time, i’ll stock up and grab a few more cans.
this salsa verde was a pleasant surprise! great flavor and not too spicy, perfect for dipping. my only complaint is that the jar is small; we went through it too quickly.
these sauerkraut are the best! they taste homemade and not overly salty. my family loves them with sausages. just wish they came in a bigger jar – we finish it too fast!
the beef stew is filling and pretty good for canned food. however, it could use more vegetables. still, on busy days, it’s nice to have something tasty and quick.
the canned pears were a hit in my house! nice texture and not overly sweet. however, they were a bit too syrupy for my liking. next time I’ll rinse them off before serving.
i was looking for something quick and easy, and this vegetable mix works well. the flavors are nice, but some veggies are a bit mushy. perfect in a casserole, though.
the black olives are nice and plump! i love using them in salads and pizzas. just wish the can was bigger; it goes fast in my house!
this minestrone soup is pretty tasty, but a bit too salty for my taste. it filled me up, but I had to drink a lot of water after. might not buy again, but it's good for now.
the crunchy pickled beets were surprisingly good! i love the tangy flavor. however, the jar is small and they went too quickly - definitely need a bigger jar next time!

these doggy scarves are adorable! got a few for my shih tzu, who is 4, and she looks so cute in them. they’re soft and don’t irritate her neck. only downside is that they’re a bit challenging to clean, hand wash is best or they lose their shape.

picked up the winter gloves for my golden retriever this season. they fit really well and have a nice grip. but sadly, he didn’t like wearing them for long. he just kept shaking them off. maybe he’ll get used to them as it gets colder!

bought a couple of hats for my pug. he can be picky about what he wears but these are so lightweight he hardly notices. the ear holes are a cool feature! just wish they came in more colors, we love to match for our walks!

the new socks for my dachshund are super cute, but they don’t stay on very well. they slip off pretty easily, especially when he runs. I love how colorful they are, though! they also keep his paws warm, so mixed feelings here.

got this adorable scarf for my 6-month-old puppy, and she looks so chic in it! love the pattern and how soft it is. only issue is that she tends to chew on it when she’s bored, so I have to keep an eye on her.

the dog gloves I bought were a hit with my beagle! she loves playing in the snow, and these keep her paws warm. they’re also super easy to put on. the only con is that they’re a bit pricey, around $30, but worth it for the quality.

just received the hats for our two bulldogs. they look cute as buttons! however, they keep trying to shake them off. I thought they’d get used to it, but no luck yet. maybe they’ll come around eventually.

these cute scarves are a fantastic party accessory for our dog! he gets tons of compliments. but they’re a little small for my golden retriever, had to adjust them often. would be great if they offered larger sizes!

loving these colorful dog socks! they're perfect for our long walks and add some flair to my pup’s outfit. however, they don’t hold up well on rainy days - got soaked and started to slip. so keep that in mind!

just got a hat for my corgi, and she looks fabulous! it’s pretty well made and fits snug, but the chin strap could be a bit longer. she was able to wiggle out of it after a few minutes. still super cute for photos!

the winter gloves for our lab are such a great idea! he doesn't mind wearing them, which is surprising. they keep his paws dry but started to wear down after a month of heavy use. we’ll see how long they hold up!

the dog scarves arrived and they are SO cute! my terrier loves wearing them, and they’re really soft. just wish they were more adjustable—I have to tie it each time which can be a hassle. overall, a fun purchase!

got these socks for my chihuahua to protect her little paws. they’re adorable and fit well! but I’ve noticed some of them ripped after just a few wears. I was hoping they’d be more durable. still, she looks so sweet in them.
the dog hat is a total head-turner! everyone stops to pet my pup. the fabric feels nice and warm, but I wish it had a better chin strap to secure it more. sometimes it slips and she looks confused!

these scarves are a must-have for fashionable pups! I have a 5-year-old pug who loves wearing them. only drawback is that they need to be hand washed; I wish they were machine washable because I have to clean them constantly.

I got some mittens for my dog, and they are super cute! but my dog wouldn’t stop trying to take them off. they fit well but getting him used to them is a whole different ballgame. good quality though.

the gloves were a decent buy for my mutt! they keep her paws warm on chilly days, but I do find they’re a bit bulky, which makes her walk funny. she’s adapting, but takes some time getting used to them.
these hats are the cutest! my spaniel looks so chic, but they're a little tricky to put on. if there were a better guide for fitting, that would be great! still, I adore how he looks in photos!

the socks for my dog are adorable but they keep slipping off after a short walk. I got them for $20, so I expected a bit more grip. they're great for looks, though! just wish they were more functional.

the scarf I bought for my bulldog is so soft and snuggly! she looks great in it, but it does get dirty pretty fast. I have to wash it often. a little sturdier fabric would be better, otherwise, great buy overall.

the hats for my two dogs are a blast, they love wearing them for walks! though, I have to admit, they don’t really stay on too well. I’m constantly adjusting them. still, the cuteness factor is through the roof!

the gloves I got for my dog are super cute and warm! but they’re not very good for running, they slip off sometimes. I mean, they work for short walks though. still a good buy but could use some tweaks.
my dog loves the scarf I bought her! it’s stylish and warm for winter walks. however, the colors bled a bit after the first wash, which was disappointing. overall, still happy with the look!

the socks I got for my dog are just adorable! they have cute designs but they don't stay on for long. he runs in them and they slide off. I still like them though, might get a different brand next time.
the dog hats are a fun addition to our walks. they look so fashionable but getting it on my dog’s head is a bit tricky. I wish they had a better adjustable strap. we’ll keep trying!
just received these gorgeous scarves! my dog’s getting all the attention in the neighborhood. they’re a little short, so I wish I had ordered a size up. but still, a great find!
these leafy greens are super fresh! i love the crispiness of the spinach, but the arugula was a bit wilted. overall, a great addition to my salads.
got some root vegetables from this seller last week. the carrots were crunchy and sweet, but the beets had a weird texture. they really do have a variety though, which is nice.
i'm a fan of the cruciferous veggies, especially the broccoli. it cooks well and holds its flavor, but the cauliflower was kind of blah. not sure if i’d buy it again.
the salad greens are beautiful and vibrant, really brighten up my meals. however, i was disappointed to find a few browning leaves in the mix. still, it’s decent for the price.
these leafy greens are packaged really well! loved how fresh the kale felt. my only gripe is that it didn’t last as long as I hoped, maybe about 5 days before wilting.
the variety in this produce selection is impressive! got some radishes and they were crisp. some veggies felt a bit overripe, though. mixed feelings overall.
really enjoyed the quality of these root vegetables! the sweet potatoes were perfect, but the onions had a few soft spots. still, made for great roasted veggies.
the cruciferous blend has been fantastic for my stir-fries. love the broccoli and bok choy! though, some of the cabbage was a little tougher than I’d like.
these salad greens are a lifesaver! they add so much color to my plates. i did find a couple of bugs though, which was a bit off-putting. just rinse well!
super impressed with the quality of these leafy greens. the baby spinach was perfect for smoothies. just wish it came in a larger bag for the price they charge!
the root vegetables were alright. the potatoes were solid but the carrots were a bit too soft for my taste. i guess it’s hit or miss depending on the batch.
love the variety of greens! got a mix of romaine and butter lettuce – both were crisp and fresh. just wish they had more eco-friendly packaging.
the freshness of these cruciferous vegetables is noticeable! broccoli was crisp, but the kale seemed a bit wilted. overall, I’d buy again for the taste.
i got these salad greens for my meal prep. made sandwiches for the week, and they held up pretty well, but by day 5 they were starting to wilt.
these leafy greens are great! however, the price is a little steep for the quantity. if you need fresh greens, it’s worth a shot but watch your budget.
these root vegetables are always delicious! i love roasting them together. my only complaint is sometimes the size varies too much, it’s frustrating when cooking.
i usually love cruciferous veggies, but the ones i got were a bit overcooked before i even got to them. a little too mushy for my taste, sadly.
these salad greens are fresh and delightful! however, found a bit of grit on them, which was a hassle to wash off. just a heads up for new buyers.
the quality of these leafy greens has been fantastic! got a pack of mixed greens, and it’s been perfect for salads and wraps. just wish they didn’t come in plastic.
these root vegetables are a staple for me! sweet potatoes were amazing; just wish the carrots weren’t so uneven in size. makes cooking a bit tricky sometimes.
the cruciferous mix was very fresh! i love the kale and broccoli, but the cabbage was a bit tough. overall, still a decent purchase.
really enjoyed these salad greens! they made my salads pop! just wish it had less packaging. I’m trying to be more eco-friendly.
the leafy greens came in well packaged. fresh and crunchy, but the price is higher than what I usually pay. it’s good, but I’ll have to budget better.
my root vegetable box had some winners and losers. the beets were so sweet, but the onions were a bit too pungent for my taste. still, a fun mix.
i was impressed with the freshness of these cruciferous vegetables! though, the broccoli did start to yellow after a few days. good while it lasted!
these salad greens are super versatile! they worked well for wraps too. just a few slimy leaves in the mix, but I can work around that.
the variety of leafy greens is awesome! but I did find some browned spots at the bottom of the pack. still, pretty good they were fresh overall.
root vegetables were decent quality! roasted carrots and potatoes were delicious. wish the portion sizes were bigger for the price, though. I go through them fast!
the cruciferous blend was a hit in my stir fry! the broccoli was nice, but some of the cauliflower was a bit mushy. balancing out the flavors worked well.

got this retro candy box for my son's birthday and he loved it! so many classics like pop rocks and gummy bears. downside is that some of the candies were a bit stale, but overall a fun trip down memory lane!
the candy bouquet i sent to my sister for her graduation was a hit! it had all her favorites. i wish it came in a sturdier vase though, it tipped over easily. but she adored it, so i’m happy!

bought this assortment for my daughter's 5th birthday party. the kids went crazy over it! the only thing that bothered me was the price - about $40 seemed steep for just candy. but the smiles were worth it!

as someone who loves novelty candy, this box didn't disappoint! the weird flavors had everyone trying new things. only downside? some of the candies were a bit too difficult to chew, but still a great gift overall.
got the candy assortment for my office and it was a hit! even my picky co-workers found something they liked. just wish they had included more chocolate. overall, a fun mix though.
this candy gift box is perfect for anyone with a sweet tooth! great variety, but some of the candies were a bit too chewy for my taste. kids loved it, especially the sour stuff!
my mom loved the candy bouquet for Mother's Day. it looked beautiful and had all her nostalgic favorites. however, the delivery was delayed by two days, which was a bummer.
i ordered the retro candy pack as a gag gift and it was hilarious! the look on my friend's face when she saw the old-school candies was priceless. just wish the packaging was a bit more festive.
this is a cool candy gift box! it has a good mix but some candies were put together that didn't make sense. like, why would you put chocolate next to sour gummies? still, the kids enjoyed it!
i got this novelty candy pack for my teen and she had a blast sharing it with her friends. fun flavors! just wish there was more variety in the chocolate section. that seemed kinda lacking.
the candy bouquet was a unique gift idea for my best friend. the presentation was lovely, but some of the candies were just average. still, it was a cute surprise!
i bought this for my hubby who has a sweet tooth. he loved most of the candies but the licorice was a no-go. wish they had more fruity options instead of just gum!
this candy variety pack is so much fun! the only problem was that a few of the candies were broken or crushed. still, my 8-year-old loved it and it kept her busy for hours.
the retro candy gift box brought back so many memories for me! lots of my childhood favorites, but a few were a bit stale. overall, a fun gift for anyone who loves nostalgia.
i sent this candy assortment to my niece for her birthday and she went wild! it's a great mix of sweets but some of the candy could’ve been a little fresher. still, she loved it!
amazing selection of candy! the novelty options are hilarious, but the packaging could be more attractive for gifting. still, a fun choice if you're into quirky snacks.
the candy bouquet arrived looking stunning! my friend loved it, but honestly, some of the candies were not as fresh as I’d hoped. would still consider buying again for the presentation.
i got the candy assortment for my kids and they went nuts over it! but some candies were hard to open for little fingers. a good variety overall, just a little messy!
i ordered this candy gift box for a party, and most guests loved it. some of the retro candies were a bit old-school for my younger friends, but the nostalgia factor was a win!
this candy gift was packed full of fun! the downside was that some of the candies were not to my taste. still, it’s a great mix if you want to surprise someone with a variety.
my daughter loved the candy bouquet for her 10th birthday! it looked beautiful and had many of her favorites, but I thought it was a bit pricey for what you get.
the novelty candy pack was a huge hit at our game night! everyone tried to guess the flavors. but some were definitely better than others. still a fun addition to the party!
i bought this assortment for a movie night, and it was great! tons of options for everyone. just wish the chocolate didn't melt so easily in the summer heat.
the candy bouquet looked amazing when it arrived! my friend couldn't stop raving about it. but a few candies were a bit old, which was disappointing. still worth it for the presentation!
I got this candy assortment for a friend's birthday. such a fun mix of goodies! some weren't that great, but the majority were awesome. a great way to try new sweets.
the retro candy pack had all the classics! it was a blast reminiscing with friends. however, some of the candies were difficult to chew. overall, a fun gift for nostalgia lovers!
this candy gift box is a great idea for any occasion! the mixed selection was a hit, but I was a bit let down by the lack of chocolate options. still, my kids enjoyed it!
I gifted this candy bouquet to my mom, and she loved it! the variety was fantastic, but I found some of the packaging a bit flimsy. still, she appreciated the gesture.
the candy assortment arrived quickly and was perfect for our party! kids had a great time but some candies were a bit stale. would still buy again for the variety.

this gum has a great flavor variety! my favorites are the watermelon and spearmint. it lasts a decent while too, which is nice. wish it was a bit softer though; my jaw gets tired after chewing for a while.
picked up this sugar-free gum for my boyfriend who’s trying to cut down on sugar. he says it’s not as sweet as regular gum but still does the job. great option but wish they had more flavors!
absolutely love the bubble gum flavor! reminds me of childhood, but it loses its flavor pretty quick—like after 10 minutes. still, it’s a fun nostalgia trip every now and then.
the mint flavor is really refreshing for breath freshening. i like that it’s sugar-free, but the aftertaste could be better. overall, good for a quick fix but not a long-lasting option.
got these for my kids, and they’re totally hooked! i don’t mind them chewing gum because it’s sugar-free. the fruity flavors are a hit, but some flavors are definitely better than others.
this chewing gum is a lifesaver after lunch meetings. it keeps my breath fresh, but the fruit flavors are hit or miss—some taste artificial. overall, it does the job!
the bubblegum flavor has a nice nostalgic feel, but my biggest gripe is how quickly it loses flavor. if you don’t mind re-chewing, it’s still a fun treat.
i appreciate that this gum is sugar-free! as someone trying to watch my sugar intake, it's a good alternative. flavors could be bolder; they feel a bit muted at times.
i love the variety pack—so many options to choose from! however, some of the flavors taste slightly artificial. still a fun mix for snacking, and the freshness lasts a while.
this is my go-to gum for long drives. the mint flavor is super refreshing and keeps my breath fresh. wish it came in larger packs, though, because I go through it fast!
the flavor variety is impressive! my favorite has to be the watermelon, but some flavors are just okay. it holds up well for a while, just don’t expect it to last past 20 minutes.
my daughter loves this gum! it's sugar-free so I feel okay letting her chew it. the bubble gum flavor is a big hit, but it tends to be quite hard when you first pop it in.
not too bad for sugar-free gum! it freshens breath fairly well, but the flavors could definitely last longer. I’m stuck re-chewing a lot, which is a bit of a bummer.
the packaging is cute and perfect for taking on the go. the gum itself is nice and soft, but some flavors taste more like perfume than fruit—especially the grape, which I didn’t care for.
chewing this gum during workouts has been great for fresh breath, but the flavor dissipates quickly. decent alternative if you just need a quick fix.
great for keeping your mouth fresh when you don’t have time for a toothbrush! but honestly, most of the flavors are a little too intense for my taste, especially the minty ones.
my husband loves these! he likes the variety, especially the watermelon. I'm not a huge fan, though—some flavors feel off, like they’re way too sweet or too fake.
this gum has a fun selection but don’t expect it to be a long-lasting flavor. after about 15 minutes, I feel like I need to pop another piece. good for a quick fix, though!
the bubble gum option is a nostalgia blast! it’s not overly chewy, but the flavor doesn’t stick around long enough for my liking. I’d still buy it again, though, just for the memories!
I was looking for a good sugar-free option, and this one ticks most boxes! the mint flavor is bold, but it can be a bit harsh. the fruity flavors are much better in my opinion.
this gum is a nice treat after meals! I love the freshness it gives, but some of the flavors remind me of children's medicine. I'll stick to the mint and fruity ones!
my 5-year-old loves these, especially the grape flavor. it's sugar-free, which is a win for me, but I do have to limit how much she chews since it goes quick!
just got this multi-flavor pack, and it has something for everyone! but a lot of flavors taste too sweet for me. the mint is nice, and it really does help with breath, though!
I’m a gum fanatic and this variety pack is great! I wish some flavors were softer, though. but overall, it’s a nice selection for keeping things interesting.
the gum is good, but I find some flavors too artificial tasting. love the freshness, but I’m definitely looking for something with a bit more natural taste. the mint is good, though!
just bought this for my pack during class, and it keeps my breath fresh. the flavor is decent but doesn’t last as long as I’d hoped. good for a quick refresh, but need more!
these are great for my kids! I appreciate the sugar-free aspect, but some flavors are definitely better than others. the bubble gum is a favorite, but the grape is a hard pass!
I wanted something sugar-free and refreshing, and this fit the bill! the mint is especially nice after lunch. however, I wish the flavor would last longer—maybe about 15 minutes?

these rubber stamps are a solid buy! i got a 10-pack for about $20, and they’ve been a fun addition to my card-making. they stamp clearly and the designs are cute. wish they came with a storage case though; they’re just loose in my craft drawer now.

i've been using this ink pad for my scrapbooking, and while the colors are vibrant, it does dry out faster than i expected. after a month, i had to re-ink it already. it’s nice for small projects but probably not ideal for heavy-duty stamping.

picked up this embossing powder on a whim and it turned out to be fantastic! the shine is beautiful once melted, and it was only $5. however, there’s a learning curve—definitely got a little messy the first few times. but now I’m loving it!

got these stamping blocks in a set of four, and they’re really handy! they hold the stamps well, but the grip could be better. sometimes I struggle to align things perfectly. overall, they do the job, just wish they had a more comfortable handle.

i tried these rubber stamps for a school project with my 7-year-old, and she loved them! the designs are really fun and colorful, but we had some issues with the ink smudging. it might just be the ink pad we used, though.

this ink pad is decent for the price, but it took a while to dry, which was a little frustrating. i used it on some cards and had to wait over 30 minutes before handling them. the colors are pretty vibrant, but I feel like there are better options out there.

the set of rubber stamps I got has some really adorable designs! perfect for kids' crafts. however, they don’t stick to the block well and sometimes slide off. definitely something to consider if you're working on detailed projects.

after some mixed reviews, I decided to try this embossing powder, and I’m glad I did! it adds a lovely glossy finish to my cards, but watch out because it can clump if you're not careful. I’d recommend using a fine tip for precision.

these stamping blocks were a lifesaver for my crafting session last weekend! super easy to use, and they’re all different sizes. however, I wish they had some kind of locking mechanism because they can be a little wobbly.

i was excited about this ink pad but was a bit let down. it worked well for my first few stamps, but it seemed to lose its ink after a while. maybe I just got a bad one? still, it’s affordable so I might give it another shot.

just got my hands on this rubber stamp set, and wow! around $15 for 12 pieces, and they’re so cute. the only downside is the wood blocks can chip easily if you’re not careful. but the impressions they make are clear and crisp!

i really wanted to love this ink pad, but it smudges too easily on glossy paper. it looks great on normal cardstock, but I was hoping for versatility. maybe I just need to experiment more, but for now, I’m kinda bummed about it.
grabbed this embossing powder at my local craft store, and it was only $7.50. it works well, but the shimmer isn’t as pronounced as I expected. still, it adds a nice touch to my greeting cards.

i recently got stamping blocks, and they're decent but nothing fancy. they hold stamps okay, but I wish they had a better grip. sometimes they slip, which can mess up my projects. they get the job done, just a bit clunky.

the rubber stamps in this pack are super cute! i did some holiday cards with them, and they worked great. only downside is the ink needs to be re-applied pretty often for solid coverage. still, they’re a fun addition to my craft supplies.

the embossing powder I tried isn't too bad! the metallic finish is nice, but it sticks to everything. I must have spent half my time cleaning up! if you don't mind a little mess, it can add a cool effect.
the ink pads I purchased are okay, but I've had better. they don’t seem to cover the stamps evenly, which was kind of a letdown. I’m probably going to look for some other brands next time.
so happy with this rubber stamp set! got it for $18 and it’s become my go-to for creating personalized gifts. they do wear down a bit after heavy use, but for the price, it’s been worth every penny!

i wanted to love these stamping blocks, but they’re a bit heavy for my hands. it’s not the end of the world, but I prefer lighter ones when I’m crafting for hours. they’re functional though, so I still use them.

i decided to try this embossing powder for some holiday cards, and the sparkle is stunning! it did take a couple of tries to get it right, but it’s definitely worth it for that bling factor. just make sure to work outside to avoid mess!

bought an ink pad for my daughter’s art projects. she loved the colors but we both found it dried too fast. had to be super quick with our stamping otherwise it would smudge. still a fun product, just with this little hiccup.

the rubber stamps I ordered are great fun for my kids! we’ve been decorating their school projects, but one stamp fell apart after a week. just something to watch for with the cheaper sets. overall, a good value though!

the embossing powder I bought worked beautifully! i was really pleased with how easy it was to use. just a heads up, though—the first few times I used it, I made a mess. once I got the hang of it, things turned out great!

these stamping blocks are a mixed bag for me. they’re sturdy, but I find the clear ones are much harder to see through than expected. it gets tricky when you want precise placements. might try some other brands next time.

i'm really enjoying the rubber stamps I picked up! cute designs for my journaling, but they don’t seem as durable as I’d hoped. a few edges are fraying already after a month. still, they work well enough for light use.

this ink pad has a nice range of colors and is pretty good for general use. just be careful, it seems to dry out faster than I expected. I’ve only had it for a couple of months and already need a replacement.

i bought these rubber stamps to create customized thank you cards, and they're adorable! the only downside is that the ink doesn’t stick as well as I’d like. I had to re-ink multiple times to keep a clean impression.

the embossing powder is lovely on paper and really brings my cards to life! a little tricky to use initially, but once I got the hang of it, it was smooth sailing. beware of overspray, though—it can get messy!

these scale models are fantastic for my tabletop games! they really add depth to our dioramas, especially the intricate details on the buildings. had some trouble with a few pieces not fitting together perfectly, but overall, they bring my game to life.

picked up a set of terrain pieces a month ago, and they’ve been a hit with my kids. they love setting them up for their mini battles! wish there were more variety in the pack though; some pieces seem a bit repetitive after a while.

wow, these miniatures are great quality! painted up nicely and made my game nights more immersive. just a heads up, they take a bit to arrive (took about two weeks), but worth the wait. highly detailed for the price!

got these diorama pieces for my partner's birthday. he loves building epic scenes with them. only downside is that a couple came with minor chips, but nothing a little paint couldn’t fix. would buy again!

the detail on these miniatures is incredible! they’re perfect for 28mm scale games. however, the assembly was a bit fiddly, especially with the smaller parts. once I got them together, though, they looked amazing on the table!

I'm a newbie at tabletop gaming and got these models to help me join in. some of the pieces were hard to paint, but they looked cool once done. wish the instructions were clearer, but I'm getting the hang of it!

the terrain pieces are good quality but took longer to arrive than I expected. some of them could use more color variety too. still, they do add a nice touch to the gaming board. might order more if they have new styles!
bought these miniatures for a birthday gift. they are a bit delicate but super detailed! the only downside was that one piece was missing from the set, which was frustrating. overall, they are a hit!

I love the variety in these scale models! my favorite is the castle set; it really makes my games epic. however, I could do without some of the random pieces included. they’re not always useful for my setup.

these miniatures brought my entire game night to the next level! everyone couldn’t stop raving about how cool they looked on the table. the only issue I faced was a bit of warping on a few pieces that I had to straighten out.

the small terrain pieces are cute and fit perfectly for what I need, but they could use some sturdiness. I’ve seen some break during gameplay. overall though, they're adorable and affordable for what they are.
picked these up for my partner, who is an avid gamer. they really enjoyed customizing them! just wish there were more options for characters. the ones included are decent but could be more diverse.

these diorama pieces are so well made! added some great ambiance to my game. had some trouble with the paint chipping, but after sealing them, they held up nicely. think I’ll grab more next time!
