i like these jelly beans, but honestly, some flavors are a total miss. the lime flavor was surprisingly awful, but the cherry is a winner! bought a 1-pound bag, and it surprisingly lasted nearly a month in our house. good for snacking, but watch out for weird flavors!

the colorfulness of these jelly beans is next level — they look amazing in a jar on my counter! my kids love picking out their favorites, but i found some flavors tasted artificial, like the grape. still, they make a fun addition to birthday bags, just wish they were a bit less sugary.

grabbed these for a movie night, and wow, they are eye-catching! the tutti frutti flavor is my favorite by far. only thing is, some of the flavors just taste the same after a while, which is a bummer. if you're expecting gourmet jelly beans, you might be disappointed!

these jelly beans are such a fun treat! i brought them to my office, and they vanished in no time. loved the variety, especially the popcorn flavor! my only issue was that a few beans were stuck together in the bag, which was kinda annoying. still, they made a great snack!

i had high hopes for these jelly beans since i love sweets, but some flavors were just not good. the pina colada one tasted really weird to me. the colorful packaging is super appealing though, so they looked great at my party. i’d say they’re hit or miss, depending on the flavor.

very vibrant colors! my kids (ages 3 and 6) had a blast going through the flavors. HOWEVER, after eating these for a few days, they had sugar highs that were a bit hard to manage. overall, a nice treat, but next time, i’ll limit how many they can eat!

picked up a bag of these for easter and they really stood out in their basket! loved the variety, but some flavors like the grape were too sweet for me. next time, i'm considering mixing them with some dark chocolate-covered almonds for balance!

i really wanted to love these jelly beans, but some of the flavors are just off. the buttered popcorn one is delicious, but the other weird combinations left a lot to be desired. my kids enjoyed them, but perhaps it’s an acquired taste for some adults.

got this jelly bean mix for a party. the flavors were a hit with the kids, but some were definitely more popular than others! the cherry and lemon were gone within minutes, but the licorice sat untouched. overall, fun candies but a few duds in the mix.

these are perfect for road trips! bought a bag for our 5-hour drive, and they kept my kids entertained. i loved the variety of flavors, but i personally thought some were way too sugary. might try mixing them with nuts next time to balance it out.

i tried these jelly beans because of all the buzz, and they’re pretty good! the fruity flavors are vibrant, but a couple were overly sweet for my palate. the packaging looks cute, so they make a nice gift. just keep an eye on the sugar content if you’re concerned!

i bought these for a sweet treat with my coffee breaks, and they work pretty well! the flavors caught my attention, especially the blueberry. however, they’re definitely on the sweeter side, which isn’t great for my afternoon energy crash. i'll stick to a couple at a time!

these jelly beans are super colorful and fun to eat! they’ve got a great selection of flavors, but i found the texture a bit too chewy for my taste. my kids loved them, though — they had fun creating their flavor combos! great for parties or just a sweet snack.

the jelly beans came in a giant bag, which was perfect for our family movie night! my husband loved the coconut flavor, while i preferred the more traditional flavors like strawberry. downside? the bag was almost too big, and i felt pressure to finish them fast!

these jelly beans are a cute addition to my candy jar! i enjoyed the popcorn and watermelon flavors, but some of the others were just weird. i’d recommend this for casual snacking, just don’t expect every flavor to be a hit. the price is decent, too!

got these jelly beans as a treat for my kids, and they loved them! however, beware – the sugar high that followed was something else! they had a blast trying all the flavors, but i wish they came in smaller bags to manage their intake better.

i bought these jelly beans for a party, and they were a hit with the kids! the rainbow colors made everything pop, and the flavors were a fun surprise. however, i found some flavors tasted too artificial. still, a fun candy for events!

had these jelly beans at a friend's birthday party. super colorful and a fun mix of flavors! i wasn’t a fan of the bubblegum flavor, but the others were great. i think they’d be perfect for decorating cupcakes or cakes as well. definitely a fun treat!

my kids went crazy for these jelly beans! they loved sorting through the flavors and guessing which ones they were. while most were tasty, a few flavors like the root beer didn’t go over well. great for variety and fun, just watch out on the flavor choices!

grabbed these for a family gathering, and they were a fun addition! my favorite was the sour apple, so tangy! however, a few of the flavors, like the orange and grape, tasted way too much like candy syrup. still, they disappeared fast!

i love the nostalgia of jelly beans! bought these for a movie night, and they were a great conversation starter. some flavors really hit the spot, like the strawberry, while others felt like a chore to eat. still, a good mix overall for sharing.

these jelly beans are a classic! brought them to a picnic, and everyone was excited to dive in. i especially enjoyed the berry flavors, but my partner wasn’t a fan of the licorice. if you’re sharing, definitely cater to different tastes.

i bought a bag of these to munch on while working from home. they were delicious but also super sweet, which made it hard to focus. the flavors are quite varied, but some were better than others. a nice snack, just be mindful of portion sizes!

the aquarite 20 gallon glass tank is a great starter for my first planted aquarium! I’ve had it for about 4 months now, and I love watching my little aquatic plants grow. the only downside is that the glass can be heavy and a bit tricky to clean, but overall, it’s been a perfect size for my living room.

just set up this acrylic tank and I'm impressed with how lightweight it is compared to glass! however, I noticed it scratches a bit easily. my fish seem to love the space, and the clarity is amazing. just wish they’d come with better filtration options instead of the basic one included.

after a year with my saltwater tank, I can say it has its ups and downs. love the vibrant colors of my fish, and the live rock looks fantastic, but maintaining the salinity can be a hassle. the tank is around 55 gallons, so it’s heavy to move around! still, worth it for the beauty it brings to my home.

picked up a 10-gallon planted tank and I’m still figuring things out. it’s definitely adorable with all the plants, but I wish the instructions were clearer for newcomers. my fish love hiding in the plants, but I’ve had to replant them several times. at least I'm getting better at my aquatic gardening skills!

I got a 30-gallon acrylic aquarium to dive into the saltwater hobby, and while it looks fantastic, the pump noise is a bit annoying. setup was straightforward, but I did some extra research to get it right. love watching my clownfish swim around, it calms me down after a long day.

just upgraded to a 75-gallon glass tank, and wow, the visibility is stunning! it’s a great investment for my schooling fish. the only issue is that cleaning it can be quite the workout. I often end up with a wet floor because it’s hard to balance while scrubbing the glass.

had this 5-gallon nano tank for about 6 months! perfect for my small space but it does require frequent water changes. I love the LED light that came with it; my plants seem really happy. wish the heater was more reliable, sometimes it doesn’t kick on when it should.

the 20-gallon saltwater tank looks beautiful but the maintenance is a real commitment. I love my live coral and fish, but the costs add up with purchasing salt, food, and water tests. also, the algae growth can be frustrating! however, seeing the tank thrive is super rewarding.

just received my 40-gallon acrylic aquarium, and honestly, I’m thrilled with it. lightweight and easy to transport! but the clarity isn’t as great as glass, and I’ve noticed a few scratches already. still, my fish are loving their new home. would recommend but handle with care!

really enjoying my new 55-gallon glass tank! it’s been 2 months, and my fish have settled in nicely. the only downside is that it’s pretty heavy and hard to position. would have loved better sealing along the edges to prevent leaks, but so far, so good.

got a 30-gallon planted tank about a month ago, and it has transformed my space! my plants are thriving, but I struggle with algae control. the included filter is decent, but I might have to upgrade soon. still, watching the fish swim through the greenery is such a joy.

I’m new to aquaristics and purchased a 15-gallon acrylic tank. it looks beautiful and sleek in my apartment, but it scratches so easily! I also wish it had a lid option, as my fish tend to jump out sometimes. hoping to find a workaround for that soon!

my saltwater tank has been up and running for 8 months now, but my nemesis has been the water quality. I love my fish, but they require a lot more monitoring than I initially thought. the beauty of it all is totally worth the effort, though. so mesmerizing to watch!

got my hands on a 40-gallon glass aquarium, and it’s my pride and joy! however, the light fixture that came with it doesn’t seem very bright. my plants are growing, but slowly. I might invest in a better LED light soon to boost the growth. overall, loving the experience!

I’ve had a 10-gallon nano tank for a few weeks now and it’s been fun! my shrimp love the little plants. but I realized that keeping the temperature steady is a struggle. I’ve had to invest in a small heater which works fine, but it’s an added expense I didn’t expect.

really happy with my new acrylic tank! the decorations and fish look so vibrant against the clear walls. however, it scratches easily as I mentioned before. just be careful when cleaning it. overall, it’s an attractive option that I think I’ll enjoy for a while.

just got my hands on a 75-gallon saltwater tank, and it’s stunning! but wow, the initial setup was a bit overwhelming. between the live rock, salt, and equipment, it can get pricey. after some patience, my fish are happy, and that’s what matters. love watching them swim!

been using a 50-gallon glass aquarium and while I love the aesthetics, it can get heavy when cleaning. I also wish the filter was quieter; it’s a bit of a nuisance sometimes. overall, the tank is gorgeous and my fish are thriving, which is the main thing.

the 20-gallon acrylic tank arrived yesterday and I’m excited! it’s super light which makes setting up easy. just hope it doesn’t warp over time like I’ve read! so far, it looks lovely in my living room. fingers crossed it stays looking good!

my 30-gallon planted tank has been great for my betta fish! the plants provide good hiding spots. I’ve struggled with algae, though, and wish there was a better filtration system provided. still, it’s a nice starter tank—just need to be more vigilant about water quality.

after much searching, I went for the 45-gallon glass tank. it looks incredible, but I quickly realized it requires a lot of cleaning! the glass clarity is fantastic, but those fingerprints are a pain. still, my fish love it, so I can’t complain too much!

recently set up a 20-gallon saltwater tank and it’s been awesome! my clownfish are adorable, but maintaining the right salinity levels is a bit tricky. I enjoy watching them swim, but I wish I had more guidance on the setup. overall, a worthwhile investment!

the 55-gallon acrylic aquarium I bought is stunning and provides plenty of space for my fish. however, I wish the filtration was more robust. sometimes I feel like I’m over cleaning. still, it’s nice to watch my fish interact in the space I’ve created.

just got a 10-gallon glass aquarium, and while it looks fantastic, cleaning is a challenge. love the plants I added, but I’m finding it tricky to balance water levels. it’s a learning curve, that’s for sure, but I’m excited to see how it evolves!

picked up a 20-gallon acrylic tank for my daughter’s birthday, and she’s thrilled! the viewing is great, but I’m nervous about the tank scratching. I also wish it came with more setup info. just got to keep an eye on maintenance, I guess!

after a rough start, I’ve gotten my 30-gallon planted tank to a good place. the plants initially died off, but with patience and some plant food, they’re thriving now! it’s been a learning curve, but seeing the fish swim through the plants makes it all worth it.

The shrimp I got from here were super fresh! I cooked them the same day and they had this nice snap when I bit into them. My only complaint is that I wish they came in larger quantities. For about $20, I got just enough for two meals, but I could easily eat them every night. Plus, they were deveined which saved me so much time in the kitchen.

I was really excited to try these crab legs. They were sweet and tender, which is exactly what I was looking for. However, they were a bit tricky to crack open. I ended up getting juice all over the place! A bit messy, but definitely worth it for that delicious taste. Just wish they included a few more in the pack for the price.

These oysters were so fresh and tasty! I made a big platter for a dinner party, and everyone raved about them. The only downside was that a couple were a bit gritty. I rinsed them off, but it's something to watch out for. Overall, great flavor and a hit with my guests!

I grabbed some mussels for a quick dinner. They cooked up nice, but honestly, they weren't that big. For $15, I expected a bit more meat inside. The flavor was decent, but it could've used more spices. Still a fun dish to make for a cozy night in, just don’t expect to get stuffed from them.

Absolutely loved the sushi-grade tuna! I made poke bowls, and the color and freshness were fantastic. Just make sure to eat it quickly, since it doesn’t last more than a couple of days in the fridge. I found it at around $25 for a pound, which is not bad considering how expensive sushi can be at a restaurant!

I tried the frozen scallops for a weeknight meal and they were surprisingly good. They thawed well and sautéed nicely. I do wish they were a little larger, though - they were on the small side and didn't quite fill me up. Still, I’d buy them again for about $15. Just need to make sure to serve them with something filling.

The calamari was a little chewy for my taste, which was disappointing. I love calamari, but I prefer it to be tender. It cooked quickly and I liked the seasoning that came with it, but I spent a good amount on it - around $12 for a small bag - so I expected better. Maybe just a bad batch?

I can't get enough of the wild-caught salmon! It tastes so much better than farmed. I grilled a couple of fillets and they were flaky and delicious. Just a little pricey at about $30 for two, but worth it for the quality. My husband raved about it, and that’s saying something!

Tried the lobster tails, and they were good but not great. The flavor was there, but I found them a bit rubbery. I followed the cooking instructions to the letter, so I was bummed. At $40 for two, I expected a bit more. Still, I’ll give them another shot someday for special occasions!

The shrimp tempura was a fun snack! I baked them instead of frying and they turned out crispy. That said, they felt a bit frozen in the middle, even after cooking them longer. Overall, good flavor but just not consistent. Good for a quick appetizer, just watch the cooking time.

I was looking for some good clams for a clam chowder recipe and found these. They were a bit sandy and needed a good soak, which was annoying. Flavor was fine once I dealt with that. I paid about $8 for a dozen, which seems fair, but I’ll probably go with a different source next time.

I ordered some crab cakes for a party, and they were a big hit! They had a nice amount of crab in them. My only issue was that they took longer to cook than expected. I thought they were burning, but they were just super thick. Loved the flavor, just plan ahead!

This squid was perfect for my pasta dish! It was tender and absorbed the sauce beautifully. I did find a bit of gristle which was annoying, but overall, it was good. For about $10, it made dinner feel fancy without breaking the bank. Will definitely try again soon.

I got some fresh tilapia fillets and they were really easy to cook. I just pan-seared them with some lemon and herbs. They were mild and flaky, which is great, but honestly, a bit bland without seasoning. For around $12, it’s a good base for a meal, but you need to spice it up!

The shrimp came quickly and looked really fresh, but I found the size to be smaller than I expected. I used them for a stir-fry, and they were fine, but I prefer bigger shrimp for grilling. Paid about $18 for a pound, which felt a bit high for their size. Might try a different brand next time.

I received a pack of frozen lobster tails and couldn’t wait to cook them. They tasted great but were quite small. I ended up needing two per person for dinner, which drove up the price. At about $25 each, it’s a steep dinner. Still tasty, but I’d recommend buying more if you’re hosting.

The fresh octopus I ordered was a fun experiment! I slow-cooked it and it turned out tender. I was amazed at the flavor! A little tricky to clean, though, and I made a mess. For $20, I enjoyed the challenge. Just be prepared to put in some work!

This fish market always has the freshest catch. I picked up some halibut and grilled it, and it tasted amazing! The only drawback is that it was pretty pricey - around $30 for two fillets - but the quality makes it worth it in my opinion. Perfect for special dinners.

Tried the frozen crab legs for a lazy dinner night and they were decent but not quite fresh like I'd hoped. They took a while to cook and didn’t have the same sweet flavor I get at restaurants. About $35 for a two-pound pack is a bit steep for what I got, but it did the job.

I love making shrimp tacos and these shrimp were perfect! They cooked quickly and were flavorful. My only issue is they came with a lot of shells still on. It took me some time to prep them before cooking, which wasn’t ideal. Still a great product, just a bit labor-intensive.

This seafood mix was great for paella! It had shrimp, mussels, and calamari all in one bag, which made it super convenient. However, some of the mussels were closed when I opened the pack, which was a little concerning. For about $25, I got a good amount for a family dinner, just double-check the quality.

I experimented with making sushi at home and used this fish. Honestly, it was a bit hit or miss. Some pieces were great but others had a strong fishy taste. I made sure to buy sushi-grade, so I expected a higher quality. About $28 for a pound feels high for mixed results.

Bought the smoked salmon for a brunch gathering and it was a hit! The flavor was rich and smoky, and everyone loved it. I did find it a bit salty, but that’s just personal preference. At around $15 for a pack, it’s a solid choice for easy entertaining!

The calamari rings were a fun addition to our seafood night! They were tender and crispy after frying. However, I found a few chewy pieces that I had to cut off. For about $10, they were a solid buy, but I’d prefer if they were more consistent in texture.

I bought some fresh crab meat for a crab salad. It was sweet and satisfying, but I wish there was more! It was a bit pricey at $30 for a small container. The flavor was fantastic, but I ended up going back to the store for more because there just wasn’t enough for the recipe.

This cod was super easy to prepare! I baked it with some lemon and herbs, and it came out flaky and delicious. Just wish it wasn’t so thin - I ended up using two fillets for one meal at around $20. But hey, it was good! Would buy again, just maybe a little more for a filling meal.

I tried the fried shrimp and while the texture was good, I found the breading a little too thick for my taste. The shrimp inside was tender, but I preferred a lighter coating. At $12 for a pack, it’s a decent option for a quick meal, just wish they had a lighter version.

this wooden spinning top is so beautiful! it feels really sturdy and spins like a dream. my 5-year-old loves it and it's great for quiet play. only downside is that it doesn’t spin for too long, maybe about 30 seconds max. would’ve liked it to last a bit longer, but overall, it's a fun toy!

the metal spinning tops are super cool! they have this shiny finish that looks awesome when spinning. my kids are 7 and 9, and they compete to see who can make theirs spin the longest. sometimes they fall over too quickly, though, so that’s a bit disappointing. still, they get a lot of use!

just got the led light-up spinning top and it's a hit at parties! the lights are mesmerizing, especially in a dark room. it does take batteries, so that was a little unexpected. I wish it was rechargeable instead, but it’s still a fun twist to the classic spinning top.

handcrafted spinning tops are a nice touch to my collection. you can tell they’re made with care. however, my top wobbles a bit when spinning, which is frustrating. i appreciate the artistry, but i wanted something a bit more reliable for spinning competitions with my son.

got this led spinning top for my niece's birthday and she was thrilled! she’s 4, and it was easy for her to spin. but after a few uses, the lights started flickering. we still have fun with it, but it could use a little better quality in the light department.

the wooden tops are so charming and nostalgic! my husband loves to show them off to the kids. However, they tend to chip easily if they hit the ground too hard. We have to supervise playtime more than I thought, but at least they look great on the shelf!

the metal spinning tops are seriously addictive! I just can’t stop spinning them. they have a nice weight to them, giving a smooth spin. downside? they can get a bit scratched if dropped. definitely not for outdoor use, but great for indoors.

my boys are obsessed with the led light-up tops! they enjoy the colors while they spin. great for keeping them entertained during our movie nights. one concern though, the batteries run out pretty fast. would’ve loved if it came with a few extra.

I bought a set of wooden spinning tops for my daughter’s playdate and they were a hit! kids really enjoyed watching them spin, but some of them didn’t spin well right out of the box. we ended up picking a few favorites, which was a little annoying.

this handcrafted spinning top is a masterpiece! I've never seen anything quite like it. spins beautifully! only complaint is that it took a bit longer to arrive than I expected. totally worth it though for the quality!

the metal spinning tops are cool but just not what I expected. they don’t spin as long as I hoped, maybe 15 seconds on a good day. pretty to look at but I was hoping for a little more performance. maybe they'll get better with practice.

I love the aesthetics of these wooden tops! they fit perfectly in my decor, but they’re not the best for actual spinning. I think we’ve had more fun just displaying them than actually using them. still, they look good on the shelf!

the led spinning top is an exciting addition to our toy box! it’s like a mini light show. however, I do wish it was a bit more durable; my daughter dropped it once, and it stopped working. gave it a second chance but still be careful!

these handcrafted tops are perfect for gifting! I bought several for the kids in the family, but one came with a dent. It wasn’t too noticeable, and they still loved them. I guess it adds character? Overall, good quality but check them out upon arrival!

the metal spinning tops are fun for adults too! I love challenging my friends to see who can spin longer. downside is they can be a bit heavy for little hands. my toddler prefers the wooden ones, but I enjoy these for myself.

the led tops are a fun addition to our game nights! everyone gets a little competitive with them. however, they do run on batteries, which I didn't realize. would be cooler if they were rechargeable; now I’m constantly replacing them!

I found the wooden spinning tops to be a lovely touch for our family game night! they have a rustic charm that adds to the fun. however, my kids found them a bit less impressive compared to the flashy led tops. they don’t create as much excitement.

the handcrafted tops are amazing to look at but not the best for actual spinning. I was really hoping they would perform better since they look so nice. perfect for decor, but I might just stick to the metal ones for spinning fun!

I bought the set of metal tops for myself, and they are very sturdy! they spin for a while too. but I noticed a couple had slight dents. didn't seem to affect the spin, but it was a little disappointing given the price point.

the kids love the led light-up tops! they scream with excitement when they spin them. however, I noticed that the plastic part that houses the lights feels a little cheap. I hope they last long enough to justify the price.

these wooden tops are super cute! I got them for my 3-year-old and they're safe and easy for him to use. the only issue is that they sometimes don’t spin straight. great for little hands, just wish they spun a bit better.

the metal spinning tops are a solid choice! they're really robust and spin nicely. however, I do wish they had more variety in design; they’re all kind of similar. still, they work great and keep my kids entertained for hours.

the led spinning tops are a blast, especially during family gatherings! they light up in pretty colors and definitely catch attention. however, some batteries didn’t last long. I guess I'll keep a stock of extras on hand!

this handcrafted spinning top was a gift for my nephew, and he absolutely loves it. spins beautifully! my only issue was the delivery time was longer than I expected. still, he was happy when it finally arrived!

these spinning tops are a great twist on classic fun! they can bring out the inner child in anyone. but honestly, some of them didn’t spin well after just a few uses. a mixed bag for sure, but overall I’m glad I got them for family game nights!

the wooden spinning tops are a real treat for kids! they enjoy decorating them with their designs. the downside? they don’t spin for as long as I'd like; between 10-20 seconds max. still, they have fun creating their own competitions!

these peppermint mints are a lifesaver! after having coffee in meetings, i pop one and my breath feels fresh instantly. they’re super cute and fit right in my pocket. the only downside is the packaging can get a bit messy if you keep them in your purse, but overall, a perfect breath freshener!

got this mint pack a week ago, and i'm really enjoying them. the minty flavor is strong but not overwhelming. they last a while too! just wish there were more in the pack for the price, but the quality is definitely there.

i've tried a lot of mints, but these are the best so far! they don’t leave that weird aftertaste like some candies do. each mint is individually wrapped, which is a nice touch. just wish they came in a larger quantity, but hey, can’t complain too much!

these are pretty good! good peppermint flavor that really wakes you up. the only thing is that they’re a little hard sometimes, so be careful if you have sensitive teeth. i still love having a pack in my bag for freshening up!

i bought these for a road trip, and they did the trick! super convenient to keep in my pocket. however, they did get a bit sticky in the heat after a few hours, which was kind of gross. still, I’d buy them again for their fresh flavor!

i’ve used these mints for a few weeks, and they do keep my breath fresh! however, I do find that they're a bit on the expensive side for how many you get. about $5 for a small pack feels steep. but i do like the minty kick!

these mints are fantastic! i keep them in my desk at work, and they’re perfect for after lunch. the refreshing flavor lasts longer than most mints. my only issue is the packaging; it can be a pain to open sometimes!

wow, these mints have become my go-to! great peppermint flavor, and they're perfect for when I'm out. but they can be a little crumbly, which makes a slight mess in my pocket. overall, I'm happy with them!

i snagged these mints for my purse, and they’re pretty cool! great taste, not too sweet or artificial. i just wish they offered some sugar-free options. still, they’ve kept my breath fresh during long meetings!
my friend recommended these, and I’m glad I tried them! perfect pocket-sized mints that refresh my breath quickly. just wish the mint flavor was a tad stronger, but I'm definitely a fan.
these are decent mints for the price. I like that they’re compact and fit in my pocket. the taste is pretty good, but they don't last as long as I'd like. might look for something stronger next time.

been enjoying these mints for a couple of weeks now! they really do freshen your breath fast. I just wish they had more variety; I’m not always in the mood for peppermint. packaging could use some improvement too.
just received my pack of these mints! loving the strong peppermint flavor. however, they can leave my mouth a bit dry afterward, which is odd. still a good option for quick freshening up.
I bought these after hearing good things, and they are nice! minty and refreshing. but I noticed they don't dissolve as easily as I hoped, which can be a bit annoying. still a solid option.
these mints are fantastic for traveling! I keep them handy for when I have a long layover. I just wish they came in a resealable pack; once you open it, it's easy to lose some in your bag!

really great mints for on-the-go! they taste fresh and clean. just keep in mind they can be a little crumbly, so don’t carry them in your back pocket if you’re worried about mess. overall, very satisfied!
popped these in my cart last week, and wow, I’m impressed! they really do keep my breath fresh, but the flavor could be a bit stronger. also, the packaging can be a hassle when you’re in a hurry.
I like these mints! they’re minty and fresh, but the quantity in each pack is a little disappointing. I flew through them faster than I expected. still, great for quick breath fixes!
I was a bit skeptical about these mints, but they turned out to be quite refreshing. they fit perfectly in my pocket, but I wish the flavor lasted longer than it does. overall, pretty decent!

these little mints are awesome for freshening breath quickly! I carry them everywhere. however, I found they tend to stick together in the pack, which makes it a bit annoying to grab one. still, I’d buy again.
the mint flavor is spot-on, but I wasn’t thrilled with how quickly they got all sticky in the heat. I like to keep them in my car, and they didn’t handle that well. overall decent though!

I’ve been using these for a couple of weeks and really enjoy the flavor. they’re strong enough to help freshen my breath after meals. just wish they were a bit cheaper; almost 4 bucks feels a little high for what you get.
picked these up on a whim, and I’m pleasantly surprised! minty burst of flavor, but be cautious with sensitive teeth. they can be a bit hard. will definitely keep a pack in my car!
couldn’t resist trying these when I saw them on sale! very refreshing and nice to have in my pockets. however, the mint flavor fades faster than some other brands. still a solid choice!
these mints are a great addition to my daily carry! I love the peppermint flavor, but I do wish there were more in the package. I seem to run out too quickly, especially when sharing!

these mints are decent, but I wasn’t blown away. the flavor is good, but I kind of expected more intense peppermint. great for a quick fix, but not my first choice when I’m wanting something stronger.

the algae scrubber works pretty well, especially for my 60-gallon tank. it fits nicely and gets rid of the slimy buildup. however, the handle feels a bit flimsy, and after a few uses, i'm worried it might break. it does the job, but i wish it was a bit sturdier.

i got the magnetic glass cleaner for my nano tank (11 gallons) and it's super convenient! just swish it around, and my glass is clear in no time. the only downside is that sometimes it gets stuck and i have to fish it out, which is a little annoying.

love this gravel vacuum! it makes cleaning my 30-gallon tank a breeze. the long tube and strong suction work nicely together. just wish the cord was a bit longer; i have to shift the tank around sometimes to reach every spot.

bought the glass cleaner before a big fish expo i was hosting. honestly, it cleared my tank like nothing else. just remember to clean the blade after each use because algae builds up fast. would be perfect if the handle was ergonomically designed.

the algae scrubber did help with cleaning my tank, but i expected it to be more effective. it does get some algae off but leaves a lot behind. for the price, i hoped for better results. it’s okay for regular maintenance, though.

this magnetic cleaner is a lifesaver! i love that i don’t have to put my hands in the tank. my 20-gallon tank looks crystal clear. however, it occasionally separates while i’m scrubbing, which can be a real hassle to fish out of the water.

the gravel vacuum is easy to use and makes water changes much simpler. my 40-gallon tank has never been cleaner! however, the connection for the hose feels a bit loose sometimes, so monitoring it is key to avoid spills.

used this glass cleaner for about a month now, and it works great with my 55-gallon tank. the only issue is that it doesn’t reach corners very well, which can be frustrating. a little more reach would make it a 5-star product.

the algae scrubber is decent for the price, but it lacks power. my 10-gallon tank had some stubborn algae that it struggled with. it works best for light cleaning, so don't expect it to handle major build-up.

i was surprised by how well this gravel vacuum works! it sucked up all the debris in my 30-gallon aquarium without any hassle. but i wish the bucket was bigger – i have to empty it a couple of times during cleaning.

after 3 months, my magnetic glass cleaner is still doing its job! but sometimes it gets a bit stuck, and i have to fight with it to come apart. overall, it saves me a lot of time cleaning my 15-gallon tank, so i'm happy!

the glass cleaner is simple and effective. my 40-gallon tank looks fantastic after using it a few times. however, the handle is a little uncomfortable during long cleaning sessions. a better grip would improve the experience.

this algae scrubber is okay, but it struggles with thicker algae. i have a 20-gallon tank, and while it helps, i often have to go back with a different tool for the tougher spots. good for light cleaning, but not a complete solution.

the vacuum works well on my 10-gallon tank. it’s straightforward to use, but the suction could be better. i find myself needing to go over areas multiple times to get everything. still, it’s a solid tool for routine maintenance.

i really like this magnetic cleaner! it does a great job on my 60-gallon tank, but i notice that it leaves some streaks behind. not a huge deal, but i prefer glass that’s completely spotless. overall, it gets the job done.

the algae scrubber was a bit disappointing. for a 50-gallon tank, it just didn’t scrub as effectively as i hoped. maybe good for minor maintenance but failed to tackle the larger algae issues for me. looking for something stronger now.

the gravel vacuum has made my cleaning routine so much easier! i love that it removes debris with minimal effort. the only downside is that it’s a bit tricky to prime at first, but once you figure it out, it’s smooth sailing.

this glass cleaner is a game changer! my 35-gallon tank looks pristine. i do wish the scrubber had a more angled edge to get into those tricky corners better. besides that, fantastic product for keeping tanks clear!

the algae scrubber is decent but not great. i have a lot of buildup in my 25-gallon tank, and while it helps, it’s not powerful enough for tougher spots. it's okay for maintenance but won't solve major algae problems.
i got this magnetic cleaner for my bigger tank (45 gallons), and it works like a charm! my only complaint is that it can lose grip sometimes, and i need to readjust it. still, saves me a lot of work!

after using the gravel vacuum for a few weeks, i can say it works as intended. sucks up debris well, but the hose is a bit stiff and makes maneuvering a little tough. for the price, it’s not bad overall.
the glass cleaner is pretty effective on my 30-gallon tank, but i find that it can be a bit awkward to hold. it’s great for quick cleanups, but i wish it had a more comfortable grip.

the algae scrubber has been good for my 20-gallon tank. it removes a good amount of algae but occasionally misses harder to reach spots. for regular upkeep, it works okay, but don't expect a deep clean.

this vacuum has been a lifesaver for my aquarium maintenance! it’s user-friendly and does a decent job. my only issue is that the suction can sometimes be inconsistent, so i have to play around with it a little during cleaning.

just got this automatic fish feeder a month ago and it really takes the stress out of making sure my fish get fed. it has programmable settings for 1-4 feedings a day, which is perfect since my fish are always hungry! the only downside is that the portion control could be better—sometimes it dispenses a tiny bit too much if you’re not careful.

this feeder has been a lifesaver while I was away for a week! I set it up for twice a day feeding and it worked flawlessly. my only complaint is that the battery life isn’t as long as I hoped. I had to change it after about 2 weeks, but it’s not a dealbreaker. my fish are thriving!

had this for about 6 months and it has its highs and lows. on one hand, it dispenses food on a schedule, which is super convenient. But the feed compartment isn’t very spacious, so I have to refill it often, like every 4-5 days. still better than manual feeding, though!

the programmable features are awesome! I appreciate being able to customize feeding times for my 3 goldfish. however, it’s a little loud during operation, which spooked them at first. they got used to it, but I still wish it was quieter.

this is a great feeder! super easy to program for my 2-year-old aquarium setup. I like the option to adjust the portion sizes too. but the instructions were a bit unclear, and I had to watch a video online to figure everything out. once I got it working, it’s been smooth sailing!

I love the idea of this automatic feeder, but it's not that reliable. Sometimes it misses a feeding or gives too much food. I’ve adjusted the settings multiple times, but it’s still kind of hit or miss. My fish appreciate when it works, though!

after switching to this feeder a few months ago, I’m almost convinced I should’ve done it sooner! I love the schedule feature. But the part where you need to clean it occasionally is annoying. It clogs if I don’t do maintenance regularly, which should be more user-friendly.

great feeder overall! I really appreciate the portion control feature. it helps me avoid overfeeding my fish. I just wish it had a larger feed capacity—sometimes I have to refill it every week. But still, it's made my life easier!

I was hesitant about getting an automatic feeder, but this one’s impressed me! I set it up for three feedings a day, which is a lifesaver when I'm busy. I do wish it was easier to clean, though. Food residue sticks around, and I’m always scrubbing it out!

found this feeder to be really useful for my betta fish. it dispenses smaller food portions perfectly! the only downside is that the programming can be a little tricky—took me a few tries to get it right. overall, still a solid purchase for the price.

I’ve been using this feeder for about 4 months, and it’s worked well. I love how I can set it to feed multiple times a day. However, it seems to work better with larger pellets—small flakes tend to jam up. That’s something to keep in mind if you use finer food.

honestly, I was expecting more for the price. the feeder did okay for a while, but started skipping feedings after about 2 months. it’s nice that it’s programmable, but if it can’t feed my fish regularly, what’s the point? I might look for a different option.

this automatic feeder fits perfectly into my busy schedule! It holds enough food for about a week, and I love that I can adjust how much it dispenses. the only thing I dislike is the loud click it makes when dispensing; it startles my fish every time!

very handy! I really appreciate being able to set a schedule for my fish. the programmable feature is fairly straightforward after you get the hang of it. my only issue? the food sometimes clogs, and I have to shake it to get it to work. still worth it, though!

just picked this up for my 10-gallon tank, and it works great! programming was easy, just took a few minutes to set up for twice daily feedings. sometimes it dispenses slightly too much, so I've been adjusting the portion control, but overall, no regrets!

I was really excited when I got this feeder, but it’s been a mixed experience. The programming is relatively easy, but the unit can be finicky. Some days it works perfectly; others, it forgets a feeding. My fish don’t mind too much, but it can get frustrating.

love how this automatic feeder has made my life easier, especially when I'm traveling! It’s really convenient to set a schedule. Unfortunately, it does seem to struggle with certain types of food. My flakes get jammed easily, so I had to switch to pellets.

this feeder has been a practical addition to my aquarium. It schedules my feedings perfectly for my two fish. However, I’ve noticed it sometimes dispenses food when it shouldn’t, which can lead to overfeeding. I’ve learned to monitor it more closely now.

I needed an automatic feeder for my vacation, and thankfully this one fit the bill. It worked well for the week away. Just wish it had more room for food—runs out faster than expected. Plan on getting another one for my second tank.

trying to manage multiple aquariums is a hassle, but this feeder has helped immensely. The programmable settings are a lifesaver. Just beware: it can get stuck if the food is too fine, so I switched to larger pellets. But overall, I'm happy with it!

I bought this feeder about 3 months ago and it’s been pretty good. I love the scheduled feedings! However, it's a bit touchy, and if you don’t set it just right, it might skip a feeding. My fish are usually forgiving, though! Overall, worth the buy.

really pleased with how this feeder has kept up with my needs. It dispenses food regularly, and it’s nice to know my fish are well-fed while I’m at work. That said, it’s tough to clean—food gets stuck in the crevices, so plan for some scrubbing.

this feeder is super convenient! I set it up for my two bettas, and they seem to love it. The only thing I would change is the noise—it makes a clicking sound that startles them. Other than that, it keeps everything running smoothly for me.

I wish I had bought this feeder sooner! It helps me stick to a regular feeding schedule for my fish. It's fairly easy to program too. I did have an issue with it jamming up a bit, but a little maintenance fixes that. All in all, I’m loving it!

this automatic feeder has been pretty decent! I appreciate how I can control the portions. But it sometimes doesn’t dispense during feedings, which is annoying. I’ve learned to adjust the settings to accommodate, but I expected a bit more reliability.

just got this fish feeder last week, and it’s making feeding so much easier! I love that it’s programmable for multiple feedings. Only downside is that the food container could be slightly bigger; it can run out faster than I’d like. But still happy overall!

overall, it’s a solid automatic feeder that gives me peace of mind. I love the portion control feature, but the instructions could be more straightforward—took a bit to figure out how to set it up. Once I worked it out, it’s been smooth sailing since!

makeup brush set i got this set about a month ago and the brushes are super soft and apply makeup really nicely. the only issue is the foundation brush is a bit streaky for me. it’s great for blending though! overall, happy with my purchase.

eyeshadow palette i wasn’t sure if this palette would be worth it since it was only $25, but the pigments are really vibrant. the matte shades blend beautifully, while the shimmers could use a little more oomph. for everyday looks, it’s perfect.

makeup sponge duo these sponges don’t expand as much as my old ones did, but once damp, they work well for my concealer and foundation. i wish they had a pointed edge for getting into the corners better. they’re decent for the price, though.

contour palette i’ve been using this for about 2 weeks and i love the bronzer shade, but the highlight is too sparkly for my taste. blends nicely, but i wish the color payoff was better on the blush side. still figuring out the best looks with it!

brush cleaner spray this cleaner is a lifesaver! it gets my brushes looking brand new in seconds. the only downside is the scent is a bit strong, but I'd rather have clean brushes than worry about that. highly recommend for makeup lovers!

makeup bag set i bought this set to organize my growing collection, and it’s so cute! holds a lot, but the zipper is kind of flimsy. i can’t fit all my palettes in there, but it’s perfect for travel. overall, cute and functional.

color correcting stick i thought this would be amazing for my dark circles, but it doesn’t blend well with my foundation. it does a decent job on redness though. it’s a mixed bag for sure. might work better with a different formula.

highlighter palette love the shades in this palette! they give a beautiful glow, but some of them have a bit of fallout. also, the packaging is not very sturdy. it’s great for special occasions but not an everyday go-to for me.

eyeliner set these liners are super pigmented! however, they smudge a little too easily for my liking. the colors are vibrant, and I love the variety. if you don’t need them to last all day, they’re perfect!

foundation stick i was really excited to try this, but it left my skin looking a little cakey. the coverage is decent, but I had to use a lot of product. it might work better for someone with drier skin. not a total win for me.

makeup brush holder this holder is really stylish and holds all my brushes nicely. the downside is that it takes up a bit of space on my vanity. overall, it’s a great way to keep things organized and looking cute.

glitter eyeshadow set i got this for a party and the colors are stunning! but man, the glitter fallout is real. I spent a lot of time cleaning up after applying it. if you don’t mind the mess, it’s worth it for the sparkle.

lipstick set these lipsticks are so creamy and come in great colors! only wish the staying power was better. they fade after a few hours, so I have to keep reapplying. still love them for everyday wear.

blush and bronzer duo this duo is super cute and gives me a nice glow! but the blush is a bit too pigmented for my skin tone. I have to be careful not to overdo it. overall, a good product but not perfect for me.

makeup applicator kit this kit has everything you need! I love that it includes different types of sponges. however, the quality varies. some sponges feel cheap and I worry they won’t last long. a decent buy overall.

palette with mirrors I love the mirrors in this palette! so convenient. the shades are great too, although one of the lighter colors is a bit chalky. I still use it because the darker shades are stunning and blend like a dream.

setting spray this spray really helps my makeup last, but it feels a little sticky right after applying. the smell is nice, but I wouldn’t use it every day. still a good option for nights out when I need my makeup to stay put.

makeup brush travel set this set is perfect for traveling! I love the compact size, but I wish the brushes were a bit denser. they work fine, but I’m not sure they’ll hold up after a few trips. great for occasional use.

nail polish pen these nail polish pens are such a fun concept! but honestly, they can be a bit messy and the polish doesn’t last long. great for a quick touch-up, but I wouldn’t rely on them for a full manicure.
eyebrow gel this gel works pretty well and keeps my brows in place all day! but it can get clumpy if you’re not careful. I like the color, just wish it had a finer applicator for more precision.

liquid eyeliner this eyeliner is so easy to apply, and the tip is really precise! but it doesn’t last very long on my waterline. for regular winged looks, it’s great, but I’ll need something else for my lower lash line.

makeup organizer drawer this drawer organizer is perfect for my makeup! it holds everything and keeps it tidy. the only downside is it doesn’t fit in every drawer, so measure first. great for keeping things in order though!

face mask set I love the variety in this face mask set! some are really hydrating, but a couple didn’t do much for my skin. great for a spa night, but I’d recommend testing a few out first to see what works for you!

face primer this primer is great for smoothing my skin before makeup! but it can feel a bit greasy after application. I still use it because it helps my makeup stay on longer. just wish I could find the right balance.
facial mist i bought this mist for a refreshing pick-me-up, and it feels amazing! however, the scent is a bit too strong for me. it’s nice for hot days, just not sure I’d use it every day.

makeup setting powder this powder does a fantastic job of keeping my face matte! but be careful - it can be a bit too white if you overapply. great for pictures though, because it gives you a smooth finish.

colorful cream blush this cream blush has such a beautiful color payoff! love how it blends, but it can be a little too dewy for my oily skin. for those with dry skin, it’s probably perfect! overall, a fun addition to my collection.

lip balm set these lip balms are super moisturizing! have been using them for a couple of weeks. the only downside is the flavors are a bit too sweet for my taste. still keep one in my bag at all times though!

The bouquet I received was stunning! The colors were vibrant, and the arrangement was well thought out. I got it for my mom's birthday, and she loved it. However, some of the flowers started wilting within a week, which was a bit disappointing. Overall, I'd still order again for special occasions.

Ordered a mixed floral arrangement for my sister's graduation. It arrived on time and looked beautiful! But, the price was a bit steep - $45 for a bouquet that lasted about 5 days. Just wish they had more options at different price points.

I wanted to surprise my wife with a delivery of her favorite flowers. The service was smooth, and delivery was just as promised. The only downside was that a couple of the petals were bruised. Still, she loved it, and that’s what matters most!

This is the second time I’ve tried this flower delivery service. The first one was fantastic, but this latest bouquet looked a bit messy on arrival. I think the delivery might have been rough, but the flowers were still fresh.

Got a dozen roses for our anniversary. They were beautiful and smelled amazing! They lasted a good week, but I wish the vase had been included since I didn't have one on hand. It's definitely a must-have if you’re gifting flowers.

I received a stunning arrangement for my birthday, and it was worth every penny at $60! So many different flowers! Only thing is, the delivery took a bit longer than I expected, but was totally worth it for the quality.

Mixed feelings about this floral delivery. The bouquet was gorgeous, and I got it for only $30! However, a few flowers didn't last more than three days, which left me a bit frustrated. At least the ones that lasted were breathtaking!

These blooms are well-priced and came looking fresh! I got them for my office, and they've brightened up the space. However, I'm noticing that some of the leaves have started to brown after just a week. Still love them, though!

I ordered a seasonal bouquet for Thanksgiving, and it was perfect for the occasion. The colors were so festive! But a few of the flowers were beginning to wilt by the end of the week. Next time, I might pick a quicker delivery schedule.

What a fantastic selection! Ordered a floral arrangement with sunflowers and lilies for a friend's get-together. It stole the show! Unfortunately, a couple of stems were a bit too short, leaving the arrangement slightly uneven. Overall, would still order again!

Wanted to surprise my mom with flowers, and she was beyond thrilled! The arrangement had beautiful peonies and daisies, but a few petals fell off too easily. Still, I’d order from here again without hesitation.

The flowers arrived in perfect condition and the arrangement was lovely. However, I was shocked to see that it cost me $50. I guess I expected something a bit bigger for that much. Still, they brightened up my living room!

Got a floral arrangement for a friend who just moved in. The delivery was on point, and the flowers looked fresh! I was just a little disappointed that some of the colors didn’t match what was advertised. But overall, it was just lovely!

I sent a friend a bouquet for her birthday, and she loved it! The delivery was quick, and the flowers looked lovely! The only hiccup was the card I included was printed incorrectly, which was really annoying. But she didn’t mind too much.

This flower delivery was a hit! The arrangement was beautiful and exceeded my expectations. The only issue was that some of the flowers were a bit more wilted than expected upon arrival. Still a great buy overall!

I ordered a floral arrangement for my partner, and although it looked stunning at first, several flowers started wilting by day 3. It was a bit disappointing considering I spent around $40 on it. They’re pretty, just not super long-lasting.

Loved the bouquet I got! The colors were vivid, and it had a lovely fragrance. However, I wish it had come with some care instructions. A couple of the blooms drooped after a few days, and I wasn't sure how to fix it.

The bouquet was gorgeous and colorful, and I appreciated the quick delivery! But for $35, I expected more blooms. It felt a bit sparse after a few days. Still, they were really pretty while they lasted.

This was a last-minute gift, and it actually saved the day! The flowers were beautiful on arrival, but I was bummed that the delivery fee was pretty high. Still, it made my friend’s day, so can’t complain too much!

The floral arrangement was stunning, but I was slightly let down by the fact that some of the flowers wilted too quickly. I expected more longevity for the price. I’ll probably order again, just maybe try a different bouquet next time.

Received a bouquet for my graduation, and it was gorgeous! The arrangement was thoughtful and unique. That said, it was a bit pricey at $70, and I would have liked more flowers for that cost. Still, beautiful nonetheless!

What a beautiful bouquet! The roses were vibrant, but I was surprised that a few of them began wilting after only a few days. It was kind of a letdown because I spent about $45. Lovely flowers, but I wish they lasted longer!

I treated myself to a flower delivery and it made my day! The arrangement was lovely and cheerful. But I noticed some flowers started to droop in a week, which was disappointing given the $50 price tag. Still, I loved how they brightened my space.

Beautiful flowers! I used them for my wedding centerpiece, and they were stunning. However, I wish I had received more detailed information on how to care for them since a couple of the arrangements started wilting before the big day.

Ordered a bouquet for my anniversary, and while it was beautiful, I felt like I paid a little too much. $60 and a few of the flowers didn’t last more than 3 days. They were stunning while they were fresh, though!

this pram is awesome! the bassinet style is super comfy for my 3-month-old. it feels safe and really sturdy. love that the seat is reversible too, so i can face her towards me or out. only thing is, it's a bit heavy to lift up stairs. overall, happy with it!

i've been using this stroller for my 2-year-old for about 6 months now and it's pretty good. all-terrain capability is a plus when we go to the park, but it doesn't fold up as compact as i hoped. the convertible carriage is nice, though! it adapts well as she grows.

got this pram for my baby shower and while it's cute, it's not exactly what i expected. the reversible seat is handy, but the bassinet is a little too snug for my big baby. all in all, decent but i wish it had more storage space.

this is my go-to stroller for daily walks! the all-terrain wheels work great on gravel paths. my 8-month-old loves the bassinet, though I wish the seat could recline a bit more. overall, great value for the price!

i love how smooth this pram rides over bumps! i can take it anywhere with the all-terrain capability. however, it is pretty bulky when folded, making it tough to fit in smaller car trunks. still, my baby enjoys the comfy ride.

so, here’s the deal: great pram with a lovely design. the reversible seat is a fantastic feature, but honestly, it feels a bit heavy pushing around. would be better if it was lighter for long walks. but yes, the baby loves it!

picked this up for my newborn and it’s been a good choice. the bassinet style is perfect for naps. just wish the canopy was larger to shield from the sun better. good overall, but some minor tweaks would have made it perfect!

stroller/carseat combo - loving the flexibility! my 4-month-old transitions well from pram mode to car. but sometimes, the wheels get stuck on uneven surfaces. it's a bit annoying when you're in a rush. still, not a bad purchase!

this pram is fancy and has a sleek look! reversible seat is cool; I can switch it up based on mood! but the handle is quite low for taller parents. also, the assembly wasn't intuitive at all. took about an hour to figure it out.

easy to maneuver! I took it on our first hike with my 1-year-old, and the all-terrain capability is legit. sometimes it feels a bit bulky in crowded spaces. overall, it's a solid pram but could use a more compact option when folded.

this stroller has its perks—like the huge storage basket! but the bassinet is a weird height for my short friends. sometimes they struggle to get it in and out of the car. works well for us; just keep that in mind is all.

the convertible carriage is a neat feature, especially for a growing baby. my little one loves the seat facing me, which makes me feel connected. but it’s a bit of a workout! I wish it wasn’t so heavy!

okay, so great concept but some flaws. the all-terrain wheels work well but the pram is too wide for some doorways. I hoped to use it more in shops, but that's a bummer. love the design, though. baby’s comfy!

I’ve had this pram for about a year, started with my newborn, and now my 18-month-old still fits in it. it's sturdy and the bassinet is deep, which is fantastic. only downside is that it can be a bit tricky to fold quickly when getting into the car.

the versatility is impressive! I love how it goes from a pram to stroller easily. but the weight makes it tough for me to lift in and out of the car alone. if you don’t mind some muscle work, it’s pretty cool! baby loves it.

this pram is fine. the reversible seat is nice for keeping an eye on my little one, but the all-terrain feature could be better. it struggles on really rocky paths. I expected more for the price! still works, just not perfect!

my 2-year-old enjoys the stroller. we use it daily and the ride is smooth, plus the bassinet is super soft for the baby. downsides: it’s not very compact when folded and the canopy could be bigger for sunny days.

had this pram for a few months now, and I’m torn. I love the all-terrain feature for our walks in the park, but the seat recline isn’t great for napping. my baby ends up all scrunched up! pros and cons, I guess.

bought this pram and so far it’s decent. it has a beautiful design. the reversible seat is a great touch, but the bassinet is quite small for my growing baby. my little one is getting too big, so I may have to look for something bigger soon.

the convertible carriage feature is nice, but it’s not the easiest to switch between modes. takes a bit of time and patience. love the all-terrain wheels, though! they’re super handy on our daily walks!

had high hopes for this pram! the bassinet seems comfy for my baby, but the weight makes it hard to lift. the reversible seat is great in theory, but I’m worried it won’t last as long as we need it to. overall, nice product, but with some issues!

this stroller is eye-catching and smooth to push, even on rougher surfaces! however, I found the assembly a bit confusing. once set up, it's been a joy to use! baby seems happy, so that’s what matters!

saw great reviews and had to try it. the all-terrain capability is impressive! we took it to the beach, and it handled sand well! but when it was folded, it was quite bulky to fit in my car. still, love it overall!

great option for families who like to be active! we took this pram out for a jog through the park, and it performed well. however, the handlebar doesn’t adjust much, making it a bit uncomfortable. still, it’s a solid choice for us!

this strawberry jam is a delightful treat! the chunks of fruit are so good, and it tastes like summer. i also love that it’s made with real sugar instead of corn syrup. the only downside is that the jar is pretty small for the price, so it doesn't last long in our house!

my kids love the grape jelly. it's perfect for their peanut butter sandwiches. it has a nice sweetness without being overly sugary, but it can be a bit runny compared to other jellies we've tried. still, it spreads well and tastes great!

just got a jar of apricot preserves and wow, it’s like spreadable sunshine! i use it on toast and in pastries. my only complaint is that it’s a bit too sweet for my taste, but my husband loves it, so i guess it balances out.

the raspberry fruit spread was a nice surprise! it has real berry chunks, which add a fruity texture. i do wish the packaging was better, as my jar arrived slightly dented. but overall, it’s delicious on waffles or pancakes!

i recently tried the orange marmalade and it’s a little different from what i expected. it has a wonderful citrus zing, but the peel pieces are a bit thick for my liking. i’ll keep using it, but it’s not my favorite spread.

this mixed berry jam is everything! i love slathering it on my morning bagel. it has the perfect balance of sweet and tart. the only thing i'd change is the packaging—it can be hard to scoop out the last bit!

got the blackberry jelly for my family brunch, and it was a hit! everyone enjoyed it with their biscuits. just wish it had a bit more fruit flavor; it’s delicious but could use a little more berry in it.

i picked up the peach preserves and it tastes amazing on toast! however, the consistency is a bit runny, which makes it hard to spread without making a mess. still, the flavor is divine, especially with cream cheese.

the wild blueberry jam was gifted to me, and now it's a staple in my pantry. it’s packed with flavor and really reminds me of fresh blueberries. downside is that it’s a bit on the pricier side, but i think it’s worth it for special occasions!

my husband loves the apple jelly, but i find it too artificial tasting. it’s sweet, but lacks the genuine apple flavor i was hoping for. we won’t be buying it again, but he seems to enjoy it on his toast!

i have mixed feelings about the cherry preserves. on one hand, the flavor is rich and deep, but it’s so thick that it’s hard to spread. i love cherries, so i’ll keep using it, but it’s not great for quick breakfasts.

the lemon curd is something i didn’t know i needed! it’s smooth and delicious on scones. however, it is super sweet, so if you prefer something less sugary, this might not be for you. still, i find myself reaching for it often!
got this fig jam on a whim and it quickly became my favorite! the texture is amazing, and it’s perfect with cheese. i just wish the jar was bigger because we polished it off in no time!

the blueberry fruit spread is a hit in our house! it tastes like a summer picnic, just perfect on pancakes. i only wish it came in a bigger jar because my kids eat it so fast. will definitely repurchase!

just tried the pomegranate jelly and i can't decide how i feel about it. the flavor is unique and refreshing, but it’s a little overpowering. i think it’s great for mixing into yogurt, but probably not my go-to for toast.

the grapefruit marmalade is super tangy, which i love! it's got a nice citrus kick that wakes up my breakfast. my only complaint is that it can be a bit too bitter for some people, so be warned if you're sensitive to that!

i bought the spiced pumpkin spread for fall, and it is delightful! great on toast, but the spices are really strong, so it's not for everyone. my family loves it, though, and it's nice to switch things up during the season.

just got a jar of the honey strawberry jam, and it’s a game changer! the natural sweetness from honey really elevates the strawberry flavor. my only issue is that it’s quite thick, making it tricky to spread on softer breads.

the tart cherry preserves are super flavorful and work well in baking. i used it in a pie, and everyone raved about it! however, it’s a tad too tart for my taste on its own on toast. still, it’s versatile for desserts.

the blueberry jam is bursting with flavor and contains whole berries, which is a nice touch. i just find it a bit too sweet for my liking, but my kids love it, so that makes it worthwhile. it's a staple at breakfast in our home.
the peach jelly was decent but not mind-blowing. it’s sweet, but honestly, it tasted a bit artificial to me. my daughter liked it, so I guess that’s a win, but I wouldn’t buy it again for myself.

this apricot fruit spread is amazing on toast! the texture is perfect, but the sweetness can get overwhelming after a few bites. I usually mix it with a bit of cream cheese, and that helps balance it out nicely!

i love how unique the lychee jam is! it’s super fragrant and tastes divine on pancakes. however, it did take me a couple of tries to get used to the flavor. it’s definitely not your typical fruit spread, but worth a try!

the blackberry preserves are a staple in my kitchen. they have a nice balance between sweet and tart which is perfect for my morning breads. my only complaint is that the jar doesn’t last long with my family around!

i got the cranberry jelly as a seasonal addition, and it’s great! perfect for sandwiches or with turkey. it's a bit thicker than usual jellies, which i appreciate, but the flavor is a little tart for my usual taste.

the raspberry jam is fantastic! nice and chunky with real fruit pieces. only downside is that it's pretty sweet, so for those who prefer a low-sugar option, it might not be the best pick. but I can't resist it on toast!

i was excited to try the passionfruit spread, but it fell flat for me. the scent was promising, but the flavor didn’t pack the punch i expected. it’s not bad, just not my favorite. might be better in smoothies than on toast.

these taffies are a hit in our house! super stretchy and chewy, which makes them fun to eat. the flavors are a bit sweet for my taste but my kids love them and they won't stop asking for more! just be careful not to leave them in a warm spot or they get sticky and hard to manage.

grabbed this taffy for a party and the bowl was empty within 30 minutes! everyone loved the variety of flavors, especially the apple and watermelon. downside? they’re a bit too sticky sometimes—one of my friends got some stuck in her hair, haha. overall, good fun, but keep napkins handy!

the texture of these taffies is really unique. they’re much chewier than other brands I’ve tried, but I wish the flavors were a bit stronger. the strawberry is nice, but it doesn’t hit you like I’d hoped. still a decent snack when you have a sweet tooth.

I’ve been purchasing these taffies for a few months now and the kids can’t get enough. great for filling goody bags for birthday parties! the only con is that they can get quite hard after a while if not eaten quickly. maybe consider packaging them with a little note to eat fresh!

a solid taffy option for sure! stretchy, sweet, and just the right amount of chewiness. I’m a huge fan of the tropical flavors, but the chocolate one was a bit odd to me—felt more like a caramel. might stick to fruity flavors next time.

so I bought these taffies on a whim, and wow, they’re surprisingly good! love the fun flavors like root beer and cherry. they’re chewy but sometimes stick to my teeth a little too much. maybe not the best option for sensitive dental work! otherwise, a nice treat.

these taffies are super fun, especially for kids! they have such a variety of flavors, and the chewy texture is perfect for long-lasting enjoyment. I did notice a few pieces were a tad too hard for my liking, which was disappointing. overall, still a solid candy.

very nostalgic! reminds me of my childhood trips to the candy store. the taffy is stretchy and packed with flavors. my only complaint is that the packaging isn’t resealable, so it can get tough if you don’t finish it in one sitting. might get stale if you don’t eat it quickly!

just got these for a sweet treat for movie night! they are so chewy and addictive. my daughter loves the blue raspberry flavor, but I think the banana is a bit off. overall, a fun candy, but definitely some hit or miss flavors.

these taffies are a great addition to my candy stash! love how chewy they are. the flavors are diverse, but I found the bubblegum a little overpowering. wish they had more classic flavors like chocolate or vanilla! would reorder for sure, just not the bubblegum next time.

my boyfriend loves taffy and I surprised him with this box. he was over the moon! loved the variety but said the grape was way too artificial for his taste. he’s still happily munching through the rest. fun way to mix things up for sweet snacks!

picked these taffies up for a family gathering and they were a huge hit! they’re stretchy and sweet, which is great for kids. some flavors are great, while others are not so much. the peanut butter one was a total skip. a good mix overall though!

I’ve had mixed feelings about these. the texture is fun and chewy, but they’re so sugary they can be overwhelming. I appreciate the unique flavors, but I think they need to tone down the sweetness a bit. would be perfect if just a tad less sweet!

these taffies were a fun treat for our game night! everyone loved the variety, and the chewy texture was a hit. flavors range from yummy to strange though—some were just too weird for my tastes. overall, a great conversation starter but may not please everyone!

my go-to candy for road trips! they’re fun to chew and keep me occupied. flavors are mostly sweet and enjoyable. however, I did have a piece that was rock hard, which was a bummer. still, I’ll keep buying them for the nostalgic vibes!

has a nice chew to it, but I feel like the flavors could be a bit more pronounced. the strawberry is nice, but the green apple was super tart and not in a good way. I’m torn—I really want to love these, but some flavors just miss the mark for me.

I bought these taffies for my son’s birthday party, and they were such a hit! everyone loved the stretchy texture and cool flavors like watermelon and orange. one little girl complained the grape tasted like medicine, though. overall, they were a big hit with most kids!

these taffy bits are super soft and chewy, but I can’t help but feel like they’re a bit too sweet. the orange and cherry flavors were great, but the root beer was a letdown. I’d buy them again, just sticking to fruity flavors. love the packaging though!

really fun taffy! I love the variety pack so you never get bored. they’re chewy and stretchy, which is great. I did find a couple pieces had that weird crystallized sugar thing, which wasn’t pleasant. still a solid treat overall, just wish for consistency!

okay, so I was really excited to try these because I love taffy, but they arrived a little hard. luckily, they softened after being left out. the flavors are solid, especially the mango, but I found the banana a bit lacking. still, I’d buy them again for the mango!

the chewy texture of these taffies is really nice, and they have some unique flavors like chili mango. it's sweet with a bit of a kick—definitely not for everyone! but for adventurous candy lovers, this one is a fun twist. some traditional flavors would be great too!

these taffies remind me of my childhood! I love the nostalgia, but I feel the flavors could use a little more depth. like the vanilla doesn’t really pop. they’re still decent chewy treats for a sweet tooth. just wish they had more classic flavors.

love these taffies! they’re deliciously chewy and have a great variety. the strawberry is my favorite, but the orange one was surprisingly tart. overall, I’m a fan, but I think they need to improve the texture on a few pieces that are too hard.

These almonds are super crunchy and fresh! I bought a 2-pound bag and it's lasting me longer than I thought. I've been using them in my smoothies and as a snack, but I noticed some pieces are a bit larger than I'd prefer. Still, great value for the price!

Got these walnuts for my baking, and they work well, but they have a slightly bitter aftertaste. I was hoping for a sweeter flavor. They are fresh, though, and I do appreciate the resealable bag. I guess I’ll just have to drown them in chocolate next time.

These pistachios are a hit in my house! Perfectly roasted and salted. I usually buy the 1-pound bags, but 2 pounds would be better. One downside is that quite a few are unshelled. I guess you can’t have it all, but they still taste amazing!

I’m pretty picky about my cashews, and these are decent. They are creamy and have a nice crunch, but the 3-pound bag had a lot of broken pieces. I love snacking on them, but I wish the quality was a bit more consistent. Overall, a solid option.

Just received my order of almonds and wow, they are delicious! Great for snacking or adding to my oatmeal. They stay fresh in their package, but I did notice some dust at the bottom of the bag. Not a deal-breaker, but something to keep in mind.

Bought these walnuts a month ago and have been using them in my granola. They add a nice crunch! However, some of them have a strange taste. I’m not sure if they went stale or if it’s just my batch. I might try a different brand next time.

The quality of these pistachios is great, but the price is a bit high for my budget. I usually buy in bulk, but I couldn't resist the freshness of these. Love the flavor but wish there were more in the bag for the price.

These cashews are so creamy! They are perfect for snacking or adding to my curries. I wish there was a bigger size option, though. I went through the 1-pound bag way too fast! Love them but might not buy them again just for that reason.

Almonds are my go-to snack, and this bag did not disappoint! They are crunchy without being too hard. Only issue is there were a few that were kind of burnt. Still, I’ll probably order them again. The price is right!

I tried these walnuts for my banana bread, and they were okay. They added good flavor, but a lot of pieces were tiny bits instead of whole nuts. If you're baking, they work, but not great for snacking. I will look for another brand next time.

Pistachios are my weakness, and this brand didn’t let me down! They’re perfectly roasted and salted, but the bag was a little smaller than I expected. Still, I’m addicted and will definitely buy again, just wish it had more nuts!

These cashews are fantastic! The flavor is rich, and they are super fresh. But, I found that some pieces were overly salty. I enjoy them in my salads, but I have to be careful about how many I toss in. Still, a great snack overall.

I really wanted to love these almonds, but they lack the crunch I expected. They were a bit stale, which was disappointing. I used them in my baking, but I think I’ll stick to my local store for freshness next time.

Walnuts are a staple in my granola, and these are fine for that. They are reasonably priced, but some pieces were a little chewy instead of crunchy. It’s manageable, but I might try a different brand next time to compare.

These pistachios are so good that I could eat the whole bag in one sitting! They’re flavorful, but the shells are a bit difficult to open sometimes. I got a 1.5-pound bag and wish I had bought two, but I’ll be back for more!

Cashews are my go-to for trail mix, and these are pretty tasty. They have a nice roasted flavor, but I wish there were fewer broken pieces. For snacking, they’re great, but for recipes, I might look for a more premium option.

Received my walnuts last week, and I was quite surprised by how fresh they tasted! The only issue is that they can be a bit oily. I use them in salads and cookies, but I might try to drain some oil off before using next time.

Almonds are perfect for my smoothies! They blend up nicely. However, I did find a few pieces that were slightly burnt. Still, overall, I'm happy with them and will keep them in my pantry for a quick snack or addition to my breakfast.

These walnuts have a rich flavor, but honestly, I found a few pieces that were a bit dark. Not what I expected. I still mixed them into my morning oatmeal; they tasted fine. Will think twice before ordering again, though.

I’m really loving these pistachios! Great crunch and flavor, but the shells can be super tough. I bought the 2-pound bag, and it’s almost gone! Just wish they were easier to open. Overall, very satisfying snack! Will buy again.

Cashews are my favorite, and these are so creamy and delicious! Only downside is that a lot of them look like they were broken in transit. They taste great either way, but I like whole nuts for presentation in my dishes.

Just got my almonds, and they are amazing! Really fresh and crunchy. I use them for snacking and baking. The only con is that they can be a bit pricey compared to other brands. But hey, you get what you pay for, right?

Walnuts were okay. I used them for baking, and they did their job, but they aren’t as fresh as I’d like. Some pieces were a bit crumbly. I think I’ll shop around a bit for a better quality next time. It’s worth the hunt!

These pistachios are a total treat! The flavor is spot on, and they’re a great snack for movie nights. I bought the 1-pound bag, and I wish I had gotten two. Just have to watch out for the salt content. Still, totally worth it!
