this spawning tank is compact and easy to clean, which I really appreciate. my fry are doing well! but be aware, the lid doesn't have any clips, and my little ones nearly escaped during feeding time. had to improvise a cover!

after 6 weeks of use, I’m pretty satisfied with this breeding tank. it holds water well and allows for easy viewing. the only downside is that the filter can be a bit too gentle for my platies; they love to make a mess!
great value for the price! i got this breeding tank for about $40, and it fits perfect in my setup. only downside, the lighting is not bright enough for viewing clearly, especially when they spawn.

it's been a couple months with this tank for my mollies, and I can't complain too much. they breed like rabbits! however, I feel the plastic is a little flimsy. just don’t drop it, and you should be fine!

overall, this is a decent breeding tank. the size is just right for my zebra danios. however, the filtration system could use some upgrades—the flow isn’t strong enough to keep the water clean without frequent changes.
i chose this tank because of its price, and it served me well for breeding. my shrimp love it! one thing to note: the material can scratch easily, so be careful when cleaning.

the fry rearing tank has been working for my betta fry, but the filter isn’t cutting it. I had to add an external sponge filter to keep things cleaner. just something to consider if you’re looking for a hassle-free setup.
this breeding tank works okay for my curious guppy fry. however, the lack of a good lid was frustrating. I had to tape down a cover because they were trying to escape too often!

I’ve used this spawning tank for a few weeks for my guppies, and they seem happy. the divider is a plus, but I noticed one of the seams is starting to leak a bit—so just be cautious with how you handle it!

Just used this tempura batter mix for the first time, and wow, it really gave my veggies a crispiness that impressed my whole family! However, I did find that I had to add a bit more water than the package suggested for it to have the right consistency. Still, overall, it's a great product and made our Friday night tempura night so much better!

I’ve been using these panko flakes for about 2 months now, and they're really good for adding that extra crunch to my baked chicken. I appreciate that they’re lighter than regular bread crumbs. However, sometimes they can burn quickly in the oven. Just have to keep an eye on them. Will definitely keep using them!

The crumb coatings are nice, but they clump together a bit in the bag, which makes it hard to get an even coating on my food. I love the flavor, especially on fish, but I expected it to be a bit more versatile. Still, it's decent for the price.

Tried the bread crumbs for my meatballs, and the texture came out pretty nice. I think it helped hold everything together. On the downside, they ended up being a bit salty for my taste, so I’d recommend checking the salt content before cooking. Overall, decent product if you don't mind a bit of extra seasoning.

This tempura batter mix is easy to use, but I wished it had a bit more flavor on its own. I ended up adding some spices to it. It fried up nicely, and everything was golden brown, but I just think it lacks a little kick. Still would buy it again!

I love these panko flakes! They’re perfect for my homemade onion rings and give them a great crunch. They can get soggy if you don’t use them right away though, so make sure to get them on the oil ASAP after coating. Overall, a solid addition to my pantry.

The coating from this product was nice, but it didn’t stick as well as I hoped. I made fried zucchini, and a lot of the coating fell off during frying. I guess it’s okay for experimenting, but I expected better adhesion. Not a total fail, but next time, I might try another brand.

I used these crumb coatings on chicken tenders last night and they turned out great! The crispiness was spot on, and my kids devoured them. However, I noticed the coating kinda browned faster than I expected, so I had to keep flipping them to prevent burning. Still, totally worth it!

The panko flakes are alright, but I think I was expecting more. They just didn’t add that much crunch to my baked mac and cheese like I hoped. There’s really nothing wrong with them, but I might try something else next time.

I absolutely love this bread crumb mix for making stuffed peppers! They bind everything together nicely without being too heavy. However, I've noticed that some of the bags are a little stale when they arrive. Just check and maybe stock up on some in-store next time!

Bought the tempura batter mix for our sushi night, and it was a hit! The batter was super light and crispy. Just one downside – a bit hard to clean off my pots after frying. But worth the mess for how good everything tasted!

I've been using these bread crumbs for a few casseroles, and they hold up well in the oven. They have a nice flavor, which I appreciate. Yet, I found them a bit too coarse for my liking. I prefer a finer texture. Overall, solid, just not my favorite.

This coating is amazing for shrimp! Honestly, it adds the perfect crunch, and it’s super easy to use. I do wish it came in a larger bag though because I seem to run out so quickly. Definitely a new staple for our family dinners.

The panko flakes are perfect for frying! I made crispy fried green tomatoes, and the crunch was unreal. However, they don't adhere well if you don't coat your veggies in egg first. It took a bit of trial and error, but now I'm loving them.

These crumb coatings have been a lifesaver for my weeknight meals! They’re quick and easy to use. However, I did find that they feel a bit greasy after frying, which I wasn't expecting. Still, they give my chicken an incredible flavor that's hard to beat.

I’ve been using the tempura batter mix for my fish tacos, and they have been a huge hit with my friends! It's super crispy and has a nice lightness to it. My only complaint is that I wish it came with more than just one bag. I go through it too fast!

This coating is just okay. It didn’t stick well enough to my eggplant for frying, and I ended up with a lot of bare spots. The flavor was decent, but after trying other brands, I think I’ll be switching next time. Not a total loss, but not my favorite.

I tried these panko flakes on my homemade chicken parm, and they added a nice crunch! The only downside is that they burn a bit easily, so just keep an eye on them while cooking. I will definitely keep using them because they really elevate the dish!

Love this bread crumb mix! It’s perfect for making meatloaf. I just wish there was a gluten-free option available because I'd love to use it for my sister's diet. Other than that, I'm super happy with the results. Their flavor adds a nice depth!

Used the tempura batter mix for an Asian-inspired night, and it was a big hit! However, I felt it could use a little more seasoning as it was a bit bland on its own. I added some spices, and that made all the difference. Still, I would buy it again!

I bought this crumb coating for zucchini fries, and they turned out well! They were super crispy. But I found the taste a bit plain. I ended up sprinkling some garlic powder on top, and that helped a lot. Good base, but needs a little kick.

These panko flakes are top-notch for frying! I made some chicken tenders last week and they came out perfectly crispy. However, they can be a bit messy to work with. Just be prepared to clean up your kitchen afterward. Totally worth it for the taste, though!

I’m mixed on this crumb coating. It worked okay for frying fish, but I found it a bit too thick for my taste. I prefer a lighter coating. It tasted fine, but just wasn’t the texture I was looking for. Might try back to my old one next time.

The tempura batter mix is fantastic for making onion rings! They fried up beautifully. However, it did clump a bit when mixed, so I had to really work it to get a smooth consistency. Not a huge issue, just a heads up for first-time users!

I used these bread crumbs for a casserole, and they held up well, but I found the flavor a bit too bland for my liking. They’re fine if you’re adding lots of sauces or spices, but by themselves, they could use a boost. Overall, just okay.

This coating was fun to use for my chicken skewers! The flavor was great, but I found that they didn’t stick super well during cooking. I ended up losing some of the crunch. Great taste overall, but I might need to adjust my prep next time.

I’ve been using this panko for a few months now, and it’s great for my fried shrimp! However, I noticed the last bag I ordered had quite a few broken flakes inside, which was disappointing. Still, I can’t complain too much since they taste amazing when fried.

Found this crumb coating mix to be really handy, especially for my veggie fries. The texture is spot on! However, my only downside is that it can get oily, so I have to make sure I don’t over-fry them. Still, will keep buying for sure!
